authors_text: Fei Hu,Honghua Chen,Xuequan Lu,Zhe Zhu,Jun Wang,Weiming Wang,Fu Lee Wang,Mingqiang Wei
title: SPCNet: Stepwise Point Cloud Completion Network
title_zh: SPCNet：逐步点云完成网络
abstract: How will you repair a physical object with large missings? You may first recover its global yet coarse shape and stepwise increase its local details. We are motivated to imitate the above physical repair procedure to address the point cloud completion task. We propose a novel stepwise point cloud completion network (SPCNet) for various 3D models with large missings. SPCNet has a hierarchical bottom-to-up network architecture. It fulfills shape completion in an iterative manner, which 1) first infers the global feature of the coarse result; 2) then infers the local feature with the aid of global feature; and 3) finally infers the detailed result with the help of local feature and coarse result. Beyond the wisdom of simulating the physical repair, we newly design a cycle loss %based training strategy to enhance the generalization and robustness of SPCNet. Extensive experiments clearly show the superiority of our SPCNet over the state-of-the-art methods on 3D point clouds with large missings.
summary: How will you repair a physical object with large missings? You may first recover its global yet coarse shape and stepwise increase its local details. We are motivated to imitate the above physical repair procedure to address the point cloud completion task. We propose a novel stepwise point cloud completion network (SPCNet) for various 3D models with large missings. SPCNet has a hierarchical bottom-to-up network architecture. It fulfills shape completion in an iterative manner, which 1) first infers the global feature of the coarse result; 2) then infers the local feature with the aid of global feature; and 3) finally infers the detailed result with the help of local feature and coarse result. Beyond the wisdom of simulating the physical repair, we newly design a cycle loss %based training strategy to enhance the generalization and robustness of SPCNet. Extensive experiments clearly show the superiority of our SPCNet over the state-of-the-art methods on 3D point clouds with large missings.
abstract_zh: 您将如何修复有大量缺失的物体？您可以首先恢复其全局但粗糙的形状，并逐步增加其局部细节。我们有动力模仿上述物理修复程序来解决点云完成任务。我们针对具有大量缺失的各种 3D 模型提出了一种新颖的逐步点云补全网络 (SPCNet)。 SPCNet具有分层的自下而上的网络架构。它以迭代方式完成形状补全，1）首先推断粗略结果的全局特征； 2）然后借助全局特征推断局部特征； 3）最终借助局部特征和粗略结果推断出详细结果。除了模拟物理修复的智慧之外，我们新设计了一种基于循环损失%的训练策略，以增强SPCNet的泛化性和鲁棒性。大量实验清楚地表明，我们的 SPCNet 相对于具有大量缺失的 3D 点云的最先进方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPCNet的分步点云补全网络，用于修复具有大缺失区域的3D模型。
AI.motivation: 受物理修复过程中先恢复整体粗略形状再逐步增加局部细节的启发，旨在解决点云补全任务中大缺失区域的修复问题。
AI.method: SPCNet采用层次化自底向上的网络架构，通过迭代方式完成补全：1）首先推断粗略结果的全局特征；2）利用全局特征推断局部特征；3）结合局部特征和粗略结果生成详细结果。并设计了基于循环损失的训练策略以增强泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SPCNet在具有大缺失区域的3D点云数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SPCNet通过模拟物理修复流程并结合循环损失训练策略，有效解决了大缺失点云补全问题，展现出优越的性能和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Feng,Heming Du,Yueqi Duan,Yongpan Liu,Hehe Fan
title: SEFormer: Structure Embedding Transformer for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: SEFormer：用于 3D 对象检测的结构嵌入变压器
abstract: Effectively preserving and encoding structure features from objects in irregular and sparse LiDAR points is a key challenge to 3D object detection on point cloud. Recently, Transformer has demonstrated promising performance on many 2D and even 3D vision tasks. Compared with the fixed and rigid convolution kernels, the self-attention mechanism in Transformer can adaptively exclude the unrelated or noisy points and thus suitable for preserving the local spatial structure in irregular LiDAR point cloud. However, Transformer only performs a simple sum on the point features, based on the self-attention mechanism, and all the points share the same transformation for value. Such isotropic operation lacks the ability to capture the direction-distance-oriented local structure which is important for 3D object detection. In this work, we propose a Structure-Embedding transFormer (SEFormer), which can not only preserve local structure as traditional Transformer but also have the ability to encode the local structure. Compared to the self-attention mechanism in traditional Transformer, SEFormer learns different feature transformations for value points based on the relative directions and distances to the query point. Then we propose a SEFormer based network for high-performance 3D object detection. Extensive experiments show that the proposed architecture can achieve SOTA results on Waymo Open Dataset, the largest 3D detection benchmark for autonomous driving. Specifically, SEFormer achieves 79.02% mAP, which is 1.2% higher than existing works. We will release the codes.
summary: Effectively preserving and encoding structure features from objects in irregular and sparse LiDAR points is a key challenge to 3D object detection on point cloud. Recently, Transformer has demonstrated promising performance on many 2D and even 3D vision tasks. Compared with the fixed and rigid convolution kernels, the self-attention mechanism in Transformer can adaptively exclude the unrelated or noisy points and thus suitable for preserving the local spatial structure in irregular LiDAR point cloud. However, Transformer only performs a simple sum on the point features, based on the self-attention mechanism, and all the points share the same transformation for value. Such isotropic operation lacks the ability to capture the direction-distance-oriented local structure which is important for 3D object detection. In this work, we propose a Structure-Embedding transFormer (SEFormer), which can not only preserve local structure as traditional Transformer but also have the ability to encode the local structure. Compared to the self-attention mechanism in traditional Transformer, SEFormer learns different feature transformations for value points based on the relative directions and distances to the query point. Then we propose a SEFormer based network for high-performance 3D object detection. Extensive experiments show that the proposed architecture can achieve SOTA results on Waymo Open Dataset, the largest 3D detection benchmark for autonomous driving. Specifically, SEFormer achieves 79.02% mAP, which is 1.2% higher than existing works. We will release the codes.
abstract_zh: 有效保留和编码不规则和稀疏 LiDAR 点中对象的结构特征是点云上 3D 对象检测的关键挑战。最近，Transformer 在许多 2D 甚至 3D 视觉任务上展示了令人鼓舞的性能。与固定且刚性的卷积核相比，Transformer 中的自注意力机制可以自适应地排除不相关或有噪声的点，因此适合保留不规则 LiDAR 点云中的局部空间结构。然而，Transformer 仅基于自注意力机制对点特征进行简单求和，并且所有点共享相同的值变换。这种各向同性操作缺乏捕获方向距离导向的局部结构的能力，而这对于 3D 物体检测很重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种结构嵌入变换器（SEFormer），它不仅可以像传统变换器一样保留局部结构，而且还具有对局部结构进行编码的能力。与传统 Transformer 中的自注意力机制相比，SEFormer 根据与查询点的相对方向和距离来学习值点的不同特征变换。然后，我们提出了一种基于 SEFormer 的网络，用于高性能 3D 对象检测。大量实验表明，所提出的架构可以在自动驾驶最大的 3D 检测基准 Waymo 开放数据集上实现 SOTA 结果。具体来说，SEFormer 实现了 79.02% mAP，比现有作品高出 1.2%。我们将发布代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEFormer结构嵌入Transformer，用于解决三维物体检测中不规则稀疏LiDAR点云的结构特征保留与编码问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在处理LiDAR点云时仅通过自注意力机制简单求和特征，无法捕捉方向-距离导向的局部结构，而这对三维检测至关重要。
AI.method: 设计SEFormer通过基于查询点相对方向和距离学习不同的值点特征变换，同时保留局部结构信息，构建高效三维检测网络。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset上达到79.02% mAP，较现有方法提升1.2%，取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: SEFormer通过编码局部结构特征显著提升三维检测性能，代码将公开释放。

search_text: SEFormer: Structure Embedding Transformer for 3D Object Detection SEFormer：用于 3D 对象检测的结构嵌入变压器 Effectively preserving and encoding structure features from objects in irregular and sparse LiDAR points is a key challenge to 3D object detection on point cloud. Recently, Transformer has demonstrated promising performance on many 2D and even 3D vision tasks. Compared with the fixed and rigid convolution kernels, the self-attention mechanism in Transformer can adaptively exclude the unrelated or noisy points and thus suitable for preserving the local spatial structure in irregular LiDAR point cloud. However, Transformer only performs a simple sum on the point features, based on the self-attention mechanism, and all the points share the same transformation for value. Such isotropic operation lacks the ability to capture the direction-distance-oriented local structure which is important for 3D object detection. In this work, we propose a Structure-Embedding transFormer (SEFormer), which can not only preserve local structure as traditional Transformer but also have the ability to encode the local structure. Compared to the self-attention mechanism in traditional Transformer, SEFormer learns different feature transformations for value points based on the relative directions and distances to the query point. Then we propose a SEFormer based network for high-performance 3D object detection. Extensive experiments show that the proposed architecture can achieve SOTA results on Waymo Open Dataset, the largest 3D detection benchmark for autonomous driving. Specifically, SEFormer achieves 79.02% mAP, which is 1.2% higher than existing works. authors_text: Junshu Tang,Jiachen Xu,Jingyu Gong,Haichuan Song,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma
title: Prototype-Aware Heterogeneous Task for Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: 用于点云完成的原型感知异构任务
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Point cloud completion, which aims at recovering original shape information from partial point clouds, has attracted attention on 3D vision community. Existing methods usually succeed in completion for standard shape, while failing to generate local details of point clouds for some non-standard shapes. To achieve desirable local details, guidance from global shape information is of critical importance. In this work, we design an effective way to distinguish standard/non-standard shapes with the help of intra-class shape prototypical representation, which can be calculated by the proposed supervised shape clustering pretext task, resulting in a heterogeneous component w.r.t completion network. The representative prototype, defined as feature centroid of shape categories, can provide global shape guidance, which is referred to as soft-perceptual prior, to inject into downstream completion network by the desired selective perceptual feature fusion module in a multi-scale manner. Moreover, for effective training, we consider difficulty-based sampling strategy to encourage the network to pay more attention to some partial point clouds with fewer geometric information. Experimental results show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods and has strong ability on completing complex geometric shapes.
summary: Point cloud completion, which aims at recovering original shape information from partial point clouds, has attracted attention on 3D vision community. Existing methods usually succeed in completion for standard shape, while failing to generate local details of point clouds for some non-standard shapes. To achieve desirable local details, guidance from global shape information is of critical importance. In this work, we design an effective way to distinguish standard/non-standard shapes with the help of intra-class shape prototypical representation, which can be calculated by the proposed supervised shape clustering pretext task, resulting in a heterogeneous component w.r.t completion network. The representative prototype, defined as feature centroid of shape categories, can provide global shape guidance, which is referred to as soft-perceptual prior, to inject into downstream completion network by the desired selective perceptual feature fusion module in a multi-scale manner. Moreover, for effective training, we consider difficulty-based sampling strategy to encourage the network to pay more attention to some partial point clouds with fewer geometric information. Experimental results show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods and has strong ability on completing complex geometric shapes.
abstract_zh: 点云补全旨在从部分点云中恢复原始形状信息，引起了3D视觉社区的关注。现有的方法通常可以成功完成标准形状，但无法为某些非标准形状生成点云的局部细节。为了获得理想的局部细节，全局形状信息的指导至关重要。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种借助类内形状原型表示来区分标准/非标准形状的有效方法，该表示可以通过所提出的监督形状聚类借口任务来计算，从而产生异构组件 w.r.t 完成网络。代表性原型被定义为形状类别的特征质心，可以提供全局形状指导（称为软感知先验），通过所需的选择性感知特征融合模块以多尺度方式注入下游完成网络。此外，为了有效训练，我们考虑基于难度的采样策略，以鼓励网络更多地关注一些几何信息较少的部分点云。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于其他最先进的方法，并且具有很强的完成复杂几何形状的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原型感知的异构任务框架，用于解决点云补全中非标准形状局部细节生成不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法在处理标准形状时表现良好，但难以生成非标准形状的局部细节，需借助全局形状信息进行指导。
AI.method: 设计监督形状聚类预训练任务获取类内原型表示，构建异构补全网络；通过软感知先验和多尺度选择性感知融合模块注入全局形状信息，并采用难度采样策略优化训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在复杂几何形状补全任务中优于现有最先进方法，有效提升了局部细节生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 结合原型感知与异构任务框架，通过全局-局部特征协同优化，显著提升了非标准形状点云补全效果。

search_text: Prototype-Aware Heterogeneous Task for Point Cloud Completion 用于点云完成的原型感知异构任务 Point cloud completion, which aims at recovering original shape information from partial point clouds, has attracted attention on 3D vision community. Existing methods usually succeed in completion for standard shape, while failing to generate local details of point clouds for some non-standard shapes. To achieve desirable local details, guidance from global shape information is of critical importance. In this work, we design an effective way to distinguish standard/non-standard shapes with the help of intra-class shape prototypical representation, which can be calculated by the proposed supervised shape clustering pretext task, resulting in a heterogeneous component w.r.t completion network. The representative prototype, defined as feature centroid of shape categories, can provide global shape guidance, which is referred to as soft-perceptual prior, to inject into downstream completion network by the desired selective perceptual feature fusion module in a multi-scale manner. Moreover, for effective training, we consider difficulty-based sampling strategy to encourage the network to pay more attention to some partial point clouds with fewer geometric information. Experimental results show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods and has strong ability on completing complex geometric shapes. 点云补全旨在从部分点云中恢复原始形状信息，引起了3D视觉社区的关注。现有的方法通常可以成功完成标准形状，但无法为某些非标准形状生成点云的局部细节。为了获得理想的局部细节，全局形状信息的指导至关重要。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种借助类内形状原型表示来区分标准/非标准形状的有效方法，该表示可以通过所提出的监督形状聚类借口任务来计算，从而产生异构组件 w.r.t 完成网络。代表性原型被定义为形状类别的特征质心，可以提供全局形状指导（称为软感知先验），通过所需的选择性感知特征融合模块以多尺度方式注入下游完成网络。此外，为了有效训练，我们考虑基于难度的采样策略，以鼓励网络更多地关注一些几何信息较少的部分点云。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于其他最先进的方法，并且具有很强的完成复杂几何形状的能力。 本文提出一种基于原型感知的异构任务框架，用于解决点云补全中非标准形状局部细节生成不足的问题。 Junshu Tang,Jiachen Xu,Jingyu Gong,Haichuan Song,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Peiwang Tang,Xianchao Zhang
title: Features Fusion Framework for Multimodal Irregular Time-series Events
title_zh: 多模态不规则时间序列事件的特征融合框架
abstract: Some data from multiple sources can be modeled as multimodal time-series events which have different sampling frequencies, data compositions, temporal relations and characteristics. Different types of events have complex nonlinear relationships, and the time of each event is irregular. Neither the classical Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) model nor the current state-of-the-art Transformer model can deal with these features well. In this paper, a features fusion framework for multimodal irregular time-series events is proposed based on the Long Short-Term Memory networks (LSTM). Firstly, the complex features are extracted according to the irregular patterns of different events. Secondly, the nonlinear correlation and complex temporal dependencies relationship between complex features are captured and fused into a tensor. Finally, a feature gate are used to control the access frequency of different tensors. Extensive experiments on MIMIC-III dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly outperforms to the existing methods in terms of AUC (the area under Receiver Operating Characteristic curve) and AP (Average Precision).
summary: Some data from multiple sources can be modeled as multimodal time-series events which have different sampling frequencies, data compositions, temporal relations and characteristics. Different types of events have complex nonlinear relationships, and the time of each event is irregular. Neither the classical Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) model nor the current state-of-the-art Transformer model can deal with these features well. In this paper, a features fusion framework for multimodal irregular time-series events is proposed based on the Long Short-Term Memory networks (LSTM). Firstly, the complex features are extracted according to the irregular patterns of different events. Secondly, the nonlinear correlation and complex temporal dependencies relationship between complex features are captured and fused into a tensor. Finally, a feature gate are used to control the access frequency of different tensors. Extensive experiments on MIMIC-III dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly outperforms to the existing methods in terms of AUC (the area under Receiver Operating Characteristic curve) and AP (Average Precision).
abstract_zh: 来自多个来源的一些数据可以建模为具有不同采样频率、数据组成、时间关系和特征的多模态时间序列事件。不同类型的事件具有复杂的非线性关系，并且每个事件发生的时间是不规则的。经典的循环神经网络（RNN）模型和当前最先进的 Transformer 模型都无法很好地处理这些特征。本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的多模态不规则时间序列事件的特征融合框架。首先，根据不同事件的不规则模式提取复杂特征。其次，捕获复杂特征之间的非线性相关性和复杂的时间依赖性关系并将其融合成张量。最后，使用特征门来控制不同张量的访问频率。 MIMIC-III 数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的框架在 AUC（接收者操作特征曲线下的面积）和 AP（平均精度）方面显着优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于LSTM的多模态不规则时间序列事件特征融合框架，以有效处理不同采样频率和复杂时间依赖性的数据。
AI.motivation: 现有模型如RNN和Transformer难以有效处理多模态不规则时间序列的复杂非线性关系和不规则时间依赖性。
AI.method: 基于LSTM的特征融合框架，首先提取不规则事件的复杂特征，然后通过张量捕捉非线性关联和时间依赖性，并利用特征门控制不同张量的访问频率。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-III数据集上的实验表明，该框架在AUC和AP指标上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了多模态不规则时间序列的处理难题，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。

authors_text: Dongdong Chen,Mike Davies,Matthias J. Ehrhardt,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Ferdia Sherry,Julián Tachella
title: Imaging with Equivariant Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用等变深度学习进行成像
comment: To appear in IEEE Signal Processing Magazine
comments: To appear in IEEE Signal Processing Magazine
abstract: From early image processing to modern computational imaging, successful models and algorithms have relied on a fundamental property of natural signals: symmetry. Here symmetry refers to the invariance property of signal sets to transformations such as translation, rotation or scaling. Symmetry can also be incorporated into deep neural networks in the form of equivariance, allowing for more data-efficient learning. While there has been important advances in the design of end-to-end equivariant networks for image classification in recent years, computational imaging introduces unique challenges for equivariant network solutions since we typically only observe the image through some noisy ill-conditioned forward operator that itself may not be equivariant. We review the emerging field of equivariant imaging and show how it can provide improved generalization and new imaging opportunities. Along the way we show the interplay between the acquisition physics and group actions and links to iterative reconstruction, blind compressed sensing and self-supervised learning.
summary: From early image processing to modern computational imaging, successful models and algorithms have relied on a fundamental property of natural signals: symmetry. Here symmetry refers to the invariance property of signal sets to transformations such as translation, rotation or scaling. Symmetry can also be incorporated into deep neural networks in the form of equivariance, allowing for more data-efficient learning. While there has been important advances in the design of end-to-end equivariant networks for image classification in recent years, computational imaging introduces unique challenges for equivariant network solutions since we typically only observe the image through some noisy ill-conditioned forward operator that itself may not be equivariant. We review the emerging field of equivariant imaging and show how it can provide improved generalization and new imaging opportunities. Along the way we show the interplay between the acquisition physics and group actions and links to iterative reconstruction, blind compressed sensing and self-supervised learning.
abstract_zh: 从早期的图像处理到现代计算成像，成功的模型和算法都依赖于自然信号的基本属性：对称性。这里的对称性是指信号集对于平移、旋转或缩放等变换的不变性。对称性还可以以等方差的形式纳入深度神经网络，从而实现更高效的数据学习。尽管近年来用于图像分类的端到端等变网络的设计取得了重要进展，但计算成像为等变网络解决方案带来了独特的挑战，因为我们通常仅通过一些本身可能不是等变的噪声病态前向算子来观察图像。我们回顾了等变成像的新兴领域，并展示了它如何提供改进的泛化和新的成像机会。在此过程中，我们展示了采集物理和群体行为之间的相互作用，以及与迭代重建、盲压缩感知和自监督学习的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何在计算成像中应用等变深度学习技术，以解决传统方法在噪声和非等变前向算子下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统计算成像受限于噪声干扰和非等变前向算子，导致数据效率低下，而等变性可提升模型泛化能力，但其在计算成像中的应用尚未充分研究。
AI.method: 回顾等变网络设计，分析其与计算成像物理模型的结合，并关联到迭代重建、盲压缩感知及自监督学习等技术。
AI.result: 展示了等变成像在提升泛化能力与拓展新成像场景的潜力，并揭示了物理模型与群作用间的交互机制。
AI.conclusion: 等变深度学习为计算成像提供新路径，需进一步探索物理约束与群不变性融合的理论与应用框架。

search_text: Imaging with Equivariant Deep Learning 使用等变深度学习进行成像 From early image processing to modern computational imaging, successful models and algorithms have relied on a fundamental property of natural signals: symmetry. Here symmetry refers to the invariance property of signal sets to transformations such as translation, rotation or scaling. Symmetry can also be incorporated into deep neural networks in the form of equivariance, allowing for more data-efficient learning. While there has been important advances in the design of end-to-end equivariant networks for image classification in recent years, computational imaging introduces unique challenges for equivariant network solutions since we typically only observe the image through some noisy ill-conditioned forward operator that itself may not be equivariant. We review the emerging field of equivariant imaging and show how it can provide improved generalization and new imaging opportunities. Along the way we show the interplay between the acquisition physics and group actions and links to iterative reconstruction, blind compressed sensing and self-supervised learning. 从早期的图像处理到现代计算成像，成功的模型和算法都依赖于自然信号的基本属性：对称性。这里的对称性是指信号集对于平移、旋转或缩放等变换的不变性。对称性还可以以等方差的形式纳入深度神经网络，从而实现更高效的数据学习。尽管近年来用于图像分类的端到端等变网络的设计取得了重要进展，但计算成像为等变网络解决方案带来了独特的挑战，因为我们通常仅通过一些本身可能不是等变的噪声病态前向算子来观察图像。我们回顾了等变成像的新兴领域，并展示了它如何提供改进的泛化和新的成像机会。在此过程中，我们展示了采集物理和群体行为之间的相互作用，以及与迭代重建、盲压缩感知和自监督学习的联系。 本文探讨了如何在计算成像中应用等变深度学习技术，以解决传统方法在噪声和非等变前向算子下的局限性。 Dongdong Chen,Mike Davies,Matthias J. Ehrhardt,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Ferdia Sherry,Julián Tachella eess.SP,cs.CV

authors_text: Guanxiong Liu,Abdallah Khreishah,Fatima Sharadgah,Issa Khalil
title: An Adaptive Black-box Defense against Trojan Attacks (TrojDef)
title_zh: 针对木马攻击的自适应黑盒防御 (TrojDef)
abstract: Trojan backdoor is a poisoning attack against Neural Network (NN) classifiers in which adversaries try to exploit the (highly desirable) model reuse property to implant Trojans into model parameters for backdoor breaches through a poisoned training process. Most of the proposed defenses against Trojan attacks assume a white-box setup, in which the defender either has access to the inner state of NN or is able to run back-propagation through it. In this work, we propose a more practical black-box defense, dubbed TrojDef, which can only run forward-pass of the NN. TrojDef tries to identify and filter out Trojan inputs (i.e., inputs augmented with the Trojan trigger) by monitoring the changes in the prediction confidence when the input is repeatedly perturbed by random noise. We derive a function based on the prediction outputs which is called the prediction confidence bound to decide whether the input example is Trojan or not. The intuition is that Trojan inputs are more stable as the misclassification only depends on the trigger, while benign inputs will suffer when augmented with noise due to the perturbation of the classification features. Through mathematical analysis, we show that if the attacker is perfect in injecting the backdoor, the Trojan infected model will be trained to learn the appropriate prediction confidence bound, which is used to distinguish Trojan and benign inputs under arbitrary perturbations. However, because the attacker might not be perfect in injecting the backdoor, we introduce a nonlinear transform to the prediction confidence bound to improve the detection accuracy in practical settings. Extensive empirical evaluations show that TrojDef significantly outperforms the-state-of-the-art defenses and is highly stable under different settings, even when the classifier architecture, the training process, or the hyper-parameters change.
summary: Trojan backdoor is a poisoning attack against Neural Network (NN) classifiers in which adversaries try to exploit the (highly desirable) model reuse property to implant Trojans into model parameters for backdoor breaches through a poisoned training process. Most of the proposed defenses against Trojan attacks assume a white-box setup, in which the defender either has access to the inner state of NN or is able to run back-propagation through it. In this work, we propose a more practical black-box defense, dubbed TrojDef, which can only run forward-pass of the NN. TrojDef tries to identify and filter out Trojan inputs (i.e., inputs augmented with the Trojan trigger) by monitoring the changes in the prediction confidence when the input is repeatedly perturbed by random noise. We derive a function based on the prediction outputs which is called the prediction confidence bound to decide whether the input example is Trojan or not. The intuition is that Trojan inputs are more stable as the misclassification only depends on the trigger, while benign inputs will suffer when augmented with noise due to the perturbation of the classification features. Through mathematical analysis, we show that if the attacker is perfect in injecting the backdoor, the Trojan infected model will be trained to learn the appropriate prediction confidence bound, which is used to distinguish Trojan and benign inputs under arbitrary perturbations. However, because the attacker might not be perfect in injecting the backdoor, we introduce a nonlinear transform to the prediction confidence bound to improve the detection accuracy in practical settings. Extensive empirical evaluations show that TrojDef significantly outperforms the-state-of-the-art defenses and is highly stable under different settings, even when the classifier architecture, the training process, or the hyper-parameters change.
abstract_zh: 特洛伊木马后门是针对神经网络（NN）分类器的中毒攻击，攻击者试图利用（非常理想的）模型重用属性，通过中毒的训练过程将特洛伊木马植入模型参数中，从而破坏后门。大多数针对木马攻击的防御措施都假设采用白盒设置，其中防御者可以访问 NN 的内部状态，或者能够通过它运行反向传播。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种更实用的黑盒防御，称为 TrojDef，它只能运行神经网络的前向传递。当输入反复受到随机噪声干扰时，TrojDef 尝试通过监视预测置信度的变化来识别和过滤特洛伊木马输入（即，通过特洛伊触发器增强的输入）。我们根据预测输出导出一个函数，称为预测置信界，以决定输入示例是否是木马。直觉是，木马输入更稳定，因为错误分类仅取决于触发器，而良性输入在由于分类特征的扰动而受到噪声增强时会受到影响。通过数学分析，我们表明，如果攻击者完美地注入后门，木马感染模型将被训练以学习适当的预测置信区间，用于在任意扰动下区分木马和良性输入。然而，由于攻击者在注入后门方面可能并不完美，因此我们对预测置信界引入了非线性变换，以提高实际设置中的检测精度。广泛的实证评估表明，TrojDef 显着优于最先进的防御，并且在不同设置下高度稳定，即使分类器架构、训练过程或超参数发生变化也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TrojDef的黑盒防御方法，用于检测神经网络分类器中的后门攻击，仅需模型的前向传播能力。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法多依赖白盒条件（可访问模型内部状态或反向传播），而实际场景中此类条件难以满足，需更实用的黑盒防御方案。
AI.method: 通过重复对输入添加随机噪声并监控预测置信度变化，计算预测置信度边界函数以区分后门样本与正常样本，并引入非线性变换提升检测精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，TrojDef在多种设置下显著优于现有方法，且对模型结构、训练过程及超参数变化具有高度稳定性。
AI.conclusion: TrojDef为黑盒场景下的后门攻击检测提供了有效且实用的解决方案，适用于实际部署环境。

authors_text: Eric Horvitz
title: On the Horizon: Interactive and Compositional Deepfakes
title_zh: 即将到来：交互式和组合式 Deepfakes
comment: CCC Blue Sky Ideas paper, published at the ACM International Conference on Multimodal Interaction (ICMI '22), November 7-11, 2022
comments: CCC Blue Sky Ideas paper, published at the ACM International Conference on Multimodal Interaction (ICMI '22), November 7-11, 2022
abstract: Over a five-year period, computing methods for generating high-fidelity, fictional depictions of people and events moved from exotic demonstrations by computer science research teams into ongoing use as a tool of disinformation. The methods, referred to with the portmanteau of "deepfakes," have been used to create compelling audiovisual content. Here, I share challenges ahead with malevolent uses of two classes of deepfakes that we can expect to come into practice with costly implications for society: interactive and compositional deepfakes. Interactive deepfakes have the capability to impersonate people with realistic interactive behaviors, taking advantage of advances in multimodal interaction. Compositional deepfakes leverage synthetic content in larger disinformation plans that integrate sets of deepfakes over time with observed, expected, and engineered world events to create persuasive synthetic histories. Synthetic histories can be constructed manually but may one day be guided by adversarial generative explanation (AGE) techniques. In the absence of mitigations, interactive and compositional deepfakes threaten to move us closer to a post-epistemic world, where fact cannot be distinguished from fiction. I shall describe interactive and compositional deepfakes and reflect about cautions and potential mitigations to defend against them.
summary: Over a five-year period, computing methods for generating high-fidelity, fictional depictions of people and events moved from exotic demonstrations by computer science research teams into ongoing use as a tool of disinformation. The methods, referred to with the portmanteau of "deepfakes," have been used to create compelling audiovisual content. Here, I share challenges ahead with malevolent uses of two classes of deepfakes that we can expect to come into practice with costly implications for society: interactive and compositional deepfakes. Interactive deepfakes have the capability to impersonate people with realistic interactive behaviors, taking advantage of advances in multimodal interaction. Compositional deepfakes leverage synthetic content in larger disinformation plans that integrate sets of deepfakes over time with observed, expected, and engineered world events to create persuasive synthetic histories. Synthetic histories can be constructed manually but may one day be guided by adversarial generative explanation (AGE) techniques. In the absence of mitigations, interactive and compositional deepfakes threaten to move us closer to a post-epistemic world, where fact cannot be distinguished from fiction. I shall describe interactive and compositional deepfakes and reflect about cautions and potential mitigations to defend against them.
abstract_zh: 在五年的时间里，用于生成人物和事件的高保真、虚构描述的计算方法从计算机科学研究团队的奇异演示转变为持续用作虚假信息的工具。这些方法被称为“deepfakes”，已被用来创建引人注目的视听内容。在这里，我分享了两类深度伪造品的恶意使用所面临的挑战，我们预计这两种深度伪造品的付诸实践会给社会带来代价高昂的影响：交互式深度伪造品和合成深度伪造品。交互式深度假货能够利用多模式交互的进步来模仿具有真实交互行为的人。组合式深度伪造利用更大的虚假信息计划中的合成内容，将随着时间的推移将一系列深度伪造与观察到的、预期的和设计的世界事件相结合，以创建有说服力的合成历史。综合历史可以手动构建，但有一天可能会受到对抗性生成解释（AGE）技术的指导。在缺乏缓解措施的情况下，交互式和组合式深度假货可能会让我们更接近后认知世界，在这个世界中，事实与虚构无法区分。我将描述交互式和组合式深度伪造，并思考防范它们的警告和潜在缓解措施。

AI.tldr: 探讨交互式和合成深度伪造技术的未来挑战及其对社会的影响
AI.motivation: 警示这些技术可能带来的社会风险，并探讨应对措施
AI.method: 通过分析现有技术趋势和潜在应用场景，探讨其社会影响
AI.result: 揭示了这些技术可能引发的严重社会问题
AI.conclusion: 强调需要开发有效的防御机制以应对这些技术带来的挑战

title: ChemBERTa-2: Towards Chemical Foundation Models
title_zh: ChemBERTa-2：走向化学基础模型
comment: ELLIS Machine Learning for Molecule Discovery Workshop
comments: ELLIS Machine Learning for Molecule Discovery Workshop
abstract: Large pretrained models such as GPT-3 have had tremendous impact on modern natural language processing by leveraging self-supervised learning to learn salient representations that can be used to readily finetune on a wide variety of downstream tasks. We investigate the possibility of transferring such advances to molecular machine learning by building a chemical foundation model, ChemBERTa-2, using the language of SMILES. While labeled data for molecular prediction tasks is typically scarce, libraries of SMILES strings are readily available. In this work, we build upon ChemBERTa by optimizing the pretraining process. We compare multi-task and self-supervised pretraining by varying hyperparameters and pretraining dataset size, up to 77M compounds from PubChem. To our knowledge, the 77M set constitutes one of the largest datasets used for molecular pretraining to date. We find that with these pretraining improvements, we are competitive with existing state-of-the-art architectures on the MoleculeNet benchmark suite. We analyze the degree to which improvements in pretraining translate to improvement on downstream tasks.
summary: Large pretrained models such as GPT-3 have had tremendous impact on modern natural language processing by leveraging self-supervised learning to learn salient representations that can be used to readily finetune on a wide variety of downstream tasks. We investigate the possibility of transferring such advances to molecular machine learning by building a chemical foundation model, ChemBERTa-2, using the language of SMILES. While labeled data for molecular prediction tasks is typically scarce, libraries of SMILES strings are readily available. In this work, we build upon ChemBERTa by optimizing the pretraining process. We compare multi-task and self-supervised pretraining by varying hyperparameters and pretraining dataset size, up to 77M compounds from PubChem. To our knowledge, the 77M set constitutes one of the largest datasets used for molecular pretraining to date. We find that with these pretraining improvements, we are competitive with existing state-of-the-art architectures on the MoleculeNet benchmark suite. We analyze the degree to which improvements in pretraining translate to improvement on downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: GPT-3 等大型预训练模型利用自我监督学习来学习显着表示，这些表示可用于轻松微调各种下游任务，从而对现代自然语言处理产生了巨大影响。我们通过使用 SMILES 语言构建化学基础模型 ChemBERTa-2，研究了将这些进步转移到分子机器学习的可能性。虽然分子预测任务的标记数据通常很少，但 SMILES 字符串库很容易获得。在这项工作中，我们通过优化预训练过程来构建 ChemBERTa。我们通过改变超参数和预训练数据集大小（来自 PubChem 的多达 7700 万种化合物）来比较多任务和自监督预训练。据我们所知，77M 数据集是迄今为止用于分子预训练的最大数据集之一。我们发现，通过这些预训练的改进，我们可以与 MoleculeNet 基准套件上现有的最先进的架构相竞争。我们分析预训练的改进转化为下游任务改进的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出化学基础模型ChemBERTa-2，通过优化预训练过程提升分子机器学习任务性能。
AI.motivation: 分子预测任务数据稀缺但SMILES字符串库丰富，需借鉴大型预训练模型方法提升化学领域表现。
AI.method: 基于SMILES语言构建模型，对比多任务与自监督预训练，使用最大77M PubChem化合物数据集优化超参数。
AI.result: 在MoleculeNet基准测试中达到现有最优模型水平，验证预训练改进的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练优化显著提升下游任务性能，为化学基础模型发展提供新方向。

authors_text: Ayoosh Bansal,Hunmin Kim,Simon Yu,Bo Li,Naira Hovakimyan,Marco Caccamo,Lui Sha
title: Perception Simplex: Verifiable Collision Avoidance in Autonomous Vehicles Amidst Obstacle Detection Faults
title_zh: 感知单纯形：在障碍物检测故障中自动驾驶车辆的可验证碰撞避免
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.14403
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.14403
abstract: Advances in deep learning have revolutionized cyber-physical applications, including the development of Autonomous Vehicles. However, real-world collisions involving autonomous control of vehicles have raised significant safety concerns regarding the use of Deep Neural Networks (DNN) in safety-critical tasks, particularly Perception. The inherent unverifiability of DNNs poses a key challenge in ensuring their safe and reliable operation. In this work, we propose Perception Simplex (PS), a fault-tolerant application architecture designed for obstacle detection and collision avoidance. We analyze an existing LiDAR-based classical obstacle detection algorithm to establish strict bounds on its capabilities and limitations. Such analysis and verification have not been possible for deep learning-based perception systems yet. By employing verifiable obstacle detection algorithms, PS identifies obstacle existence detection faults in the output of unverifiable DNN-based object detectors. When faults with potential collision risks are detected, appropriate corrective actions are initiated. Through extensive analysis and software-in-the-loop simulations, we demonstrate that PS provides predictable and deterministic fault tolerance against obstacle existence detection faults, establishing a robust safety guarantee.
summary: Advances in deep learning have revolutionized cyber-physical applications, including the development of Autonomous Vehicles. However, real-world collisions involving autonomous control of vehicles have raised significant safety concerns regarding the use of Deep Neural Networks (DNN) in safety-critical tasks, particularly Perception. The inherent unverifiability of DNNs poses a key challenge in ensuring their safe and reliable operation. In this work, we propose Perception Simplex (PS), a fault-tolerant application architecture designed for obstacle detection and collision avoidance. We analyze an existing LiDAR-based classical obstacle detection algorithm to establish strict bounds on its capabilities and limitations. Such analysis and verification have not been possible for deep learning-based perception systems yet. By employing verifiable obstacle detection algorithms, PS identifies obstacle existence detection faults in the output of unverifiable DNN-based object detectors. When faults with potential collision risks are detected, appropriate corrective actions are initiated. Through extensive analysis and software-in-the-loop simulations, we demonstrate that PS provides predictable and deterministic fault tolerance against obstacle existence detection faults, establishing a robust safety guarantee.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的进步彻底改变了网络物理应用，包括自动驾驶汽车的开发。然而，涉及车辆自主控制的现实世界碰撞引发了在安全关键任务（尤其是感知）中使用深度神经网络（DNN）的重大安全问题。 DNN 固有的不可验证性给确保其安全可靠运行带来了关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了感知单纯形（PS），这是一种专为障碍物检测和避免碰撞而设计的容错应用程序架构。我们分析了现有的基于激光雷达的经典障碍物检测算法，以对其功能和局限性建立严格的界限。对于基于深度学习的感知系统来说，这样的分析和验证还不可能。通过采用可验证的障碍物检测算法，PS 在不可验证的基于 DNN 的对象检测器的输出中识别障碍物存在检测错误。当检测到具有潜在碰撞风险的故障时，就会启动适当的纠正措施。通过广泛的分析和软件在环仿真，我们证明PS针对障碍物存在检测故障提供可预测和确定的容错能力，建立了稳健的安全保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Perception Simplex (PS)的容错架构，通过结合经典算法与深度学习方法，解决自动驾驶中障碍物检测故障导致的碰撞问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在自动驾驶感知系统中的不可验证性导致安全风险，现有方法无法有效应对障碍物检测故障引发的碰撞事故。
AI.method: 分析LiDAR经典算法的严格性能边界，结合可验证的检测算法识别DNN输出中的障碍物检测故障，并触发纠正机制。
AI.result: 通过软件在环仿真验证，PS架构能提供确定性的故障容错能力，显著提升自动驾驶在感知故障场景下的安全性。
AI.conclusion: Perception Simplex通过融合可验证算法与深度学习，为自动驾驶系统建立了可预测的安全保障机制，解决了DNN感知不可验证的核心问题。

authors_text: Zhangxi Zhou,Yuyao Zhang,Yezhang Li
title: Model Predictive Control Design of a 3-DOF Robot Arm Based on Recognition of Spatial Coordinates
title_zh: 基于空间坐标识别的三自由度机械臂模型预测控制设计
comment: 6 pages, 14 figures
comments: 6 pages, 14 figures
abstract: This paper uses Model Predictive Control (MPC) to optimise the input torques of a Three-Degrees-of-Freedom (DOF) robotic arm, enabling it to operate to the target position and grasp the object accurately. A monocular camera is firstly used to recognise the colour and depth of the object. Then, the inverse kinematics calculation and the spatial coordinates of the object through coordinate transformation are combined to get the required rotating angle of each servo. Finally, the dynamic model of the robotic arm structure is derived and the model predictive control is applied to simulate the optimal input torques of servos to minimize the cost function.
summary: This paper uses Model Predictive Control (MPC) to optimise the input torques of a Three-Degrees-of-Freedom (DOF) robotic arm, enabling it to operate to the target position and grasp the object accurately. A monocular camera is firstly used to recognise the colour and depth of the object. Then, the inverse kinematics calculation and the spatial coordinates of the object through coordinate transformation are combined to get the required rotating angle of each servo. Finally, the dynamic model of the robotic arm structure is derived and the model predictive control is applied to simulate the optimal input torques of servos to minimize the cost function.
abstract_zh: 本文使用模型预测控制（MPC）来优化三自由度（DOF）机械臂的输入扭矩，使其能够运行到目标位置并准确地抓取物体。首先使用单目相机来识别物体的颜色和深度。然后，将逆运动学计算与通过坐标变换得到的物体空间坐标相结合，得到各舵机所需的旋转角度。最后，推导了机械臂结构的动态模型，并应用模型预测控制来模拟舵机的最佳输入扭矩，以最小化成本函数。

AI.tldr: 设计基于模型预测控制的3自由度机械臂控制方法，通过空间坐标识别实现精准抓取。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在动态环境或复杂任务中存在精度不足的问题，需优化控制策略以提高机械臂操作精度。
AI.method: 采用单目视觉识别物体空间坐标，结合逆运动学计算目标角度，建立动力学模型并应用模型预测控制优化伺服输入扭矩。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了控制方法的有效性，实现了机械臂的精准定位与抓取，优化了输入扭矩。
AI.conclusion: 模型预测控制结合视觉识别有效提升机械臂控制精度，为类似应用提供了可行方案。

tldr: 设计基于模型预测控制的3自由度机械臂控制方法，通过空间坐标识别实现精准抓取。
motivation: 传统控制方法在动态环境或复杂任务中存在精度不足的问题，需优化控制策略以提高机械臂操作精度。
method: 采用单目视觉识别物体空间坐标，结合逆运动学计算目标角度，建立动力学模型并应用模型预测控制优化伺服输入扭矩。

search_text: Model Predictive Control Design of a 3-DOF Robot Arm Based on Recognition of Spatial Coordinates 基于空间坐标识别的三自由度机械臂模型预测控制设计 This paper uses Model Predictive Control (MPC) to optimise the input torques of a Three-Degrees-of-Freedom (DOF) robotic arm, enabling it to operate to the target position and grasp the object accurately. A monocular camera is firstly used to recognise the colour and depth of the object. Then, the inverse kinematics calculation and the spatial coordinates of the object through coordinate transformation are combined to get the required rotating angle of each servo. Finally, the dynamic model of the robotic arm structure is derived and the model predictive control is applied to simulate the optimal input torques of servos to minimize the cost function. 本文使用模型预测控制（MPC）来优化三自由度（DOF）机械臂的输入扭矩，使其能够运行到目标位置并准确地抓取物体。首先使用单目相机来识别物体的颜色和深度。然后，将逆运动学计算与通过坐标变换得到的物体空间坐标相结合，得到各舵机所需的旋转角度。最后，推导了机械臂结构的动态模型，并应用模型预测控制来模拟舵机的最佳输入扭矩，以最小化成本函数。 设计基于模型预测控制的3自由度机械臂控制方法，通过空间坐标识别实现精准抓取。 Zhangxi Zhou,Yuyao Zhang,Yezhang Li cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Francesca Cocchella,Giulia Pusceddu,Giulia Belgiovine,Linda Lastrico,Francesco Rea,Alessandra Sciutti
title: "iCub, We Forgive You!" Investigating Trust in a Game Scenario with Kids
title_zh: “iCub，我们原谅你了！”调查儿童游戏场景中的信任
comment: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy). Francesca Cocchella and Giulia Pusceddu contributed equally to this work, hence they share the first name
comments: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy). Francesca Cocchella and Giulia Pusceddu contributed equally to this work, hence they share the first name
abstract: This study presents novel strategies to investigate the mutual influence of trust and group dynamics in children-robot interaction. We implemented a game-like experimental activity with the humanoid robot iCub and designed a questionnaire to assess how the children perceived the interaction. We also aim to verify if the sensors, setups, and tasks are suitable for studying such aspects. The questionnaires' results demonstrate that youths perceive iCub as a friend and, typically, in a positive way. Other preliminary results suggest that, generally, children trusted iCub during the activity and, after its mistakes, they tried to reassure it with sentences such as: "Don't worry iCub, we forgive you". Furthermore, trust towards the robot in group cognitive activity appears to change according to gender: after two consecutive mistakes by the robot, girls tended to trust iCub more than boys. Finally, no significant difference has been evidenced between different age groups across points computed from the game and the self-reported scales. The tool we proposed is suitable for studying trust in human-robot interaction (HRI) across different ages and seems appropriate to understand the mechanism of trust in group interactions.

Furthermore, trust towards the robot in group cognitive activity appears to change according to gender: after two consecutive mistakes by the robot, girls tended to trust iCub more than boys. Finally, no significant difference has been evidenced between different age groups across points computed from the game and the self-reported scales. The tool we proposed is suitable for studying trust in human-robot interaction (HRI) across different ages and seems appropriate to understand the mechanism of trust in group interactions.
abstract_zh: 这项研究提出了新的策略来研究儿童与机器人交互中信任和群体动态的相互影响。我们用人形机器人 iCub 实施了类似游戏的实验活动，并设计了一份问卷来评估孩子们如何看待互动。我们还旨在验证传感器、设置和任务是否适合研究这些方面。调查问卷结果表明，年轻人将 iCub 视为朋友，而且通常是积极的。其他初步结果表明，一般来说，孩子们在活动期间信任 iCub，并且在 iCub 犯错后，他们试图用诸如“别担心 iCub，我们原谅你”之类的句子来安抚它。此外，群体认知活动中对机器人的信任似乎会根据性别而变化：在机器人连续两次犯错后，女孩比男孩更信任 iCub。最后，根据游戏和自我报告量表计算的分数，不同年龄组之间没有显着差异。我们提出的工具适合研究不同年龄段的人机交互（HRI）中的信任，并且似乎适合理解群体交互中的信任机制。

AI.tldr: 该研究通过游戏场景调查儿童与机器人iCub互动中的信任关系及群体动态影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对儿童群体中人机信任机制及群体互动动态的有效研究方法与工具。
AI.method: 设计包含iCub机器人的游戏实验，结合问卷调查评估儿童对互动的感知，并验证实验工具的适用性。
AI.result: 儿童普遍将iCub视为朋友并表现出信任，错误后常安慰机器人；女孩在连续两次错误后比男孩更信任iCub；不同年龄段在游戏表现和自我报告量表上无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的工具适用于跨年龄研究人机信任机制，且能有效揭示群体互动中的信任变化规律。

authors_text: Aaron Roth,Alexander Tolbert,Scott Weinstein
title: Reconciling Individual Probability Forecasts
title_zh: 协调个人概率预测
comment: This is the full version of a paper that appears in the proceedings of FAccT 2023: The Sixth Annual ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency, 2023
comments: This is the full version of a paper that appears in the proceedings of FAccT 2023: The Sixth Annual ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency, 2023
abstract: Individual probabilities refer to the probabilities of outcomes that are realized only once: the probability that it will rain tomorrow, the probability that Alice will die within the next 12 months, the probability that Bob will be arrested for a violent crime in the next 18 months, etc. Individual probabilities are fundamentally unknowable. Nevertheless, we show that two parties who agree on the data -- or on how to sample from a data distribution -- cannot agree to disagree on how to model individual probabilities. This is because any two models of individual probabilities that substantially disagree can together be used to empirically falsify and improve at least one of the two models. This can be efficiently iterated in a process of "reconciliation" that results in models that both parties agree are superior to the models they started with, and which themselves (almost) agree on the forecasts of individual probabilities (almost) everywhere. We conclude that although individual probabilities are unknowable, they are contestable via a computationally and data efficient process that must lead to agreement. Thus we cannot find ourselves in a situation in which we have two equally accurate and unimprovable models that disagree substantially in their predictions -- providing an answer to what is sometimes called the predictive or model multiplicity problem.
summary: Individual probabilities refer to the probabilities of outcomes that are realized only once: the probability that it will rain tomorrow, the probability that Alice will die within the next 12 months, the probability that Bob will be arrested for a violent crime in the next 18 months, etc. Individual probabilities are fundamentally unknowable. Nevertheless, we show that two parties who agree on the data -- or on how to sample from a data distribution -- cannot agree to disagree on how to model individual probabilities. This is because any two models of individual probabilities that substantially disagree can together be used to empirically falsify and improve at least one of the two models. This can be efficiently iterated in a process of "reconciliation" that results in models that both parties agree are superior to the models they started with, and which themselves (almost) agree on the forecasts of individual probabilities (almost) everywhere. We conclude that although individual probabilities are unknowable, they are contestable via a computationally and data efficient process that must lead to agreement. Thus we cannot find ourselves in a situation in which we have two equally accurate and unimprovable models that disagree substantially in their predictions -- providing an answer to what is sometimes called the predictive or model multiplicity problem.
abstract_zh: 个体概率是指仅实现一次的结果的概率：明天下雨的概率、爱丽丝在未来 12 个月内死亡的概率、鲍勃在未来 18 个月内因暴力犯罪被捕的概率等。个体概率基本上是不可知的。尽管如此，我们表明，就数据或如何从数据分布中采样达成一致的两方不能就如何对个体概率进行建模达成一致。这是因为任何两个基本上不一致的个体概率模型都可以一起用于凭经验证伪和改进这两个模型中的至少一个。这可以在“协调”过程中有效地迭代，从而产生双方都同意优于他们开始使用的模型的模型，并且这些模型本身（几乎）就（几乎）处处的个体概率的预测达成一致。我们的结论是，尽管个体概率是未知的，但它们可以通过计算和数据有效的过程进行争论，并且必须达成一致。因此，我们无法发现自己​​处于这样一种情况：我们有两个同样准确且不可改进的模型，它们的预测在很大程度上不一致——为有时被称为预测或模型多重性问题提供了答案。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过协调过程解决个体概率预测模型间的分歧问题。
AI.motivation: 个体概率因事件唯一性而难以确定，但模型间存在预测分歧时需提供解决机制。
AI.method: 通过迭代实证检验，利用分歧模型相互反驳并改进，最终达成共识预测模型。
AI.result: 协调过程生成双方认可的改进模型，其预测在几乎所有场景下趋于一致。
AI.conclusion: 个体概率虽不可知，但可通过高效数据驱动的协调过程必然达成模型共识。

authors_text: Juan Tapia,Daniel Benalcazar,Andres Valenzuela,Leonardo Causa,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Christoph Busch
title: Learning to Predict Fitness for Duty using Near Infrared Periocular Iris Images
title_zh: 学习使用近红外眼周虹膜图像预测适合职责的健康状况
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.02488
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.02488
abstract: This research proposes a new database and method to detect the reduction of alertness conditions due to alcohol, drug consumption and sleepiness deprivation from Near-Infra-Red (NIR) periocular eye images. The study focuses on determining the effect of external factors on the Central Nervous System (CNS). The goal is to analyse how this impacts iris and pupil movement behaviours and if it is possible to classify these changes with a standard iris NIR capture device. This paper proposes a modified MobileNetV2 to classify iris NIR images taken from subjects under alcohol/drugs/sleepiness influences. The results show that the MobileNetV2-based classifier can detect the Unfit alertness condition from iris samples captured after alcohol and drug consumption robustly with a detection accuracy of 91.3% and 99.1%, respectively. The sleepiness condition is the most challenging with 72.4%. For two-class grouped images belonging to the Fit/Unfit classes, the model obtained an accuracy of 94.0% and 84.0%, respectively, using a smaller number of parameters than the standard Deep learning Network algorithm. This work is a step forward in biometric applications for developing an automatic system to classify "Fitness for Duty" and prevent accidents due to alcohol/drug consumption and sleepiness.
summary: This research proposes a new database and method to detect the reduction of alertness conditions due to alcohol, drug consumption and sleepiness deprivation from Near-Infra-Red (NIR) periocular eye images. The study focuses on determining the effect of external factors on the Central Nervous System (CNS). The goal is to analyse how this impacts iris and pupil movement behaviours and if it is possible to classify these changes with a standard iris NIR capture device. This paper proposes a modified MobileNetV2 to classify iris NIR images taken from subjects under alcohol/drugs/sleepiness influences. The results show that the MobileNetV2-based classifier can detect the Unfit alertness condition from iris samples captured after alcohol and drug consumption robustly with a detection accuracy of 91.3% and 99.1%, respectively. The sleepiness condition is the most challenging with 72.4%. For two-class grouped images belonging to the Fit/Unfit classes, the model obtained an accuracy of 94.0% and 84.0%, respectively, using a smaller number of parameters than the standard Deep learning Network algorithm. This work is a step forward in biometric applications for developing an automatic system to classify "Fitness for Duty" and prevent accidents due to alcohol/drug consumption and sleepiness.
abstract_zh: 这项研究提出了一种新的数据库和方法，可以通过近红外（NIR）眼周图像检测由于酒精、药物消耗和困倦剥夺而导致的警觉性状况的降低。该研究的重点是确定外部因素对中枢神经系统（CNS）的影响。目标是分析这如何影响虹膜和瞳孔运动行为，以及是否可以使用标准虹膜 NIR 捕获设备对这些变化进行分类。本文提出了一种改进的 MobileNetV2，用于对酒精/药物/困倦影响下的受试者拍摄的虹膜 NIR 图像进行分类。结果表明，基于 MobileNetV2 的分类器可以从饮酒和吸毒后捕获的虹膜样本中稳健地检测出不健康警觉状态，检测准确率分别为 91.3% 和 99.1%。困倦状况是最具挑战性的，占 72.4%。对于属于 Fit/Unfit 类的两类分组图像，该模型使用比标准深度学习网络算法更少的参数，分别获得了 94.0% 和 84.0% 的准确率。这项工作是生物识别应用领域向前迈出的一步，旨在开发一种自动系统，对“是否适合值班”进行分类，并防止因饮酒/吸毒和困倦而导致的事故。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于近红外 periocular 眼部图像的新方法，用于检测酒精、药物和睡眠不足导致的警觉性下降，以判断是否适合执行任务。
AI.motivation: 开发自动化的生物特征系统，通过分析眼部行为变化检测酒精、药物或睡眠不足引起的不适宜工作状态，从而预防相关事故。
AI.method: 改进 MobileNetV2 网络架构，利用近红外 periocular 眼部图像对受酒精、药物和睡眠不足影响的被试者进行分类，采用更少参数的深度学习模型实现高效检测。
AI.result: 模型在酒精和药物检测中分别达到91.3%和99.1%的准确率，睡眠不足检测为72.4%；二分类任务（适合/不适合）准确率分别为94.0%和84.0%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为生物特征识别在‘适合工作状态’自动分类中的应用提供了新方向，有助于提升交通安全与工作场所安全。

authors_text: Thomas Z. Li,Kaiwen Xu,Riqiang Gao,Yucheng Tang,Thomas A. Lasko,Fabien Maldonado,Kim Sandler,Bennett A. Landman
title: Time-distance vision transformers in lung cancer diagnosis from longitudinal computed tomography
title_zh: 纵向计算机断层扫描肺癌诊断中的时距视觉变换器
comment: Summited to SPIE 2023 - Medical Imaging. 10 pages
comments: Summited to SPIE 2023 - Medical Imaging. 10 pages
abstract: Features learned from single radiologic images are unable to provide information about whether and how much a lesion may be changing over time. Time-dependent features computed from repeated images can capture those changes and help identify malignant lesions by their temporal behavior. However, longitudinal medical imaging presents the unique challenge of sparse, irregular time intervals in data acquisition. While self-attention has been shown to be a versatile and efficient learning mechanism for time series and natural images, its potential for interpreting temporal distance between sparse, irregularly sampled spatial features has not been explored. In this work, we propose two interpretations of a time-distance vision transformer (ViT) by using (1) vector embeddings of continuous time and (2) a temporal emphasis model to scale self-attention weights. The two algorithms are evaluated based on benign versus malignant lung cancer discrimination of synthetic pulmonary nodules and lung screening computed tomography studies from the National Lung Screening Trial (NLST). Experiments evaluating the time-distance ViTs on synthetic nodules show a fundamental improvement in classifying irregularly sampled longitudinal images when compared to standard ViTs. In cross-validation on screening chest CTs from the NLST, our methods (0.785 and 0.786 AUC respectively) significantly outperform a cross-sectional approach (0.734 AUC) and match the discriminative performance of the leading longitudinal medical imaging algorithm (0.779 AUC) on benign versus malignant classification. This work represents the first self-attention-based framework for classifying longitudinal medical images. Our code is available at https://github.com/tom1193/time-distance-transformer.

Time-dependent features computed from repeated images can capture those changes and help identify malignant lesions by their temporal behavior. However, longitudinal medical imaging presents the unique challenge of sparse, irregular time intervals in data acquisition. While self-attention has been shown to be a versatile and efficient learning mechanism for time series and natural images, its potential for interpreting temporal distance between sparse, irregularly sampled spatial features has not been explored. In this work, we propose two interpretations of a time-distance vision transformer (ViT) by using (1) vector embeddings of continuous time and (2) a temporal emphasis model to scale self-attention weights. The two algorithms are evaluated based on benign versus malignant lung cancer discrimination of synthetic pulmonary nodules and lung screening computed tomography studies from the National Lung Screening Trial (NLST). Experiments evaluating the time-distance ViTs on synthetic nodules show a fundamental improvement in classifying irregularly sampled longitudinal images when compared to standard ViTs. In cross-validation on screening chest CTs from the NLST, our methods (0.785 and 0.786 AUC respectively) significantly outperform a cross-sectional approach (0.734 AUC) and match the discriminative performance of the leading longitudinal medical imaging algorithm (0.779 AUC) on benign versus malignant classification. This work represents the first self-attention-based framework for classifying longitudinal medical images. Our code is available at https://github.com/tom1193/time-distance-transformer.
abstract_zh: 从单个放射图像中学习到的特征无法提供有关病变是否随时间变化以及变化程度的信息。根据重复图像计算出的时间相关特征可以捕获这些变化，并帮助通过其时间行为识别恶性病变。然而，纵向医学成像在数据采集中提出了稀疏、不规则时间间隔的独特挑战。虽然自注意力已被证明是时间序列和自然图像的一种多功能且高效的学习机制，但其解释稀疏、不规则采样的空​​间特征之间的时间距离的潜力尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们通过使用（1）连续时间的向量嵌入和（2）时间强调模型来缩放自注意力权重，提出了时间距离视觉变换器（ViT）的两种解释。这两种算法的评估基于合成肺结节的良性与恶性肺癌区分以及国家肺部筛查试验 (NLST) 的肺部筛查计算机断层扫描研究。评估合成结节时间距离 ViT 的实验表明，与标准 ViT 相比，对不规则采样纵向图像的分类有了根本性的改进。在对 NLST 筛查胸部 CT 进行交叉验证时，我们的方法（分别为 0.785 和 0.786 AUC）显着优于横断面方法（0.734 AUC），并且与领先的纵向医学成像算法（0.779 AUC）在良性与恶性分类上的判别性能相匹配。这项工作代表了第一个基于自注意力的纵向医学图像分类框架。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/tom1193/time-distance-transformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间距离的视觉Transformer（ViT）框架，用于通过纵向CT影像诊断肺癌，以捕捉病灶随时间的变化特征。
AI.motivation: 传统单帧影像无法反映病灶的动态变化，而纵向医学影像因时间间隔不规则且稀疏，难以有效建模时间依赖性特征。
AI.method: 设计两种时间距离ViT方法：（1）使用连续时间向量嵌入；（2）通过时间强调模型调整自注意力权重，以处理不规则采样的时空特征。
AI.result: 在合成结节和NLST数据集上，时间距离ViT的AUC分别为0.785和0.786，显著优于横断面方法（0.734）并接近最佳纵向算法（0.779）。
AI.conclusion: 首次将自注意力机制应用于纵向医学影像分类，有效捕捉时间动态特征，代码已开源。

authors_text: Jon Arrizabalaga,Markus Ryll
title: Spatial motion planning with Pythagorean Hodograph curves
title_zh: 使用毕达哥拉斯 Hodograph 曲线进行空间运动规划
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC), 2022. Copyright @ IEEE
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at the IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC), 2022. Copyright @ IEEE
abstract: This paper presents a two-stage prediction-based control scheme for embedding the environment's geometric properties into a collision-free Pythagorean Hodograph spline, and subsequently finding the optimal path within the parameterized free space. The ingredients of this approach are twofold: First, we present a novel spatial path parameterization applicable to any arbitrary curve without prior assumptions in its adapted frame. Second, we identify the appropriateness of Pythagorean Hodograph curves for a compact and continuous definition of the path-parametric functions required by the presented spatial model. This dual-stage formulation results in a motion planning approach, where the geometric properties of the environment arise as states of the prediction model. Thus, the presented method is attractive for motion planning in dense environments. The efficacy of the approach is evaluated according to an illustrative example.
summary: This paper presents a two-stage prediction-based control scheme for embedding the environment's geometric properties into a collision-free Pythagorean Hodograph spline, and subsequently finding the optimal path within the parameterized free space. The ingredients of this approach are twofold: First, we present a novel spatial path parameterization applicable to any arbitrary curve without prior assumptions in its adapted frame. Second, we identify the appropriateness of Pythagorean Hodograph curves for a compact and continuous definition of the path-parametric functions required by the presented spatial model. This dual-stage formulation results in a motion planning approach, where the geometric properties of the environment arise as states of the prediction model. Thus, the presented method is attractive for motion planning in dense environments. The efficacy of the approach is evaluated according to an illustrative example.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于两阶段预测的控制方案，用于将环境的几何属性嵌入到无碰撞勾股图样条中，然后在参数化自由空间内找到最佳路径。这种方法的成分有两个：首先，我们提出了一种新颖的空间路径参数化，适用于任何任意曲线，而无需在其适应框架中进行事先假设。其次，我们确定了毕达哥拉斯 Hodograph 曲线对于所提出的空间模型所需的路径参数函数的紧凑和连续定义的适当性。这种双阶段公式产生了运动规划方法，其中环境的几何特性作为预测模型的状态出现。因此，所提出的方法对于密集环境中的运动规划很有吸引力。根据说明性示例评估该方法的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于毕达哥拉斯霍多格曲线（PH曲线）的二维空间运动规划方法，通过参数化路径并结合环境几何特性实现避障路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在复杂环境中难以高效处理几何约束，需开发能自适应环境几何特性的连续参数化路径规划方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1）提出无需先验假设的通用空间路径参数化方法；2）利用PH曲线的紧凑连续特性构建路径参数函数，将环境几何属性作为预测模型状态进行路径优化。
AI.result: 通过示例验证该方法在密集环境中的有效性，证明其能生成符合几何约束的最优避障路径。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将环境几何特性融入预测模型，为复杂场景下的运动规划提供了高效且连续的路径生成方案。

search_text: Spatial motion planning with Pythagorean Hodograph curves 使用毕达哥拉斯 Hodograph 曲线进行空间运动规划 This paper presents a two-stage prediction-based control scheme for embedding the environment's geometric properties into a collision-free Pythagorean Hodograph spline, and subsequently finding the optimal path within the parameterized free space. The ingredients of this approach are twofold: First, we present a novel spatial path parameterization applicable to any arbitrary curve without prior assumptions in its adapted frame. Second, we identify the appropriateness of Pythagorean Hodograph curves for a compact and continuous definition of the path-parametric functions required by the presented spatial model. This dual-stage formulation results in a motion planning approach, where the geometric properties of the environment arise as states of the prediction model. Thus, the presented method is attractive for motion planning in dense environments. The efficacy of the approach is evaluated according to an illustrative example. 本文提出了一种基于两阶段预测的控制方案，用于将环境的几何属性嵌入到无碰撞勾股图样条中，然后在参数化自由空间内找到最佳路径。这种方法的成分有两个：首先，我们提出了一种新颖的空间路径参数化，适用于任何任意曲线，而无需在其适应框架中进行事先假设。其次，我们确定了毕达哥拉斯 Hodograph 曲线对于所提出的空间模型所需的路径参数函数的紧凑和连续定义的适当性。这种双阶段公式产生了运动规划方法，其中环境的几何特性作为预测模型的状态出现。因此，所提出的方法对于密集环境中的运动规划很有吸引力。根据说明性示例评估该方法的功效。 本文提出一种基于毕达哥拉斯霍多格曲线（PH曲线）的二维空间运动规划方法，通过参数化路径并结合环境几何特性实现避障路径规划。 Jon Arrizabalaga,Markus Ryll cs.RO,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Juan Tapia,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Christoph Busch
title: Alcohol Consumption Detection from Periocular NIR Images Using Capsule Network
title_zh: 使用胶囊网络从眼周近红外图像检测酒精消耗量
comment: ef:26TH International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR). August 21-25, 2022 Montréal Québec
comments: ef:26TH International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR). August 21-25, 2022 Montréal Québec
abstract: This research proposes a method to detect alcohol consumption from Near-Infra-Red (NIR) periocular eye images. The study focuses on determining the effect of external factors such as alcohol on the Central Nervous System (CNS). The goal is to analyse how this impacts on iris and pupil movements and if it is possible to capture these changes with a standard iris NIR camera. This paper proposes a novel Fused Capsule Network (F-CapsNet) to classify iris NIR images taken under alcohol consumption subjects. The results show the F-CapsNet algorithm can detect alcohol consumption in iris NIR images with an accuracy of 92.3% using half of the parameters as the standard Capsule Network algorithm. This work is a step forward in developing an automatic system to estimate "Fitness for Duty" and prevent accidents due to alcohol consumption.
summary: This research proposes a method to detect alcohol consumption from Near-Infra-Red (NIR) periocular eye images. The study focuses on determining the effect of external factors such as alcohol on the Central Nervous System (CNS). The goal is to analyse how this impacts on iris and pupil movements and if it is possible to capture these changes with a standard iris NIR camera. This paper proposes a novel Fused Capsule Network (F-CapsNet) to classify iris NIR images taken under alcohol consumption subjects. The results show the F-CapsNet algorithm can detect alcohol consumption in iris NIR images with an accuracy of 92.3% using half of the parameters as the standard Capsule Network algorithm. This work is a step forward in developing an automatic system to estimate "Fitness for Duty" and prevent accidents due to alcohol consumption.
abstract_zh: 这项研究提出了一种从近红外 (NIR) 眼周图像中检测饮酒量的方法。该研究的重点是确定酒精等外部因素对中枢神经系统（CNS）的影响。目标是分析这对虹膜和瞳孔运动的影响，以及是否可以使用标准虹膜近红外相机捕获这些变化。本文提出了一种新颖的融合胶囊网络（F-CapsNet）来对饮酒对象下拍摄的虹膜近红外图像进行分类。结果表明，F-CapsNet 算法可以使用标准 Capsule Network 算法一半的参数来检测虹膜 NIR 图像中的酒精消耗量，准确率达到 92.3%。这项工作是开发自动系统以评估“适合执勤”并防止因饮酒而发生事故的一个进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于融合胶囊网络（F-CapsNet）的方法，通过近红外（NIR）围ocular图像检测酒精摄入情况。
AI.motivation: 酒精对中枢神经系统的影响可能导致事故，需开发自动系统评估人员是否适合工作，传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计F-CapsNet网络架构，利用标准NIR摄像头捕捉酒精摄入者的眼部虹膜和瞳孔运动变化进行分类。
AI.result: F-CapsNet在仅使用标准胶囊网络一半参数的情况下，实现92.3%的酒精检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为开发自动酒精检测系统提供了可行方案，有助于预防因酒精导致的事故。

authors_text: Souvik Datta,Mangolik Kundu,Ratnadeep Das Choudhury,Sriramalakshmi P,Sreedevi VT
title: IoT Book Bot
title_zh: 物联网图书机器人
comment: 2022 IEEE India Council International Subsections Conference (INDISCON)
comments: 2022 IEEE India Council International Subsections Conference (INDISCON)
abstract: In order to ease the process of library management many technologies have been adopted but most of them focus on inventory management. There has hardly been any progress of automation in the field of issuing and returning books to the library on time. In colleges and schools, hostellers often forget to timely return the issued books back to the library. To solve the above issue and to ensure timely submission of the issued books, this work develops a Book-Bot which solves these complexities. The bot can commute from point A to point B, scan and verify QR Codes and Barcodes. The bot will have a certain payload capacity for carrying books. The QR code and Barcode scanning will be enabled by a Pi Camera, OpenCV and Raspberry Pi, thus making the exchange of books safe and secure. The odometry maneuvers of the bot will be controlled manually via a Blynk App. This paper focuses on how human intervention can be reduced and automates the issue part of library management system with the help of a bot.
summary: In order to ease the process of library management many technologies have been adopted but most of them focus on inventory management. There has hardly been any progress of automation in the field of issuing and returning books to the library on time. In colleges and schools, hostellers often forget to timely return the issued books back to the library. To solve the above issue and to ensure timely submission of the issued books, this work develops a Book-Bot which solves these complexities. The bot can commute from point A to point B, scan and verify QR Codes and Barcodes. The bot will have a certain payload capacity for carrying books. The QR code and Barcode scanning will be enabled by a Pi Camera, OpenCV and Raspberry Pi, thus making the exchange of books safe and secure. The odometry maneuvers of the bot will be controlled manually via a Blynk App. This paper focuses on how human intervention can be reduced and automates the issue part of library management system with the help of a bot.
abstract_zh: 为了简化图书馆管理过程，已经采用了许多技术，但大多数技术都集中在库存管理上。在按时向图书馆发放和归还图书方面，自动化方面几乎没有任何进展。在高校中，寄宿者常常忘记及时将已发放的图书归还给图书馆。为了解决上述问题并确保及时提交已发行的图书，本工作开发了一个 Book-Bot 来解决这些复杂性。该机器人可以从 A 点通勤到 B 点，扫描并验证二维码和条形码。该机器人将具有一定的负载能力来搬运书籍。二维码和条形码扫描将由 Pi 相机、OpenCV 和 Raspberry Pi 启用，从而使图书交换安全可靠。机器人的里程计操作将通过 Blynk 应用程序手动控制。本文重点讨论如何在机器人的帮助下减少人为干预并自动化图书馆管理系统的问题部分。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于物联网的图书机器人（Book-Bot），用于自动化图书馆的图书借还流程。
AI.motivation: 现有图书馆管理系统多聚焦于库存管理，缺乏对图书按时归还的自动化处理，导致学生常因遗忘而逾期。
AI.method: 采用树莓派、Pi Camera和OpenCV实现二维码/条形码扫描验证，通过Blynk App手动控制机器人移动，并设置载重能力运输图书。
AI.result: 成功开发出可自主移动、扫描验证并运输图书的机器人，减少了人工干预，提升了图书归还的及时性与安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人有效解决了图书馆图书借还自动化难题，为校园图书馆管理提供了高效可行的解决方案。

The odometry maneuvers of the bot will be controlled manually via a Blynk App. This paper focuses on how human intervention can be reduced and automates the issue part of library management system with the help of a bot. 为了简化图书馆管理过程，已经采用了许多技术，但大多数技术都集中在库存管理上。在按时向图书馆发放和归还图书方面，自动化方面几乎没有任何进展。在高校中，寄宿者常常忘记及时将已发放的图书归还给图书馆。为了解决上述问题并确保及时提交已发行的图书，本工作开发了一个 Book-Bot 来解决这些复杂性。该机器人可以从 A 点通勤到 B 点，扫描并验证二维码和条形码。该机器人将具有一定的负载能力来搬运书籍。二维码和条形码扫描将由 Pi 相机、OpenCV 和 Raspberry Pi 启用，从而使图书交换安全可靠。机器人的里程计操作将通过 Blynk 应用程序手动控制。本文重点讨论如何在机器人的帮助下减少人为干预并自动化图书馆管理系统的问题部分。 本文设计了一种基于物联网的图书机器人（Book-Bot），用于自动化图书馆的图书借还流程。 Souvik Datta,Mangolik Kundu,Ratnadeep Das Choudhury,Sriramalakshmi P,Sreedevi VT cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Yuxiang Zhang,Wei Li,Weidong Sun,Ran Tao,Qian Du
title: Single-source Domain Expansion Network for Cross-Scene Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 用于跨场景高光谱图像分类的单源域扩展网络
abstract: Currently, cross-scene hyperspectral image (HSI) classification has drawn increasing attention. It is necessary to train a model only on source domain (SD) and directly transferring the model to target domain (TD), when TD needs to be processed in real time and cannot be reused for training. Based on the idea of domain generalization, a Single-source Domain Expansion Network (SDEnet) is developed to ensure the reliability and effectiveness of domain extension. The method uses generative adversarial learning to train in SD and test in TD. A generator including semantic encoder and morph encoder is designed to generate the extended domain (ED) based on encoder-randomization-decoder architecture, where spatial and spectral randomization are specifically used to generate variable spatial and spectral information, and the morphological knowledge is implicitly applied as domain invariant information during domain expansion. Furthermore, the supervised contrastive learning is employed in the discriminator to learn class-wise domain invariant representation, which drives intra-class samples of SD and ED. Meanwhile, adversarial training is designed to optimize the generator to drive intra-class samples of SD and ED to be separated. Extensive experiments on two public HSI datasets and one additional multispectral image (MSI) dataset demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method when compared with state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Currently, cross-scene hyperspectral image (HSI) classification has drawn increasing attention. It is necessary to train a model only on source domain (SD) and directly transferring the model to target domain (TD), when TD needs to be processed in real time and cannot be reused for training. Based on the idea of domain generalization, a Single-source Domain Expansion Network (SDEnet) is developed to ensure the reliability and effectiveness of domain extension. The method uses generative adversarial learning to train in SD and test in TD. A generator including semantic encoder and morph encoder is designed to generate the extended domain (ED) based on encoder-randomization-decoder architecture, where spatial and spectral randomization are specifically used to generate variable spatial and spectral information, and the morphological knowledge is implicitly applied as domain invariant information during domain expansion. Furthermore, the supervised contrastive learning is employed in the discriminator to learn class-wise domain invariant representation, which drives intra-class samples of SD and ED. Meanwhile, adversarial training is designed to optimize the generator to drive intra-class samples of SD and ED to be separated. Extensive experiments on two public HSI datasets and one additional multispectral image (MSI) dataset demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method when compared with state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 目前，跨场景高光谱图像（HSI）分类越来越受到关注。当TD需要实时处理且无法重复用于训练时，需要仅在源域（SD）上训练模型，然后将模型直接转移到目标域（TD）。基于域泛化的思想，开发了单源域扩展网络（SDEnet）来保证域扩展的可靠性和有效性。该方法使用生成对抗性学习在 SD 中进行训练并在 TD 中进行测试。包括语义编码器和形态编码器的生成器被设计用于生成基于编码器-随机化-解码器架构的扩展域（ED），其中空间和谱随机化专门用于生成可变空间和谱信息，并且形态学知识在域扩展期间隐式应用为域不变信息。此外，判别器中采用监督对比学习来学习类域不变表示，从而驱动 SD 和 ED 的类内样本。同时，设计了对抗性训练来优化生成器，以驱动SD和ED的类内样本分离。对两个公共 HSI 数据集和一个额外的多光谱图像 (MSI) 数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出的方法与最先进的技术相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出单源域扩展网络（SDEnet），解决跨场景高光谱图像分类中目标域无法参与训练的问题。
AI.motivation: 当目标域需实时处理且不可用于训练时，传统方法难以有效迁移模型，需开发可靠领域扩展技术。
AI.method: 基于生成对抗网络设计SDEnet，包含语义编码器与形态编码器，通过空间/光谱随机化生成扩展域，并利用监督对比学习使判别器学习领域不变特征，对抗训练优化生成器。
AI.result: 在两个公开高光谱数据集和一个多光谱数据集上实验，证明该方法优于现有最先进技术。
AI.conclusion: SDEnet通过生成对抗与对比学习机制，有效提升跨场景高光谱图像分类性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Tiarna Lee,Esther Puyol-Anton,Bram Ruijsink,Miaojing Shi,Andrew P. King
title: A systematic study of race and sex bias in CNN-based cardiac MR segmentation
title_zh: 基于 CNN 的心脏 MR 分割中种族和性别偏见的系统研究
abstract: In computer vision there has been significant research interest in assessing potential demographic bias in deep learning models. One of the main causes of such bias is imbalance in the training data. In medical imaging, where the potential impact of bias is arguably much greater, there has been less interest. In medical imaging pipelines, segmentation of structures of interest plays an important role in estimating clinical biomarkers that are subsequently used to inform patient management. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are starting to be used to automate this process. We present the first systematic study of the impact of training set imbalance on race and sex bias in CNN-based segmentation. We focus on segmentation of the structures of the heart from short axis cine cardiac magnetic resonance images, and train multiple CNN segmentation models with different levels of race/sex imbalance. We find no significant bias in the sex experiment but significant bias in two separate race experiments, highlighting the need to consider adequate representation of different demographic groups in health datasets.
summary: In computer vision there has been significant research interest in assessing potential demographic bias in deep learning models. One of the main causes of such bias is imbalance in the training data. In medical imaging, where the potential impact of bias is arguably much greater, there has been less interest. In medical imaging pipelines, segmentation of structures of interest plays an important role in estimating clinical biomarkers that are subsequently used to inform patient management. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are starting to be used to automate this process. We present the first systematic study of the impact of training set imbalance on race and sex bias in CNN-based segmentation. We focus on segmentation of the structures of the heart from short axis cine cardiac magnetic resonance images, and train multiple CNN segmentation models with different levels of race/sex imbalance. We find no significant bias in the sex experiment but significant bias in two separate race experiments, highlighting the need to consider adequate representation of different demographic groups in health datasets.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉领域，人们对评估深度学习模型中潜在的人口统计偏差产生了浓厚的研究兴趣。造成这种偏差的主要原因之一是训练数据的不平衡。在医学成像领域，偏见的潜在影响可以说要大得多，但人们的兴趣却较少。在医学成像流程中，感兴趣结构的分割在估计临床生物标志物方面发挥着重要作用，这些生物标志物随后用于为患者管理提供信息。卷积神经网络（CNN）开始用于自动化这一过程。我们首次系统地研究了基于 CNN 的分割中训练集不平衡对种族和性别偏见的影响。我们专注于从短轴电影心脏磁共振图像中分割心脏结构，并训练具有不同种族/性别不平衡程度的多个 CNN 分割模型。我们发现性别实验中没有显着偏差，但两个单独的种族实验中存在显着偏差，这凸显了需要考虑健康数据集中不同人口群体的充分代表性。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的心脏磁共振成像分割中种族和性别偏差的影响。
AI.motivation: 医学影像中的偏差可能对患者管理产生重大影响，但现有研究对这一问题的关注较少，需确保数据集的代表性。
AI.method: 通过构建不同种族/性别不平衡程度的训练数据集，训练多个CNN分割模型，分析其在心脏短轴 cine MRI分割中的偏差。
AI.result: 性别实验未发现显著偏差，但两个独立的种族实验均出现显著偏差。
AI.conclusion: 医疗数据集需包含充分的种族群体代表性，以减少分割模型的偏差风险。

authors_text: Maya Krakovski,Oded Zafrani,Galit Nimrod,Yael Edan
title: Older adults acceptance of SARs: The link between anticipated and actual interaction
title_zh: 老年人对 SAR 的接受度：预期互动与实际互动之间的联系
comment: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
comments: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
abstract: This study demonstrates how anticipated and actual interactions shape the QE of SARs among older adults. The study consisted of two parts: an online survey to explore the anticipated interaction through video viewing of a SAR and an acceptance study where older adults interacted with the robot. Both parts of this study were completed with the assistance of Gymmy, a robotic system that our lab developed for training older adults in physical and cognitive activities. Both study parts exhibited similar user responses, indicating that users acceptance of SARs can be predicted by their anticipated interaction. Index Terms: Aging, human-robot interaction, older adults, quality evaluation, socially assistive robots, technology acceptance, technophobia, trust, user experience.
summary: This study demonstrates how anticipated and actual interactions shape the QE of SARs among older adults. The study consisted of two parts: an online survey to explore the anticipated interaction through video viewing of a SAR and an acceptance study where older adults interacted with the robot. Both parts of this study were completed with the assistance of Gymmy, a robotic system that our lab developed for training older adults in physical and cognitive activities. Both study parts exhibited similar user responses, indicating that users acceptance of SARs can be predicted by their anticipated interaction. Index Terms: Aging, human-robot interaction, older adults, quality evaluation, socially assistive robots, technology acceptance, technophobia, trust, user experience.
abstract_zh: 这项研究展示了预期和实际的相互作用如何影响老年人的 SAR 量化宽松。该研究由两部分组成：一项在线调查，通过观看 SAR 视频来探索预期的互动；以及一项老年人与机器人互动的接受研究。这项研究的两个部分都是在 Gymmy 的帮助下完成的，Gymmy 是我们实验室开发的一个机器人系统，用于训练老年人的身体和认知活动。两个研究部分都表现出相似的用户反应，表明用户对 SAR 的接受程度可以通过他们预期的交互来预测。索引术语：老龄化、人机交互、老年人、质量评估、社交辅助机器人、技术接受度、技术恐惧症、信任、用户体验。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究老年人对社会辅助机器人（SARs）的接受度，探讨预期互动与实际互动之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 随着社会老龄化加剧，理解老年人对社会辅助机器人（SARs）的接受机制对于推动其在医疗和日常支持中的应用至关重要。
AI.method: 研究分为两部分：第一部分通过在线调查让参与者观看SAR视频以评估预期互动；第二部分则通过Gymmy机器人系统进行实际互动实验，观察老年人的实际反应。
AI.result: 两部分研究结果相似，表明用户的预期互动可有效预测其对SARs的实际接受度。
AI.conclusion: 预期互动是预测老年人接受SARs的关键因素，为未来设计和优化机器人交互体验提供了理论依据。
