search_text: Older adults acceptance of SARs: The link between anticipated and actual interaction 老年人对 SAR 的接受度：预期互动与实际互动之间的联系 This study demonstrates how anticipated and actual interactions shape the QE of SARs among older adults. The study consisted of two parts: an online survey to explore the anticipated interaction through video viewing of a SAR and an acceptance study where older adults interacted with the robot. Both parts of this study were completed with the assistance of Gymmy, a robotic system that our lab developed for training older adults in physical and cognitive activities. Both study parts exhibited similar user responses, indicating that users acceptance of SARs can be predicted by their anticipated interaction. Index Terms: Aging, human-robot interaction, older adults, quality evaluation, socially assistive robots, technology acceptance, technophobia, trust, user experience. 这项研究展示了预期和实际的相互作用如何影响老年人的 SAR 量化宽松。该研究由两部分组成：一项在线调查，通过观看 SAR 视频来探索预期的互动；以及一项老年人与机器人互动的接受研究。这项研究的两个部分都是在 Gymmy 的帮助下完成的，Gymmy 是我们实验室开发的一个机器人系统，用于训练老年人的身体和认知活动。两个研究部分都表现出相似的用户反应，表明用户对 SAR 的接受程度可以通过他们预期的交互来预测。索引术语：老龄化、人机交互、老年人、质量评估、社交辅助机器人、技术接受度、技术恐惧症、信任、用户体验。 该论文研究老年人对社会辅助机器人（SARs）的接受度，探讨预期互动与实际互动之间的联系。 Maya Krakovski,Oded Zafrani,Galit Nimrod,Yael Edan cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Barış Can Esmer,Ariel Kulik,Dániel Marx,Philipp Schepper,Karol Węgrzycki
title: Computing Generalized Convolutions Faster Than Brute Force
title_zh: 计算广义卷积比蛮力更快
comment: We improved constant c, 29 pages, 5 colored figures
comments: We improved constant c, 29 pages, 5 colored figures
abstract: In this paper, we consider a general notion of convolution. Let $D$ be a finite domain and let $D^n$ be the set of $n$-length vectors (tuples) of $D$. Let $f : D \times D \to D$ be a function and let $\oplus_f$ be a coordinate-wise application of $f$. The $f$-Convolution of two functions $g,h : D^n \to \{-M,\ldots,M\}$ is $$(g \otimes_f h)(\textbf{v}) := \sum_{\substack{\textbf{v}_g,\textbf{v}_h \in D^n\\ \text{s.t. } \textbf{v}_g \oplus_f \textbf{v}_h}} g(\textbf{v}_g) \cdot h(\textbf{v}_h)$$ for every $\textbf{v} \in D^n$. This problem generalizes many fundamental convolutions such as Subset Convolution, XOR Product, Covering Product or Packing Product, etc. For arbitrary function $f$ and domain $D$ we can compute $f$-Convolution via brute-force enumeration in $\widetilde{O}(|D|^{2n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ time. Our main result is an improvement over this naive algorithm. We show that $f$-Convolution can be computed exactly in $\widetilde{O}((c \cdot |D|^2)^{n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ for constant $c := 3/4$ when $D$ has even cardinality. Our main observation is that a \emph{cyclic partition} of a function $f : D \times D \to D$ can be used to speed up the computation of $f$-Convolution, and we show that an appropriate cyclic partition exists for every $f$. Furthermore, we demonstrate that a single entry of the $f$-Convolution can be computed more efficiently. In this variant, we are given two functions $g,h : D^n \to \{-M,\ldots,M\}$ alongside with a vector $\textbf{v} \in D^n$ and the task of the $f$-Query problem is to compute integer $(g \otimes_f h)(\textbf{v})$. This is a generalization of the well-known Orthogonal Vectors problem. We show that $f$-Query can be computed in $\widetilde{O}(|D|^{\fracω{2} n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ time, where $ω\in [2,2.372)$ is the exponent of currently fastest matrix multiplication algorithm.

Let $f : D \times D \to D$ be a function and let $\oplus_f$ be a coordinate-wise application of $f$. This problem generalizes many fundamental convolutions such as Subset Convolution, XOR Product, Covering Product or Packing Product, etc. For arbitrary function $f$ and domain $D$ we can compute $f$-Convolution via brute-force enumeration in $\widetilde{O}(|D|^{2n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ time. Our main result is an improvement over this naive algorithm. We show that $f$-Convolution can be computed exactly in $\widetilde{O}((c \cdot |D|^2)^{n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ for constant $c := 3/4$ when $D$ has even cardinality. Our main observation is that a \emph{cyclic partition} of a function $f : D \times D \to D$ can be used to speed up the computation of $f$-Convolution, and we show that an appropriate cyclic partition exists for every $f$. Furthermore, we demonstrate that a single entry of the $f$-Convolution can be computed more efficiently. In this variant, we are given two functions $g,h : D^n \to \{-M,\ldots,M\}$ alongside with a vector $\textbf{v} \in D^n$ and the task of the $f$-Query problem is to compute integer $(g \otimes_f h)(\textbf{v})$. This is a generalization of the well-known Orthogonal Vectors problem. abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑卷积的一般概念。令$D$ 为有限域，$D^n$ 为$D$ 的$n$ 长度向量（元组）的集合。令 $f : D \times D \to D$ 为函数，并令 $\oplus_f$ 为 $f$ 的坐标应用。两个函数 $g,h 的 $f$-卷积：D^n \to \{-M,\ldots,M\}$ 为 $$(g \otimes_f h)(\textbf{v}) := \sum_{\substack{\textbf{v}_g,\textbf{v}_h \in D^n\\ \text{s.t. } \textbf{v}_g \oplus_f \textbf{v}_h}} g(\textbf{v}_g) \cdot h(\textbf{v}_h)$$ 对于 D^n$ 中的每个 $\textbf{v} \。这个问题概括了许多基本的卷积，例如子集卷积、异或积、覆盖积或打包积等。对于任意函数 $f$ 和域 $D$，我们可以通过暴力枚举在 $\widetilde{O}(|D|^{2n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ 时间内计算 $f$-卷积。我们的主要结果是对这种简单算法的改进。我们证明，当 $D$ 具有偶数基数时，对于常量 $c := 3/4$，$f$-卷积可以在 $\widetilde{O}((c \cdot |D|^2)^{n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ 中精确计算。我们的主要观察是函数$f : D \times D \to D$ 的\emph{循环分区}可以用来加速$f$-卷积的计算，并且我们表明每个$f$ 都存在适当的循环分区。此外，我们证明了 $f$-卷积的单个条目可以更有效地计算。在此变体中，我们得到两个函数 $g,h ： D^n \to \{-M,\ldots,M\}$ 以及 D^n$ 中的向量 $\textbf{v} \，$f$-Query 问题的任务是计算整数 $(g \otimes_f h)(\textbf{v})$。这是众所周知的正交向量问题的推广。我们证明 $f$-Query 可以在 $\widetilde{O}(|D|^{\fracω{2} n}\mathrm{polylog}(M))$ 时间内计算，其中 $ω\in [2,2.372)$ 是当前最快矩阵乘法算法的指数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种广义卷积（f-卷积）的计算问题，涵盖子集卷积、XOR乘积、覆盖乘积和打包乘积等多种经典卷积。
AI.motivation: 传统的暴力枚举算法计算f-卷积的时间复杂度为Õ(|D|^{2n})，在大规模数据下效率低下，因此需要更快的算法。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于循环划分（cyclic partition）的技术，利用函数f: D×D→D的循环划分来加速f-卷积的计算；对于f-查询问题，则利用矩阵乘法的快速算法进行优化。
AI.result: 当|D|为偶数时，f-卷积可在Õ((c·|D|^2)^n)时间内计算，其中c=3/4；f-查询问题可在Õ(|D|^{(ω/2)n})时间内计算，ω∈[2,2.372)为矩阵乘法指数。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法显著优于暴力枚举，是首个在任意函数f和有限域D上实现加速的通用方法。

authors_text: Maya Krakovski,Naama Aharony,Yael Edan
title: Robotic Exercise Trainer: How Failures and T-HRI Levels Affect User Acceptance and Trust
title_zh: 机器人运动训练器：故障和 T-HRI 水平如何影响用户接受度和信任
comment: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
comments: in SCRITA Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2208.11090) held in conjunction with 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication, 29/08 - 02/09 2022, Naples (Italy)
abstract: Physical activity is important for health and wellbeing, but only few fulfill the World Health Organization's criteria for physical activity. The development of a robotic exercise trainer can assist in increasing training accessibility and motivation. The acceptance and trust of users are crucial for the successful implementation of such an assistive robot. This can be affected by the transparency of the robotic system and the robot's performance, specifically, its failures. The study presents an initial investigation into the transparency levels as related to the task, human, robot, and interaction (T-HRI), with robot behavior adjusted accordingly. A failure in robot performance during part of the experiments allowed to analyze the effect of the T-HRI levels as related to failures. Participants who experienced failure in the robot's performance demonstrated a lower level of acceptance and trust than those who did not experience this failure. In addition, there were differences in acceptance measures between T-HRI levels and participant groups, suggesting several directions for future research.
summary: Physical activity is important for health and wellbeing, but only few fulfill the World Health Organization's criteria for physical activity. The development of a robotic exercise trainer can assist in increasing training accessibility and motivation. The acceptance and trust of users are crucial for the successful implementation of such an assistive robot. This can be affected by the transparency of the robotic system and the robot's performance, specifically, its failures. The study presents an initial investigation into the transparency levels as related to the task, human, robot, and interaction (T-HRI), with robot behavior adjusted accordingly. A failure in robot performance during part of the experiments allowed to analyze the effect of the T-HRI levels as related to failures. Participants who experienced failure in the robot's performance demonstrated a lower level of acceptance and trust than those who did not experience this failure. In addition, there were differences in acceptance measures between T-HRI levels and participant groups, suggesting several directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 身体活动对于健康和福祉很重要，但只有少数能够满足世界卫生组织的身体活动标准。机器人运动训练器的开发可以帮助提高训练的可及性和动力。用户的接受和信任对于辅助机器人的成功实施至关重要。这可能会受到机器人系统的透明度和机器人性能（特别是其故障）的影响。该研究对与任务、人类、机器人和交互（T-HRI）相关的透明度水平进行了初步调查，并相应调整了机器人的行为。部分实验期间机器人性能出现故障，因此可以分析与故障相关的 T-HRI 水平的影响。经历过机器人性能失败的参与者比没有经历过这种失败的参与者表现出较低的接受度和信任度。此外，T-HRI 水平和参与者群体之间的接受度测量存在差异，这表明了未来研究的几个方向。

AI.tldr: 研究机器人故障及T-HRI透明度水平对用户接受度和信任的影响
AI.motivation: 解决体力活动不足问题，提升机器人健身教练的用户接受度和信任，以促进其应用
AI.method: 通过实验调整机器人行为并引入故障，分析不同T-HRI透明度水平对用户接受度和信任的影响
AI.result: 故障导致用户接受度和信任降低，不同T-HRI水平下接受度存在差异
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究如何优化T-HRI透明度和故障应对策略以提升用户接受度与信任

search_text: Robotic Exercise Trainer: How Failures and T-HRI Levels Affect User Acceptance and Trust 机器人运动训练器：故障和 T-HRI 水平如何影响用户接受度和信任 Physical activity is important for health and wellbeing, but only few fulfill the World Health Organization's criteria for physical activity. The development of a robotic exercise trainer can assist in increasing training accessibility and motivation. The acceptance and trust of users are crucial for the successful implementation of such an assistive robot. This can be affected by the transparency of the robotic system and the robot's performance, specifically, its failures. The study presents an initial investigation into the transparency levels as related to the task, human, robot, and interaction (T-HRI), with robot behavior adjusted accordingly. A failure in robot performance during part of the experiments allowed to analyze the effect of the T-HRI levels as related to failures. Participants who experienced failure in the robot's performance demonstrated a lower level of acceptance and trust than those who did not experience this failure. In addition, there were differences in acceptance measures between T-HRI levels and participant groups, suggesting several directions for future research. 身体活动对于健康和福祉很重要，但只有少数能够满足世界卫生组织的身体活动标准。机器人运动训练器的开发可以帮助提高训练的可及性和动力。用户的接受和信任对于辅助机器人的成功实施至关重要。这可能会受到机器人系统的透明度和机器人性能（特别是其故障）的影响。该研究对与任务、人类、机器人和交互（T-HRI）相关的透明度水平进行了初步调查，并相应调整了机器人的行为。部分实验期间机器人性能出现故障，因此可以分析与故障相关的 T-HRI 水平的影响。经历过机器人性能失败的参与者比没有经历过这种失败的参与者表现出较低的接受度和信任度。此外，T-HRI 水平和参与者群体之间的接受度测量存在差异，这表明了未来研究的几个方向。 研究机器人故障及T-HRI透明度水平对用户接受度和信任的影响 Maya Krakovski,Naama Aharony,Yael Edan cs.RO

authors_text: Giovanni Maria Biancofiore,Yashar Deldjoo,Tommaso Di Noia,Eugenio Di Sciascio,Fedelucio Narducci
title: Interactive Question Answering Systems: Literature Review
title_zh: 交互式问答系统：文献综述
comment: 37 pages, 2 Figures, 6 Tables, just accepted
comments: 37 pages, 2 Figures, 6 Tables, just accepted
abstract: Question answering systems are recognized as popular and frequently effective means of information seeking on the web. In such systems, information seekers can receive a concise response to their query by presenting their questions in natural language. Interactive question answering is a recently proposed and increasingly popular solution that resides at the intersection of question answering and dialogue systems. On the one hand, the user can ask questions in normal language and locate the actual response to her inquiry; on the other hand, the system can prolong the question-answering session into a dialogue if there are multiple probable replies, very few, or ambiguities in the initial request. By permitting the user to ask more questions, interactive question answering enables users to dynamically interact with the system and receive more precise results. This survey offers a detailed overview of the interactive question-answering methods that are prevalent in current literature. It begins by explaining the foundational principles of question-answering systems, hence defining new notations and taxonomies to combine all identified works inside a unified framework. The reviewed published work on interactive question-answering systems is then presented and examined in terms of its proposed methodology, evaluation approaches, and dataset/application domain. We also describe trends surrounding specific tasks and issues raised by the community, so shedding light on the future interests of scholars. Our work is further supported by a GitHub page with a synthesis of all the major topics covered in this literature study. https://sisinflab.github.io/interactive-question-answering-systems-survey/

abstract_zh: 问答系统被认为是在网络上查找信息的流行且通常有效的手段。在这样的系统中，信息寻求者可以通过以自然语言提出他们的问题来接收对其查询的简明答复。交互式问答是最近提出的一种日益流行的解决方案，它位于问答系统和对话系统的交叉点上。一方面，用户可以用正常语言提出问题并找到对其询问的实际答复；另一方面，如果初始请求中有多个可能的答复、很少或含糊不清，系统可以将问答会话延长为对话。通过允许用户提出更多问题，交互式问答使用户能够与系统动态交互并获得更精确的结果。这项调查详细概述了当前文献中流行的交互式问答方法。它首先解释问答系统的基本原理，从而定义新的符号和分类法，将所有已识别的作品组合到一个统一的框架内。然后，根据其提出的方法、评估方法和数据集/应用领域，介绍和审查已发表的交互式问答系统的已发表工作。我们还描述了围绕社区提出的具体任务和问题的趋势，从而揭示了学者未来的兴趣。我们的工作得到了 GitHub 页面的进一步支持，该页面综合了本文献研究中涵盖的所有主要主题。 https://sisinflab.github.io/interactive-question-answering-systems-survey/

AI.tldr: 本文对交互式问答系统的现有文献进行综述，梳理其核心方法、评估方式及应用领域。
AI.motivation: 交互式问答系统通过对话机制提升复杂问题的解答精度，但缺乏系统性研究框架和统一分类标准。
AI.method: 构建问答系统基础理论框架，定义新符号与分类法，分析主流方法、评估指标及数据集，总结任务趋势与技术挑战。
AI.result: 整理交互式问答系统的核心技术路线，归纳典型应用场景，提出未来研究方向并提供GitHub知识库资源。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为学者提供研究参考，明确技术瓶颈与发展方向，推动交互式问答系统在多领域深度应用。

authors_text: Yunhao Wang,Huixin Sun,Xiaodi Wang,Bin Zhang,Chao Li,Ying Xin,Baochang Zhang,Errui Ding,Shumin Han
title: MAFormer: A Transformer Network with Multi-scale Attention Fusion for Visual Recognition
title_zh: MAFormer：用于视觉识别的多尺度注意力融合的 Transformer 网络
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures
comments: 9 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Vision Transformer and its variants have demonstrated great potential in various computer vision tasks. But conventional vision transformers often focus on global dependency at a coarse level, which suffer from a learning challenge on global relationships and fine-grained representation at a token level. In this paper, we introduce Multi-scale Attention Fusion into transformer (MAFormer), which explores local aggregation and global feature extraction in a dual-stream framework for visual recognition. We develop a simple but effective module to explore the full potential of transformers for visual representation by learning fine-grained and coarse-grained features at a token level and dynamically fusing them. Our Multi-scale Attention Fusion (MAF) block consists of: i) a local window attention branch that learns short-range interactions within windows, aggregating fine-grained local features; ii) global feature extraction through a novel Global Learning with Down-sampling (GLD) operation to efficiently capture long-range context information within the whole image; iii) a fusion module that self-explores the integration of both features via attention. Our MAFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on common vision tasks. In particular, MAFormer-L achieves 85.9$\%$ Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing CSWin-B and LV-ViT-L by 1.7$\%$ and 0.6$\%$ respectively. On MSCOCO, MAFormer outperforms the prior art CSWin by 1.7$\%$ mAPs on object detection and 1.4$\%$ on instance segmentation with similar-sized parameters, demonstrating the potential to be a general backbone network.
summary: Vision Transformer and its variants have demonstrated great potential in various computer vision tasks. But conventional vision transformers often focus on global dependency at a coarse level, which suffer from a learning challenge on global relationships and fine-grained representation at a token level. In this paper, we introduce Multi-scale Attention Fusion into transformer (MAFormer), which explores local aggregation and global feature extraction in a dual-stream framework for visual recognition. We develop a simple but effective module to explore the full potential of transformers for visual representation by learning fine-grained and coarse-grained features at a token level and dynamically fusing them. Our Multi-scale Attention Fusion (MAF) block consists of: i) a local window attention branch that learns short-range interactions within windows, aggregating fine-grained local features; ii) global feature extraction through a novel Global Learning with Down-sampling (GLD) operation to efficiently capture long-range context information within the whole image; iii) a fusion module that self-explores the integration of both features via attention. Our MAFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on common vision tasks. In particular, MAFormer-L achieves 85.9$\%$ Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing CSWin-B and LV-ViT-L by 1.7$\%$ and 0.6$\%$ respectively. On MSCOCO, MAFormer outperforms the prior art CSWin by 1.7$\%$ mAPs on object detection and 1.4$\%$ on instance segmentation with similar-sized parameters, demonstrating the potential to be a general backbone network.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer 及其变体在各种计算机视觉任务中表现出了巨大的潜力。但传统的视觉变换器通常关注粗略层面的全局依赖性，这在全局关系和令牌级别的细粒度表示方面面临学习挑战。在本文中，我们将多尺度注意力融合引入到变压器（MAFormer）中，它探索了视觉识别双流框架中的局部聚合和全局特征提取。我们开发了一个简单但有效的模块，通过在令牌级别学习细粒度和粗粒度特征并动态融合它们来探索 Transformer 在视觉表示方面的全部潜力。我们的多尺度注意力融合（MAF）模块包括：i）本地窗口注意力分支，用于学习窗口内的短程交互，聚合细粒度的局部特征； ii) 通过新颖的全局下采样学习（GLD）操作进行全局特征提取，以有效捕获整个图像内的远程上下文信息； iii）一个融合模块，通过注意力自我探索两个特征的整合。我们的 MAFormer 在常见视觉任务上实现了最先进的性能。特别是，MAFormer-L 在 ImageNet 上实现了 85.9$\%$ Top-1 准确率，分别超过 CSWin-B 和 LV-ViT-L 1.7$\%$ 和 0.6$\%$。在 MSCOCO 上，MAFormer 在对象检测方面优于现有技术 CSWin 1.7$\%$ mAP，在具有相似大小参数的实例分割方面优于现有技术 CSWin 1.4$\%$，展示了成为通用骨干网络的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAFormer，一种通过多尺度注意力融合提升视觉识别任务性能的Transformer网络。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer在粗粒度全局依赖建模上表现优异，但难以同时捕捉细粒度局部特征与全局关系，限制了其在视觉识别中的表现。
AI.method: 设计多尺度注意力融合模块（MAF），包含局部窗口注意力分支（学习局部细粒度特征）、全局下采样学习模块（GLD，提取长距离上下文信息）以及动态融合模块（自适应整合局部与全局特征）。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，MAFormer-L达到85.9% Top-1准确率，优于CSWin-B和LV-ViT-L；在MSCOCO数据集上，目标检测和实例分割任务分别超越CSWin 1.7%和1.4% mAP。
AI.conclusion: MAFormer通过有效融合多尺度特征，在多个视觉任务中取得SOTA性能，证明其作为通用主干网络的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MAFormer，一种通过多尺度注意力融合提升视觉识别任务性能的Transformer网络。

ai_content.conclusion: MAFormer通过有效融合多尺度特征，在多个视觉任务中取得SOTA性能，证明其作为通用主干网络的潜力。

search_text: MAFormer: A Transformer Network with Multi-scale Attention Fusion for Visual Recognition MAFormer：用于视觉识别的多尺度注意力融合的 Transformer 网络 Vision Transformer and its variants have demonstrated great potential in various computer vision tasks. But conventional vision transformers often focus on global dependency at a coarse level, which suffer from a learning challenge on global relationships and fine-grained representation at a token level. In this paper, we introduce Multi-scale Attention Fusion into transformer (MAFormer), which explores local aggregation and global feature extraction in a dual-stream framework for visual recognition. We develop a simple but effective module to explore the full potential of transformers for visual representation by learning fine-grained and coarse-grained features at a token level and dynamically fusing them. Our Multi-scale Attention Fusion (MAF) block consists of: i) a local window attention branch that learns short-range interactions within windows, aggregating fine-grained local features; ii) global feature extraction through a novel Global Learning with Down-sampling (GLD) operation to efficiently capture long-range context information within the whole image; iii) a fusion module that self-explores the integration of both features via attention. Our MAFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on common vision tasks. In particular, MAFormer-L achieves 85.9$\%$ Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing CSWin-B and LV-ViT-L by 1.7$\%$ and 0.6$\%$ respectively. On MSCOCO, MAFormer outperforms the prior art CSWin by 1.7$\%$ mAPs on object detection and 1.4$\%$ on instance segmentation with similar-sized parameters, demonstrating the potential to be a general backbone network. Vision Transformer 及其变体在各种计算机视觉任务中表现出了巨大的潜力。但传统的视觉变换器通常关注粗略层面的全局依赖性，这在全局关系和令牌级别的细粒度表示方面面临学习挑战。在本文中，我们将多尺度注意力融合引入到变压器（MAFormer）中，它探索了视觉识别双流框架中的局部聚合和全局特征提取。我们开发了一个简单但有效的模块，通过在令牌级别学习细粒度和粗粒度特征并动态融合它们来探索 Transformer 在视觉表示方面的全部潜力。我们的多尺度注意力融合（MAF）模块包括：i）本地窗口注意力分支，用于学习窗口内的短程交互，聚合细粒度的局部特征； ii) 通过新颖的全局下采样学习（GLD）操作进行全局特征提取，以有效捕获整个图像内的远程上下文信息； iii）一个融合模块，通过注意力自我探索两个特征的整合。我们的 MAFormer 在常见视觉任务上实现了最先进的性能。特别是，MAFormer-L 在 ImageNet 上实现了 85.9$\%$ Top-1 准确率，分别超过 CSWin-B 和 LV-ViT-L 1.7$\%$ 和 0.6$\%$。在 MSCOCO 上，MAFormer 在对象检测方面优于现有技术 CSWin 1.7$\%$ mAP，在具有相似大小参数的实例分割方面优于现有技术 CSWin 1.4$\%$，展示了成为通用骨干网络的潜力。 本文提出MAFormer，一种通过多尺度注意力融合提升视觉识别任务性能的Transformer网络。 Yunhao Wang,Huixin Sun,Xiaodi Wang,Bin Zhang,Chao Li,Ying Xin,Baochang Zhang,Errui Ding,Shumin Han cs.CV

authors_text: Martin Biehl,Nathaniel Virgo
title: Interpreting systems as solving POMDPs: a step towards a formal understanding of agency
title_zh: 将系统解释为解决 POMDP：迈向正式理解代理的一步
comment: 17 pages, no figures, published in Proceedings of 3rd International Workshop on Active Inference 2022
comments: 17 pages, no figures, published in Proceedings of 3rd International Workshop on Active Inference 2022
abstract: Under what circumstances can a system be said to have beliefs and goals, and how do such agency-related features relate to its physical state? Recent work has proposed a notion of interpretation map, a function that maps the state of a system to a probability distribution representing its beliefs about an external world. Such a map is not completely arbitrary, as the beliefs it attributes to the system must evolve over time in a manner that is consistent with Bayes' theorem, and consequently the dynamics of a system constrain its possible interpretations. Here we build on this approach, proposing a notion of interpretation not just in terms of beliefs but in terms of goals and actions. To do this we make use of the existing theory of partially observable Markov processes (POMDPs): we say that a system can be interpreted as a solution to a POMDP if it not only admits an interpretation map describing its beliefs about the hidden state of a POMDP but also takes actions that are optimal according to its belief state. An agent is then a system together with an interpretation of this system as a POMDP solution. Although POMDPs are not the only possible formulation of what it means to have a goal, this nevertheless represents a step towards a more general formal definition of what it means for a system to be an agent.
summary: Under what circumstances can a system be said to have beliefs and goals, and how do such agency-related features relate to its physical state? Recent work has proposed a notion of interpretation map, a function that maps the state of a system to a probability distribution representing its beliefs about an external world. Such a map is not completely arbitrary, as the beliefs it attributes to the system must evolve over time in a manner that is consistent with Bayes' theorem, and consequently the dynamics of a system constrain its possible interpretations. Here we build on this approach, proposing a notion of interpretation not just in terms of beliefs but in terms of goals and actions. To do this we make use of the existing theory of partially observable Markov processes (POMDPs): we say that a system can be interpreted as a solution to a POMDP if it not only admits an interpretation map describing its beliefs about the hidden state of a POMDP but also takes actions that are optimal according to its belief state. An agent is then a system together with an interpretation of this system as a POMDP solution. Although POMDPs are not the only possible formulation of what it means to have a goal, this nevertheless represents a step towards a more general formal definition of what it means for a system to be an agent.
abstract_zh: 在什么情况下可以说一个系统有信念和目标，这些与代理相关的特征如何与其物理状态相关？最近的工作提出了解释图的概念，该函数将系统的状态映射到代表其对外部世界的信念的概率分布。这样的地图并不完全是任意的，因为它赋予系统的信念必须随着时间的推移以符合贝叶斯定理的方式演变，因此系统的动态限制了其可能的解释。在这里，我们以这种方法为基础，提出了一种不仅在信仰方面而且在目标和行动方面的解释概念。为此，我们利用现有的部分可观测马尔可夫过程 (POMDP) 理论：我们说，如果一个系统不仅承认描述其对 POMDP 隐藏状态的信念的解释图，而且还根据其信念状态采取最佳行动，则可以将其解释为 POMDP 的解决方案。那么代理就是一个系统，并且将该系统解释为 POMDP 解决方案。尽管 POMDP 并不是唯一可能表述“拥有目标”的含义，但这仍然代表着朝着对系统作为代理的含义进行更普遍的正式定义迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将系统解释为求解部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的方法，以形式化定义系统的代理性（agency）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已通过信念映射描述系统状态，但缺乏对目标和行动的统一解释框架，需进一步形式化代理性的定义。
AI.method: 基于POMDP理论，定义系统需同时具备信念映射（符合贝叶斯更新）和根据信念状态采取最优行动的特性，从而构建代理性解释框架。
AI.result: 提出将系统视为POMDP解的解释方法，明确代理性需满足信念动态与行动优化的双重条件。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为形式化定义代理性提供了基础，尽管POMDP非唯一目标表述方式，但为后续理论发展奠定了重要一步。

authors_text: Fábio Mendonça,Sheikh Shanawaz Mostafa,Fernando Morgado-Dias,Antonio G. Ravelo-García,Mário A. T. Figueiredo
title: ProBoost: a Boosting Method for Probabilistic Classifiers
title_zh: ProBoost：概率分类器的增强方法
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, supplementary material
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures, supplementary material
abstract: ProBoost, a new boosting algorithm for probabilistic classifiers, is proposed in this work. This algorithm uses the epistemic uncertainty of each training sample to determine the most challenging/uncertain ones; the relevance of these samples is then increased for the next weak learner, producing a sequence that progressively focuses on the samples found to have the highest uncertainty. In the end, the weak learners' outputs are combined into a weighted ensemble of classifiers. Three methods are proposed to manipulate the training set: undersampling, oversampling, and weighting the training samples according to the uncertainty estimated by the weak learners. Furthermore, two approaches are studied regarding the ensemble combination. The weak learner herein considered is a standard convolutional neural network, and the probabilistic models underlying the uncertainty estimation use either variational inference or Monte Carlo dropout. The experimental evaluation carried out on MNIST benchmark datasets shows that ProBoost yields a significant performance improvement. The results are further highlighted by assessing the relative achievable improvement, a metric proposed in this work, which shows that a model with only four weak learners leads to an improvement exceeding 12% in this metric (for either accuracy, sensitivity, or specificity), in comparison to the model learned without ProBoost.
summary: ProBoost, a new boosting algorithm for probabilistic classifiers, is proposed in this work. This algorithm uses the epistemic uncertainty of each training sample to determine the most challenging/uncertain ones; the relevance of these samples is then increased for the next weak learner, producing a sequence that progressively focuses on the samples found to have the highest uncertainty. In the end, the weak learners' outputs are combined into a weighted ensemble of classifiers. Three methods are proposed to manipulate the training set: undersampling, oversampling, and weighting the training samples according to the uncertainty estimated by the weak learners. Furthermore, two approaches are studied regarding the ensemble combination. The weak learner herein considered is a standard convolutional neural network, and the probabilistic models underlying the uncertainty estimation use either variational inference or Monte Carlo dropout. The experimental evaluation carried out on MNIST benchmark datasets shows that ProBoost yields a significant performance improvement. The results are further highlighted by assessing the relative achievable improvement, a metric proposed in this work, which shows that a model with only four weak learners leads to an improvement exceeding 12% in this metric (for either accuracy, sensitivity, or specificity), in comparison to the model learned without ProBoost.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 ProBoost，一种新的概率分类器增强算法。该算法利用每个训练样本的认知不确定性来确定最具挑战性/不确定性的样本；然后，为下一个弱学习者增加这些样本的相关性，产生一个逐渐关注具有最高不确定性的样本的序列。最后，弱学习器的输出被组合成分类器的加权集合。提出了三种方法来操纵训练集：欠采样、过采样以及根据弱学习器估计的不确定性对训练样本进行加权。此外，还研究了关于集成组合的两种方法。这里考虑的弱学习器是标准的卷积神经网络，不确定性估计的概率模型使用变分推理或蒙特卡洛丢失。在 MNIST 基准数据集上进行的实验评估表明，ProBoost 带来了显着的性能提升。通过评估相对可实现的改进（这项工作中提出的一个指标）进一步强调了结果，该指标表明，与没有使用 ProBoost 学习的模型相比，只有四个弱学习器的模型可以在该指标上实现超过 12% 的改进（无论是准确性、灵敏度还是特异性）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProBoost算法，通过利用训练样本的本体不确定性，提升概率分类器的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统提升方法未能有效利用样本不确定性信息，导致在困难样本上表现不足，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 提出三种训练集处理方式（欠采样、过采样、不确定性加权），结合变分推断或蒙特卡洛dropout估计不确定性，并采用两种集成组合策略。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上，使用四个弱学习器的ProBoost模型在准确率、灵敏度、特异性指标上均提升超12%。
AI.conclusion: ProBoost通过不确定性驱动的样本处理显著提升模型性能，提出的改进度量有效验证了其优势。

result: 在MNIST数据集上，使用四个弱学习器的ProBoost模型在准确率、灵敏度、特异性指标上均提升超12%。
conclusion: ProBoost通过不确定性驱动的样本处理显著提升模型性能，提出的改进度量有效验证了其优势。
search_text: ProBoost: a Boosting Method for Probabilistic Classifiers ProBoost：概率分类器的增强方法 ProBoost, a new boosting algorithm for probabilistic classifiers, is proposed in this work. This algorithm uses the epistemic uncertainty of each training sample to determine the most challenging/uncertain ones; the relevance of these samples is then increased for the next weak learner, producing a sequence that progressively focuses on the samples found to have the highest uncertainty. In the end, the weak learners' outputs are combined into a weighted ensemble of classifiers. Three methods are proposed to manipulate the training set: undersampling, oversampling, and weighting the training samples according to the uncertainty estimated by the weak learners. Furthermore, two approaches are studied regarding the ensemble combination. The weak learner herein considered is a standard convolutional neural network, and the probabilistic models underlying the uncertainty estimation use either variational inference or Monte Carlo dropout. The experimental evaluation carried out on MNIST benchmark datasets shows that ProBoost yields a significant performance improvement. The results are further highlighted by assessing the relative achievable improvement, a metric proposed in this work, which shows that a model with only four weak learners leads to an improvement exceeding 12% in this metric (for either accuracy, sensitivity, or specificity), in comparison to the model learned without ProBoost. 这项工作提出了 ProBoost，一种新的概率分类器增强算法。该算法利用每个训练样本的认知不确定性来确定最具挑战性/不确定性的样本；然后，为下一个弱学习者增加这些样本的相关性，产生一个逐渐关注具有最高不确定性的样本的序列。最后，弱学习器的输出被组合成分类器的加权集合。提出了三种方法来操纵训练集：欠采样、过采样以及根据弱学习器估计的不确定性对训练样本进行加权。此外，还研究了关于集成组合的两种方法。这里考虑的弱学习器是标准的卷积神经网络，不确定性估计的概率模型使用变分推理或蒙特卡洛丢失。在 MNIST 基准数据集上进行的实验评估表明，ProBoost 带来了显着的性能提升。通过评估相对可实现的改进（这项工作中提出的一个指标）进一步强调了结果，该指标表明，与没有使用 ProBoost 学习的模型相比，只有四个弱学习器的模型可以在该指标上实现超过 12% 的改进（无论是准确性、灵敏度还是特异性）。 本文提出ProBoost算法，通过利用训练样本的本体不确定性，提升概率分类器的性能。 Fábio Mendonça,Sheikh Shanawaz Mostafa,Fernando Morgado-Dias,Antonio G. Ravelo-García,Mário A. T. Figueiredo cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Chris Rohlfs
title: Generalization in Neural Networks: A Broad Survey
title_zh: 神经网络的泛化：广泛的调查
abstract: This paper reviews concepts, modeling approaches, and recent findings along a spectrum of different levels of abstraction of neural network models including generalization across (1) Samples, (2) Distributions, (3) Domains, (4) Tasks, (5) Modalities, and (6) Scopes. Strategies for (1) sample generalization from training to test data are discussed, with suggestive evidence presented that, at least for the ImageNet dataset, popular classification models show substantial overfitting. An empirical example and perspectives from statistics highlight how models' (2) distribution generalization can benefit from consideration of causal relationships and counterfactual scenarios. Transfer learning approaches and results for (3) domain generalization are summarized, as is the wealth of domain generalization benchmark datasets available. Recent breakthroughs surveyed in (4) task generalization include few-shot meta-learning approaches and the emergence of transformer-based foundation models such as those used for language processing. Studies performing (5) modality generalization are reviewed, including those that integrate image and text data and that apply a biologically-inspired network across olfactory, visual, and auditory modalities. Higher-level (6) scope generalization results are surveyed, including graph-based approaches to represent symbolic knowledge in networks and attribution strategies for improving networks' explainability. Additionally, concepts from neuroscience are discussed on the modular architecture of brains and the steps by which dopamine-driven conditioning leads to abstract thinking.
summary: This paper reviews concepts, modeling approaches, and recent findings along a spectrum of different levels of abstraction of neural network models including generalization across (1) Samples, (2) Distributions, (3) Domains, (4) Tasks, (5) Modalities, and (6) Scopes. Strategies for (1) sample generalization from training to test data are discussed, with suggestive evidence presented that, at least for the ImageNet dataset, popular classification models show substantial overfitting. An empirical example and perspectives from statistics highlight how models' (2) distribution generalization can benefit from consideration of causal relationships and counterfactual scenarios. Transfer learning approaches and results for (3) domain generalization are summarized, as is the wealth of domain generalization benchmark datasets available. Recent breakthroughs surveyed in (4) task generalization include few-shot meta-learning approaches and the emergence of transformer-based foundation models such as those used for language processing. Studies performing (5) modality generalization are reviewed, including those that integrate image and text data and that apply a biologically-inspired network across olfactory, visual, and auditory modalities. Higher-level (6) scope generalization results are surveyed, including graph-based approaches to represent symbolic knowledge in networks and attribution strategies for improving networks' explainability. Additionally, concepts from neuroscience are discussed on the modular architecture of brains and the steps by which dopamine-driven conditioning leads to abstract thinking.
abstract_zh: 本文回顾了神经网络模型不同抽象级别的概念、建模方法和最新发现，包括 (1) 样本、(2) 分布、(3) 领域、(4) 任务、(5) 模态和 (6) 范围的泛化。讨论了 (1) 从训练到测试数据的样本泛化策略，并提出了暗示性证据，表明至少对于 ImageNet 数据集，流行的分类模型表现出严重的过度拟合。实证示例和统计观点强调了模型 (2) 分布泛化如何从考虑因果关系和反事实场景中受益。总结了 (3) 领域泛化的迁移学习方法和结果，以及大量可用的领域泛化基准数据集。最近在（4）任务泛化方面取得的突破包括少样本元学习方法和基于变压器的基础模型（例如用于语言处理的模型）的出现。回顾了执行 (5) 模态泛化的研究，包括整合图像和文本数据以及跨嗅觉、视觉和听觉模态应用生物启发网络的研究。对更高级别 (6) 范围泛化结果进行了调查，包括基于图的方法来表示网络中的符号知识以及用于提高网络可解释性的归因策略。此外，还讨论了神经科学的概念，涉及大脑的模块化架构以及多巴胺驱动的调节导致抽象思维的步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了神经网络模型在不同抽象层次上的泛化能力，涵盖样本、分布、领域、任务、模态和范围六个维度。
AI.motivation: 探讨神经网络在不同场景下的泛化挑战，总结现有方法与研究成果，为未来研究提供方向。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与实证分析，系统梳理各层次泛化问题的建模方法及典型技术（如迁移学习、元学习等）。
AI.result: 发现主流模型在ImageNet存在过拟合，因果关系与对抗场景有助于分布泛化，Transformer等基础模型推动任务泛化，多模态与符号知识表示扩展了泛化边界。
AI.conclusion: 泛化能力需结合具体应用场景，未来需融合神经科学机制与跨领域方法以提升模型适应性。

authors_text: Evgeny Yudin,Pavel Karpyshev,Mikhail Kurenkov,Alena Savinykh,Andrei Potapov,Evgeny Kruzhkov,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: CloudVision: DNN-based Visual Localization of Autonomous Robots using Prebuilt LiDAR Point Cloud
title_zh: CloudVision：使用预构建 LiDAR 点云的基于 DNN 的自主机器人视觉定位
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, 1 table. This paper was accepted to the conference ETFA 2022 (is the 27th Annual Conference of the IEEE Industrial Electronics Society (IES))
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, 1 table. This paper was accepted to the conference ETFA 2022 (is the 27th Annual Conference of the IEEE Industrial Electronics Society (IES))
abstract: In this study, we propose a novel visual localization approach to accurately estimate six degrees of freedom (6-DoF) poses of the robot within the 3D LiDAR map based on visual data from an RGB camera. The 3D map is obtained utilizing an advanced LiDAR-based simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithm capable of collecting a precise sparse map. The features extracted from the camera images are compared with the points of the 3D map, and then the geometric optimization problem is being solved to achieve precise visual localization. Our approach allows employing a scout robot equipped with an expensive LiDAR only once - for mapping of the environment, and multiple operational robots with only RGB cameras onboard - for performing mission tasks, with the localization accuracy higher than common camera-based solutions. The proposed method was tested on the custom dataset collected in the Skolkovo Institute of Science and Technology (Skoltech). During the process of assessing the localization accuracy, we managed to achieve centimeter-level accuracy; the median translation error was as low as 1.3 cm. The precise positioning achieved with only cameras makes possible the usage of autonomous mobile robots to solve the most complex tasks that require high localization accuracy.
summary: In this study, we propose a novel visual localization approach to accurately estimate six degrees of freedom (6-DoF) poses of the robot within the 3D LiDAR map based on visual data from an RGB camera. The 3D map is obtained utilizing an advanced LiDAR-based simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithm capable of collecting a precise sparse map. The features extracted from the camera images are compared with the points of the 3D map, and then the geometric optimization problem is being solved to achieve precise visual localization. Our approach allows employing a scout robot equipped with an expensive LiDAR only once - for mapping of the environment, and multiple operational robots with only RGB cameras onboard - for performing mission tasks, with the localization accuracy higher than common camera-based solutions. The proposed method was tested on the custom dataset collected in the Skolkovo Institute of Science and Technology (Skoltech). During the process of assessing the localization accuracy, we managed to achieve centimeter-level accuracy; the median translation error was as low as 1.3 cm. The precise positioning achieved with only cameras makes possible the usage of autonomous mobile robots to solve the most complex tasks that require high localization accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉定位方法，可根据 RGB 相机的视觉数据准确估计 3D LiDAR 地图中机器人的六个自由度 (6-DoF) 姿态。 3D 地图是利用先进的基于 LiDAR 的同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 算法获得的，该算法能够收集精确的稀疏地图。从相机图像中提取的特征与3D地图上的点进行比较，然后解决几何优化问题以实现精确的视觉定位。我们的方法允许使用一次配备昂贵 LiDAR 的侦察机器人（用于绘制环境地图），以及仅配备 RGB 摄像头的多个操作机器人来执行任务任务，其定位精度高于常见的基于摄像头的解决方案。所提出的方法在斯科尔科沃科学技术研究所 (Skoltech) 收集的自定义数据集上进行了测试。在评估定位精度的过程中，我们达到了厘米级的精度；平均平移误差低至 1.3 厘米。仅通过摄像头实现的精确定位使得使用自主移动机器人来解决需要高定位精度的最复杂的任务成为可能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的视觉定位方法，利用预构建的LiDAR点云实现自主机器人在3D地图中的高精度6自由度定位。
AI.motivation: 传统基于相机的定位精度不足，而LiDAR成本高昂且难以大规模部署，需在保证精度的同时降低多机器人系统的硬件成本。
AI.method: 通过LiDAR SLAM构建稀疏3D地图，提取RGB相机图像特征并与地图点匹配，结合几何优化求解机器人位姿，仅需单次LiDAR建图即可支持多相机机器人定位。
AI.result: 在Skoltech自建数据集上实现厘米级定位精度，中位数平移误差低至1.3厘米，优于常规相机定位方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视觉与LiDAR融合实现低成本高精度定位，为复杂场景下自主机器人应用提供了可行解决方案。

The proposed method was tested on the custom dataset collected in the Skolkovo Institute of Science and Technology (Skoltech). During the process of assessing the localization accuracy, we managed to achieve centimeter-level accuracy; the median translation error was as low as 1.3 cm. The precise positioning achieved with only cameras makes possible the usage of autonomous mobile robots to solve the most complex tasks that require high localization accuracy. 在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉定位方法，可根据 RGB 相机的视觉数据准确估计 3D LiDAR 地图中机器人的六个自由度 (6-DoF) 姿态。 3D 地图是利用先进的基于 LiDAR 的同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 算法获得的，该算法能够收集精确的稀疏地图。从相机图像中提取的特征与3D地图上的点进行比较，然后解决几何优化问题以实现精确的视觉定位。我们的方法允许使用一次配备昂贵 LiDAR 的侦察机器人（用于绘制环境地图），以及仅配备 RGB 摄像头的多个操作机器人来执行任务任务，其定位精度高于常见的基于摄像头的解决方案。所提出的方法在斯科尔科沃科学技术研究所 (Skoltech) 收集的自定义数据集上进行了测试。在评估定位精度的过程中，我们达到了厘米级的精度；平均平移误差低至 1.3 厘米。仅通过摄像头实现的精确定位使得使用自主移动机器人来解决需要高定位精度的最复杂的任务成为可能。 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的视觉定位方法，利用预构建的LiDAR点云实现自主机器人在3D地图中的高精度6自由度定位。 Evgeny Yudin,Pavel Karpyshev,Mikhail Kurenkov,Alena Savinykh,Andrei Potapov,Evgeny Kruzhkov,Dzmitry Tsetserukou cs.RO

authors_text: Yu-Jen Chen,Wei-Hsiang Shen,Hao-Wei Chung,Ching-Hao Chiu,Da-Cheng Juan,Tsung-Ying Ho,Chi-Tung Cheng,Meng-Lin Li,Tsung-Yi Ho
title: Representative Image Feature Extraction via Contrastive Learning Pretraining for Chest X-ray Report Generation
title_zh: 通过对比学习预训练提取代表性图像特征以生成胸部 X 射线报告
abstract: Medical report generation is a challenging task since it is time-consuming and requires expertise from experienced radiologists. The goal of medical report generation is to accurately capture and describe the image findings. Previous works pretrain their visual encoding neural networks with large datasets in different domains, which cannot learn general visual representation in the specific medical domain. In this work, we propose a medical report generation framework that uses a contrastive learning approach to pretrain the visual encoder and requires no additional meta information. In addition, we adopt lung segmentation as an augmentation method in the contrastive learning framework. This segmentation guides the network to focus on encoding the visual feature within the lung region. Experimental results show that the proposed framework improves the performance and the quality of the generated medical reports both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Medical report generation is a challenging task since it is time-consuming and requires expertise from experienced radiologists. The goal of medical report generation is to accurately capture and describe the image findings. Previous works pretrain their visual encoding neural networks with large datasets in different domains, which cannot learn general visual representation in the specific medical domain. In this work, we propose a medical report generation framework that uses a contrastive learning approach to pretrain the visual encoder and requires no additional meta information. In addition, we adopt lung segmentation as an augmentation method in the contrastive learning framework. This segmentation guides the network to focus on encoding the visual feature within the lung region. Experimental results show that the proposed framework improves the performance and the quality of the generated medical reports both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 生成医疗报告是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它非常耗时并且需要经验丰富的放射科医生的专业知识。生成医疗报告的目标是准确捕获和描述图像结果。以前的工作使用不同领域的大型数据集来预训练视觉编码神经网络，这些数据集无法学习特定医学领域的一般视觉表示。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种医疗报告生成框架，该框架使用对比学习方法来预训练视觉编码器，并且不需要额外的元信息。此外，我们采用肺部分割作为对比学习框架中的增强方法。这种分割引导网络专注于对肺部区域内的视觉特征进行编码。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在数量和质量上都提高了生成的医疗报告的性能和质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习预训练的医学图像特征提取框架，用于生成高质量的胸部X光报告。
AI.motivation: 传统方法使用跨领域数据预训练模型，难以学习医疗领域的通用视觉表示，且需依赖额外元信息。
AI.method: 采用对比学习预训练视觉编码器，并引入肺部分割作为数据增强手段，引导模型关注肺区关键特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在生成报告的定量指标（如BLEU分数）和定性评估中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习结合医学领域特定增强方法能有效提升图像特征表示，从而改善医学报告生成质量。

authors_text: Yanna Lin,Haotian Li,Aoyu Wu,Yong Wang,Huamin Qu
title: DMiner: Dashboard Design Mining and Recommendation
title_zh: DMiner：仪表盘设计挖掘与推荐
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: Dashboards, which comprise multiple views on a single display, help analyze and communicate multiple perspectives of data simultaneously. However, creating effective and elegant dashboards is challenging since it requires careful and logical arrangement and coordination of multiple visualizations. To solve the problem, we propose a data-driven approach for mining design rules from dashboards and automating dashboard organization. Specifically, we focus on two prominent aspects of the organization: arrangement, which describes the position, size, and layout of each view in the display space; and coordination, which indicates the interaction between pairwise views. We build a new dataset containing 854 dashboards crawled online, and develop feature engineering methods for describing the single views and view-wise relationships in terms of data, encoding, layout, and interactions. Further, we identify design rules among those features and develop a recommender for dashboard design. We demonstrate the usefulness of DMiner through an expert study and a user study. The expert study shows that our extracted design rules are reasonable and conform to the design practice of experts. Moreover, a comparative user study shows that our recommender could help automate dashboard organization and reach human-level performance. In summary, our work offers a promising starting point for design mining visualizations to build recommenders.
summary: Dashboards, which comprise multiple views on a single display, help analyze and communicate multiple perspectives of data simultaneously. However, creating effective and elegant dashboards is challenging since it requires careful and logical arrangement and coordination of multiple visualizations. To solve the problem, we propose a data-driven approach for mining design rules from dashboards and automating dashboard organization. Specifically, we focus on two prominent aspects of the organization: arrangement, which describes the position, size, and layout of each view in the display space; and coordination, which indicates the interaction between pairwise views. We build a new dataset containing 854 dashboards crawled online, and develop feature engineering methods for describing the single views and view-wise relationships in terms of data, encoding, layout, and interactions. Further, we identify design rules among those features and develop a recommender for dashboard design. We demonstrate the usefulness of DMiner through an expert study and a user study. The expert study shows that our extracted design rules are reasonable and conform to the design practice of experts. Moreover, a comparative user study shows that our recommender could help automate dashboard organization and reach human-level performance. In summary, our work offers a promising starting point for design mining visualizations to build recommenders.
abstract_zh: 仪表板在单个显示屏上包含多个视图，有助于同时分析和传达多个角度的数据。然而，创建有效且优雅的仪表板具有挑战性，因为它需要仔细且逻辑地排列和协调多个可视化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种数据驱动的方法，用于从仪表板中挖掘设计规则并自动化仪表板组织。具体来说，我们关注组织的两个突出方面：排列，描述显示空间中每个视图的位置、大小和布局；和协调，表示成对视图之间的相互作用。我们构建了一个包含在线爬取的 854 个仪表板的新数据集，并开发了特征工程方法，用于在数据、编码、布局和交互方面描述单个视图和视图之间的关系。此外，我们确定这些功能中的设计规则，并开发仪表板设计的推荐器。我们通过专家研究和用户研究证明了 DMiner 的实用性。专家研究表明，我们提取的设计规则是合理的，符合专家的设计实践。此外，一项比较用户研究表明，我们的推荐器可以帮助自动化仪表板组织并达到人类水平的性能。总之，我们的工作为设计挖掘可视化来构建推荐系统提供了一个有希望的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMiner方法，通过挖掘仪表盘设计规则并推荐布局，解决多视图仪表盘创建的挑战。
AI.motivation: 仪表盘设计需协调多个可视化元素，手动布局复杂且耗时，需自动化方案提升效率与效果。
AI.method: 构建854个仪表盘数据集，通过特征工程提取视图属性及交互关系，挖掘设计规则并开发推荐系统。
AI.result: 专家验证设计规则符合实践，用户研究显示推荐系统可实现人类水平的自动化布局效果。
AI.conclusion: DMiner为可视化设计挖掘提供了可行框架，可有效辅助仪表盘设计推荐。

authors_text: Alejandro Murillo-Gonzalez,Jorge I. Poveda
title: Data-Assisted Vision-Based Hybrid Control for Robust Stabilization with Obstacle Avoidance via Learning of Perception Maps
title_zh: 基于数据辅助视觉的混合控制，通过感知图学习实现鲁棒稳定和避障
comment: ef:Presented at the 2022 American Control Conference, Atlanta, GA, USA, June 8 - 10
comments: ef:Presented at the 2022 American Control Conference, Atlanta, GA, USA, June 8 - 10
abstract: We study the problem of target stabilization with robust obstacle avoidance in robots and vehicles that have access only to vision-based sensors for the purpose of realtime localization. This problem is particularly challenging due to the topological obstructions induced by the obstacle, which preclude the existence of smooth feedback controllers able to achieve simultaneous stabilization and robust obstacle avoidance. To overcome this issue, we develop a vision-based hybrid controller that switches between two different feedback laws depending on the current position of the vehicle using a hysteresis mechanism and a data-assisted supervisor. The main innovation of the paper is the incorporation of suitable perception maps into the hybrid controller. These maps can be learned from data obtained from cameras in the vehicles and trained via convolutional neural networks (CNN). Under suitable assumptions on this perception map, we establish theoretical guarantees for the trajectories of the vehicle in terms of convergence and obstacle avoidance. Moreover, the proposed vision-based hybrid controller is numerically tested under different scenarios, including noisy data, sensors with failures, and cameras with occlusions.
summary: We study the problem of target stabilization with robust obstacle avoidance in robots and vehicles that have access only to vision-based sensors for the purpose of realtime localization. This problem is particularly challenging due to the topological obstructions induced by the obstacle, which preclude the existence of smooth feedback controllers able to achieve simultaneous stabilization and robust obstacle avoidance. To overcome this issue, we develop a vision-based hybrid controller that switches between two different feedback laws depending on the current position of the vehicle using a hysteresis mechanism and a data-assisted supervisor. The main innovation of the paper is the incorporation of suitable perception maps into the hybrid controller. These maps can be learned from data obtained from cameras in the vehicles and trained via convolutional neural networks (CNN). Under suitable assumptions on this perception map, we establish theoretical guarantees for the trajectories of the vehicle in terms of convergence and obstacle avoidance. Moreover, the proposed vision-based hybrid controller is numerically tested under different scenarios, including noisy data, sensors with failures, and cameras with occlusions.
abstract_zh: 我们研究机器人和车辆中具有强大避障功能的目标稳定问题，这些机器人和车辆只能使用基于视觉的传感器来实现实时定位。由于障碍物引起的拓扑障碍，这个问题特别具有挑战性，这排除了能够实现同时稳定和鲁棒避障的平滑反馈控制器的存在。为了克服这个问题，我们开发了一种基于视觉的混合控制器，该控制器使用迟滞机制和数据辅助监控器根据车辆的当前位置在两种不同的反馈定律之间切换。本文的主要创新是将合适的感知图纳入混合控制器。这些地图可以从车辆摄像头获得的数据中学习，并通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行训练。在该感知图的适当假设下，我们在收敛和避障方面为车辆的轨迹建立了理论保证。此外，所提出的基于视觉的混合控制器在不同场景下进行了数值测试，包括噪声数据、故障传感器和遮挡相机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的混合控制器，通过学习感知地图实现机器人和车辆在复杂环境中的鲁棒稳定与避障。
AI.motivation: 传统反馈控制器在存在拓扑障碍物时无法同时实现稳定与避障，而仅依赖视觉传感器的实时定位需求亟需新的控制方法。
AI.method: 设计具有滞回机制和数据辅助监督器的混合控制器，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）学习感知地图，并根据车辆位置切换两种反馈律。
AI.result: 在噪声数据、传感器故障和遮挡等场景下，控制器均能保证轨迹收敛性和避障性能，并通过理论分析验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合学习感知地图的混合控制策略，成功解决了视觉传感器环境下鲁棒稳定与避障的协同问题。

search_text: Data-Assisted Vision-Based Hybrid Control for Robust Stabilization with Obstacle Avoidance via Learning of Perception Maps 基于数据辅助视觉的混合控制，通过感知图学习实现鲁棒稳定和避障 We study the problem of target stabilization with robust obstacle avoidance in robots and vehicles that have access only to vision-based sensors for the purpose of realtime localization. This problem is particularly challenging due to the topological obstructions induced by the obstacle, which preclude the existence of smooth feedback controllers able to achieve simultaneous stabilization and robust obstacle avoidance. To overcome this issue, we develop a vision-based hybrid controller that switches between two different feedback laws depending on the current position of the vehicle using a hysteresis mechanism and a data-assisted supervisor. The main innovation of the paper is the incorporation of suitable perception maps into the hybrid controller. These maps can be learned from data obtained from cameras in the vehicles and trained via convolutional neural networks (CNN). Under suitable assumptions on this perception map, we establish theoretical guarantees for the trajectories of the vehicle in terms of convergence and obstacle avoidance. Moreover, the proposed vision-based hybrid controller is numerically tested under different scenarios, including noisy data, sensors with failures, and cameras with occlusions. 我们研究机器人和车辆中具有强大避障功能的目标稳定问题，这些机器人和车辆只能使用基于视觉的传感器来实现实时定位。由于障碍物引起的拓扑障碍，这个问题特别具有挑战性，这排除了能够实现同时稳定和鲁棒避障的平滑反馈控制器的存在。为了克服这个问题，我们开发了一种基于视觉的混合控制器，该控制器使用迟滞机制和数据辅助监控器根据车辆的当前位置在两种不同的反馈定律之间切换。本文的主要创新是将合适的感知图纳入混合控制器。这些地图可以从车辆摄像头获得的数据中学习，并通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行训练。在该感知图的适当假设下，我们在收敛和避障方面为车辆的轨迹建立了理论保证。此外，所提出的基于视觉的混合控制器在不同场景下进行了数值测试，包括噪声数据、故障传感器和遮挡相机。 本文提出了一种基于视觉的混合控制器，通过学习感知地图实现机器人和车辆在复杂环境中的鲁棒稳定与避障。 Alejandro Murillo-Gonzalez,Jorge I. Poveda cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Xinjiang Wang,Xingyi Yang,Shilong Zhang,Yijiang Li,Litong Feng,Shijie Fang,Chengqi Lyu,Kai Chen,Wayne Zhang
title: Consistent-Teacher: Towards Reducing Inconsistent Pseudo-targets in Semi-supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 一致性教师：减少半监督目标检测中不一致的伪目标
comment: CVPR2023 (Highlight), Camera Ready Version, Project Page: \url{https://adamdad.github.io/consistentteacher/}
comments: CVPR2023 (Highlight), Camera Ready Version, Project Page: \url{https://adamdad.github.io/consistentteacher/}
abstract: In this study, we dive deep into the inconsistency of pseudo targets in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). Our core observation is that the oscillating pseudo-targets undermine the training of an accurate detector. It injects noise into the student's training, leading to severe overfitting problems. Therefore, we propose a systematic solution, termed ConsistentTeacher, to reduce the inconsistency. First, adaptive anchor assignment~(ASA) substitutes the static IoU-based strategy, which enables the student network to be resistant to noisy pseudo-bounding boxes. Then we calibrate the subtask predictions by designing a 3D feature alignment module~(FAM-3D). It allows each classification feature to adaptively query the optimal feature vector for the regression task at arbitrary scales and locations. Lastly, a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) dynamically revises the score threshold of pseudo-bboxes, which stabilizes the number of ground truths at an early stage and remedies the unreliable supervision signal during training. ConsistentTeacher provides strong results on a large range of SSOD evaluations. It achieves 40.0 mAP with ResNet-50 backbone given only 10% of annotated MS-COCO data, which surpasses previous baselines using pseudo labels by around 3 mAP. When trained on fully annotated MS-COCO with additional unlabeled data, the performance further increases to 47.7 mAP. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Adamdad/ConsistentTeacher}.
summary: In this study, we dive deep into the inconsistency of pseudo targets in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). Our core observation is that the oscillating pseudo-targets undermine the training of an accurate detector. It injects noise into the student's training, leading to severe overfitting problems. Therefore, we propose a systematic solution, termed ConsistentTeacher, to reduce the inconsistency. First, adaptive anchor assignment~(ASA) substitutes the static IoU-based strategy, which enables the student network to be resistant to noisy pseudo-bounding boxes. Then we calibrate the subtask predictions by designing a 3D feature alignment module~(FAM-3D). It allows each classification feature to adaptively query the optimal feature vector for the regression task at arbitrary scales and locations. Lastly, a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) dynamically revises the score threshold of pseudo-bboxes, which stabilizes the number of ground truths at an early stage and remedies the unreliable supervision signal during training. ConsistentTeacher provides strong results on a large range of SSOD evaluations. It achieves 40.0 mAP with ResNet-50 backbone given only 10% of annotated MS-COCO data, which surpasses previous baselines using pseudo labels by around 3 mAP. When trained on fully annotated MS-COCO with additional unlabeled data, the performance further increases to 47.7 mAP. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Adamdad/ConsistentTeacher}.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们深入研究了半监督目标检测（SSOD）中伪目标的不一致问题。我们的核心观察是，振荡的伪目标破坏了准确探测器的训练。它给学生的训练注入了噪音，导致严重的过度拟合问题。因此，我们提出了一个系统性的解决方案，称为ConsistentTeacher，来减少不一致的情况。首先，自适应锚分配（ASA）替代了基于静态 IoU 的策略，使学生网络能够抵抗噪声伪边界框。然后我们通过设计 3D 特征对齐模块~（FAM-3D）来校准子任务预测。它允许每个分类特征自适应地查询任意尺度和位置的回归任务的最佳特征向量。最后，高斯混合模型（GMM）动态修正伪bbox的得分阈值，从而稳定了早期的地面事实数量，并纠正了训练过程中监督信号的不可靠。 ConcientTeacher 在大范围的 SSOD 评估中提供了强有力的结果。仅给出 10% 的带注释的 MS-COCO 数据，它就通过 ResNet-50 主干网实现了 40.0 mAP，这比之前使用伪标签的基线高出约 3 mAP。当使用额外的未标记数据在完全注释的 MS-COCO 上进行训练时，性能进一步提高到 47.7 mAP。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Adamdad/ConsistentTeacher} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ConsistentTeacher的系统性方法，旨在减少半监督目标检测中伪目标的不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 伪目标的不一致性会引入噪声并导致学生网络过拟合，影响检测精度。
AI.method: 通过自适应锚点分配（ASA）、3D特征对齐模块（FAM-3D）和高斯混合模型（GMM）动态调整伪边界框的置信度阈值，减少不一致伪目标的影响。
AI.result: 在仅使用10%标注数据的MS-COCO数据集上，ResNet-50主干网络达到40.0 mAP，优于现有基线约3 mAP；结合全标注数据时性能进一步提升至47.7 mAP。
AI.conclusion: ConsistentTeacher通过多模块协同优化，有效缓解了伪目标不一致性问题，显著提升了半监督目标检测性能。

search_text: Consistent-Teacher: Towards Reducing Inconsistent Pseudo-targets in Semi-supervised Object Detection 一致性教师：减少半监督目标检测中不一致的伪目标 In this study, we dive deep into the inconsistency of pseudo targets in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). Our core observation is that the oscillating pseudo-targets undermine the training of an accurate detector. It injects noise into the student's training, leading to severe overfitting problems. Therefore, we propose a systematic solution, termed ConsistentTeacher, to reduce the inconsistency. First, adaptive anchor assignment~(ASA) substitutes the static IoU-based strategy, which enables the student network to be resistant to noisy pseudo-bounding boxes. Then we calibrate the subtask predictions by designing a 3D feature alignment module~(FAM-3D). It allows each classification feature to adaptively query the optimal feature vector for the regression task at arbitrary scales and locations. Lastly, a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) dynamically revises the score threshold of pseudo-bboxes, which stabilizes the number of ground truths at an early stage and remedies the unreliable supervision signal during training. ConsistentTeacher provides strong results on a large range of SSOD evaluations. It achieves 40.0 mAP with ResNet-50 backbone given only 10% of annotated MS-COCO data, which surpasses previous baselines using pseudo labels by around 3 mAP. When trained on fully annotated MS-COCO with additional unlabeled data, the performance further increases to 47.7 mAP. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/Adamdad/ConsistentTeacher}. 在这项研究中，我们深入研究了半监督目标检测（SSOD）中伪目标的不一致问题。我们的核心观察是，振荡的伪目标破坏了准确探测器的训练。它给学生的训练注入了噪音，导致严重的过度拟合问题。因此，我们提出了一个系统性的解决方案，称为ConsistentTeacher，来减少不一致的情况。首先，自适应锚分配（ASA）替代了基于静态 IoU 的策略，使学生网络能够抵抗噪声伪边界框。然后我们通过设计 3D 特征对齐模块~（FAM-3D）来校准子任务预测。它允许每个分类特征自适应地查询任意尺度和位置的回归任务的最佳特征向量。最后，高斯混合模型（GMM）动态修正伪bbox的得分阈值，从而稳定了早期的地面事实数量，并纠正了训练过程中监督信号的不可靠。 ConcientTeacher 在大范围的 SSOD 评估中提供了强有力的结果。仅给出 10% 的带注释的 MS-COCO 数据，它就通过 ResNet-50 主干网实现了 40.0 mAP，这比之前使用伪标签的基线高出约 3 mAP。当使用额外的未标记数据在完全注释的 MS-COCO 上进行训练时，性能进一步提高到 47.7 mAP。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Adamdad/ConsistentTeacher} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为ConsistentTeacher的系统性方法，旨在减少半监督目标检测中伪目标的不一致性问题。 Xinjiang Wang,Xingyi Yang,Shilong Zhang,Yijiang Li,Litong Feng,Shijie Fang,Chengqi Lyu,Kai Chen,Wayne Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Maciej Skorski
title: Tight Chernoff-Like Bounds Under Limited Independence
title_zh: 有限独立性下的严格切尔诺夫式界限
comment: The full version of the RANDOM'22 conference paper
comments: The full version of the RANDOM'22 conference paper
abstract: This paper develops sharp bounds on moments of sums of k-wise independent bounded random variables, under constrained average variance. The result closes the problem addressed in part in the previous works of Schmidt et al. and Bellare, Rompel. We The work also discuss discusses other applications of independent interests, such as asymptotically sharp bounds on binomial moments.
summary: This paper develops sharp bounds on moments of sums of k-wise independent bounded random variables, under constrained average variance. The result closes the problem addressed in part in the previous works of Schmidt et al. and Bellare, Rompel. We The work also discuss discusses other applications of independent interests, such as asymptotically sharp bounds on binomial moments.
abstract_zh: 本文在平均方差约束下，对 k 向独立有界随机变量之和的矩提出了锐界。结果解决了 Schmidt 等人之前的工作中部分解决的问题。还有贝拉尔、隆佩尔。我们的工作还讨论了独立利益的其他应用，例如二项式矩的渐近锐界。

AI.tldr: 本文在有限独立性条件下，为k-wise独立的有界随机变量和的矩建立精确的切尔诺夫-like界，并解决之前未完成的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究（如Schmidt等人和Bellare、Rompel的工作）在有限独立性下对随机变量和的矩界存在局限性，需进一步完善理论以满足概率分析和算法设计的需求。
AI.method: 通过分析k-wise独立随机变量在约束平均方差下的矩特性，结合概率论中的生成函数与优化技术，推导出紧致的界。
AI.result: 建立了k-wise独立变量和的矩的严格界，解决了前人未完全解决的问题，并拓展至二项式矩的渐近界等应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了更精确的理论工具，完善了有限独立性下的概率分析框架，对算法分析与随机过程研究具有推动作用。

result: 建立了k-wise独立变量和的矩的严格界，解决了前人未完全解决的问题，并拓展至二项式矩的渐近界等应用。
conclusion: 本文提供了更精确的理论工具，完善了有限独立性下的概率分析框架，对算法分析与随机过程研究具有推动作用。
search_text: Tight Chernoff-Like Bounds Under Limited Independence 有限独立性下的严格切尔诺夫式界限 This paper develops sharp bounds on moments of sums of k-wise independent bounded random variables, under constrained average variance. The result closes the problem addressed in part in the previous works of Schmidt et al. and Bellare, Rompel. We The work also discuss discusses other applications of independent interests, such as asymptotically sharp bounds on binomial moments. 本文在平均方差约束下，对 k 向独立有界随机变量之和的矩提出了锐界。结果解决了 Schmidt 等人之前的工作中部分解决的问题。还有贝拉尔、隆佩尔。我们的工作还讨论了独立利益的其他应用，例如二项式矩的渐近锐界。 本文在有限独立性条件下，为k-wise独立的有界随机变量和的矩建立精确的切尔诺夫-like界，并解决之前未完成的问题。 Maciej Skorski math.PR,cs.DS,math.ST

authors_text: Seunghyun Lee,Babar Shahzaad,Balsam Alkouz,Abdallah Lakhdari,Athman Bouguettaya
title: Autonomous Delivery of Multiple Packages Using Single Drone in Urban Airspace
title_zh: 在城市空域使用单架无人机自主交付多个包裹
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures. This is an accepted demo paper and it is going to appear in the Proceedings of 2022 ACM International Joint Conference on Pervasive and Ubiquitous Computing (UbiComp22)
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures. This is an accepted demo paper and it is going to appear in the Proceedings of 2022 ACM International Joint Conference on Pervasive and Ubiquitous Computing (UbiComp22)
abstract: Current drone delivery solutions mainly focus on single package delivery using one drone. However, the recent developments in drone technology enable a drone to deliver multiple packages in a single trip. We use the nearest destination first strategy for the faster delivery of packages in a skyway network. This demonstration is a proof-of-concept prototype for the multi-package delivery in urban airspace following a skyway network. We deploy and test this multi-package drone delivery in an indoor testbed environment using a 3D model of Sydney CBD. Demo: https://youtu.be/YTwsIfUvWPc
summary: Current drone delivery solutions mainly focus on single package delivery using one drone. However, the recent developments in drone technology enable a drone to deliver multiple packages in a single trip. We use the nearest destination first strategy for the faster delivery of packages in a skyway network. This demonstration is a proof-of-concept prototype for the multi-package delivery in urban airspace following a skyway network. We deploy and test this multi-package drone delivery in an indoor testbed environment using a 3D model of Sydney CBD. Demo: https://youtu.be/YTwsIfUvWPc
abstract_zh: 目前的无人机递送解决方案主要集中于使用一架无人机的单个包裹递送。然而，无人机技术的最新发展使无人机能够在一次行程中运送多个包裹。我们采用最近目的地优先策略，以便在空中网络中更快地递送包裹。该演示是一个概念验证原型，用于在城市空域中沿着空中道路网络进行多包裹递送。我们使用悉尼 CBD 的 3D 模型在室内测试台环境中部署和测试这种多包裹无人机交付。演示：https://youtu.be/YTwsIfUvWPc

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单无人机在城市空域自主配送多个包裹的方案，并通过室内测试床验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机配送方案仅支持单包裹运输，而城市物流需求日益增长，需提高配送效率并减少无人机飞行次数。
AI.method: 采用'最近目的地优先'策略，结合悉尼CBD的3D室内模拟环境进行多包裹配送原型演示。
AI.result: 成功实现单无人机沿空路网络完成多包裹配送的原型验证，证明该方法在城市空域的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为城市空中多包裹配送提供了概念验证，未来可进一步优化路径规划与实际部署方案。

authors_text: Md Ershadul Haque,Ashikur Rahman,Iftekhar Junaeid,Samiul Ul Hoque,Manoranjan Paul
title: Rice Leaf Disease Classification and Detection Using YOLOv5
title_zh: 使用 YOLOv5 进行水稻叶部病害分类和检测
abstract: A staple food in more than a hundred nations worldwide is rice (Oryza sativa). The cultivation of rice is vital to global economic growth. However, the main issue facing the agricultural industry is rice leaf disease. The quality and quantity of the crops have declined, and this is the main cause. As farmers in any country do not have much knowledge about rice leaf disease, they cannot diagnose rice leaf disease properly. That's why they cannot take proper care of rice leaves. As a result, the production is decreasing. From literature survey, it has seen that YOLOv5 exhibit the better result compare to others deep learning method. As a result of the continual advancement of object detection technology, YOLO family algorithms, which have extraordinarily high precision and better speed have been used in various scene recognition tasks to build rice leaf disease monitoring systems. We have annotate 1500 collected data sets and propose a rice leaf disease classification and detection method based on YOLOv5 deep learning. We then trained and evaluated the YOLOv5 model. The simulation outcomes show improved object detection result for the augmented YOLOv5 network proposed in this article. The required levels of recognition precision, recall, mAP value, and F1 score are 90\%, 67\%, 76\%, and 81\% respectively are considered as performance metrics.

abstract_zh: 全球一百多个国家的主食是大米（Oryza sativa）。水稻种植对全球经济增长至关重要。然而，农业面临的主要问题是水稻叶部病害。农作物的质量和数量下降，这是主要原因。由于各国农民对水稻叶斑病的了解不多，因此无法正确诊断水稻叶斑病。这就是为什么他们不能适当照顾稻叶。结果，产量正在减少。从文献调查可以看出，YOLOv5 与其他深度学习方法相比表现出更好的结果。随着目标检测技术的不断进步，YOLO系列算法以其极高的精度和更快的速度被应用于各种场景识别任务中，构建水稻叶部病害监测系统。我们对收集的1500个数据集进行了标注，提出了一种基于YOLOv5深度学习的水稻叶部病害分类和检测方法。然后我们训练并评估了 YOLOv5 模型。仿真结果显示本文提出的增强 YOLOv5 网络的目标检测结果得到了改善。识别精度、召回率、mAP 值和 F1 分数所需的水平分别为 90\%、67\%、76\% 和 81\% 被视为性能指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于YOLOv5的水稻叶病分类与检测方法，通过构建数据集并训练模型实现疾病识别。
AI.motivation: 水稻叶病导致产量质量下降，而农民缺乏诊断知识。YOLOv5在目标检测中表现优异，适合构建自动化监测系统。
AI.method: 标注1500张数据集，基于YOLOv5深度学习框架设计分类检测模型，通过训练与评估优化网络性能。
AI.result: 模型达到90%精确率、67%召回率、76% mAP值和81% F1分数，满足预设性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 改进的YOLOv5方法有效提升水稻叶病检测精度，为农业病害防控提供技术支撑。

The cultivation of rice is vital to global economic growth. However, the main issue facing the agricultural industry is rice leaf disease. The quality and quantity of the crops have declined, and this is the main cause. As farmers in any country do not have much knowledge about rice leaf disease, they cannot diagnose rice leaf disease properly. That's why they cannot take proper care of rice leaves. authors_text: Lishun Wang,Miao Cao,Yong Zhong,Xin Yuan
title: Spatial-Temporal Transformer for Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging
title_zh: 用于视频快照压缩成像的时空变换器
abstract: Video snapshot compressive imaging (SCI) captures multiple sequential video frames by a single measurement using the idea of computational imaging. The underlying principle is to modulate high-speed frames through different masks and these modulated frames are summed to a single measurement captured by a low-speed 2D sensor (dubbed optical encoder); following this, algorithms are employed to reconstruct the desired high-speed frames (dubbed software decoder) if needed. In this paper, we consider the reconstruction algorithm in video SCI, i.e., recovering a series of video frames from a compressed measurement. Specifically, we propose a Spatial-Temporal transFormer (STFormer) to exploit the correlation in both spatial and temporal domains. STFormer network is composed of a token generation block, a video reconstruction block, and these two blocks are connected by a series of STFormer blocks. Each STFormer block consists of a spatial self-attention branch, a temporal self-attention branch and the outputs of these two branches are integrated by a fusion network. Extensive results on both simulated and real data demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of STFormer. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/ucaswangls/STFormer.git
summary: Video snapshot compressive imaging (SCI) captures multiple sequential video frames by a single measurement using the idea of computational imaging. The underlying principle is to modulate high-speed frames through different masks and these modulated frames are summed to a single measurement captured by a low-speed 2D sensor (dubbed optical encoder); following this, algorithms are employed to reconstruct the desired high-speed frames (dubbed software decoder) if needed. In this paper, we consider the reconstruction algorithm in video SCI, i.e., recovering a series of video frames from a compressed measurement. Specifically, we propose a Spatial-Temporal transFormer (STFormer) to exploit the correlation in both spatial and temporal domains. STFormer network is composed of a token generation block, a video reconstruction block, and these two blocks are connected by a series of STFormer blocks. Each STFormer block consists of a spatial self-attention branch, a temporal self-attention branch and the outputs of these two branches are integrated by a fusion network. Extensive results on both simulated and real data demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of STFormer. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/ucaswangls/STFormer.git
abstract_zh: 视频快照压缩成像 (SCI) 使用计算成像的思想，通过单次测量捕获多个连续视频帧。基本原理是通过不同的掩模调制高速帧，并将这些调制帧汇总为低速 2D 传感器（称为光学编码器）捕获的单个测量结果；接下来，如果需要，可以采用算法来重建所需的高速帧（称为软件解码器）。在本文中，我们考虑视频 SCI 中的重建算法，即从压缩测量中恢复一系列视频帧。具体来说，我们提出了一个时空变换器（STFormer）来利用空间和时间域中的相关性。 STFormer 网络由令牌生成块、视频重建块组成，这两个块通过一系列 STFormer 块连接。每个 STFormer 块由一个空间自注意力分支、一个时间自注意力分支组成，这两个分支的输出由融合网络集成。模拟和实际数据的大量结果证明了 STFormer 的最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ucaswangls/STFormer.git 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空Transformer的视频快照压缩成像重建算法，用于从单次测量中恢复高速视频帧序列。
AI.motivation: 现有视频快照压缩成像（SCI）方法在同时建模视频帧的时空相关性方面存在不足，导致重建质量受限。
AI.method: 设计STFormer网络架构，包含令牌生成模块、视频重建模块及多个STFormer块，通过空间自注意分支与时间自注意分支的融合网络捕捉时空特征。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据集上均取得最先进性能，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: STFormer通过有效建模时空相关性，显著提升了视频SCI的重建质量与效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空Transformer的视频快照压缩成像重建算法，用于从单次测量中恢复高速视频帧序列。

search_text: Spatial-Temporal Transformer for Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging 用于视频快照压缩成像的时空变换器 Video snapshot compressive imaging (SCI) captures multiple sequential video frames by a single measurement using the idea of computational imaging. The underlying principle is to modulate high-speed frames through different masks and these modulated frames are summed to a single measurement captured by a low-speed 2D sensor (dubbed optical encoder); following this, algorithms are employed to reconstruct the desired high-speed frames (dubbed software decoder) if needed. In this paper, we consider the reconstruction algorithm in video SCI, i.e., recovering a series of video frames from a compressed measurement. Specifically, we propose a Spatial-Temporal transFormer (STFormer) to exploit the correlation in both spatial and temporal domains. STFormer network is composed of a token generation block, a video reconstruction block, and these two blocks are connected by a series of STFormer blocks. Each STFormer block consists of a spatial self-attention branch, a temporal self-attention branch and the outputs of these two branches are integrated by a fusion network. Extensive results on both simulated and real data demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of STFormer. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/ucaswangls/STFormer.git 视频快照压缩成像 (SCI) 使用计算成像的思想，通过单次测量捕获多个连续视频帧。基本原理是通过不同的掩模调制高速帧，并将这些调制帧汇总为低速 2D 传感器（称为光学编码器）捕获的单个测量结果；接下来，如果需要，可以采用算法来重建所需的高速帧（称为软件解码器）。在本文中，我们考虑视频 SCI 中的重建算法，即从压缩测量中恢复一系列视频帧。具体来说，我们提出了一个时空变换器（STFormer）来利用空间和时间域中的相关性。 STFormer 网络由令牌生成块、视频重建块组成，这两个块通过一系列 STFormer 块连接。每个 STFormer 块由一个空间自注意力分支、一个时间自注意力分支组成，这两个分支的输出由融合网络集成。模拟和实际数据的大量结果证明了 STFormer 的最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ucaswangls/STFormer.git 上公开获取 本文提出了一种基于时空Transformer的视频快照压缩成像重建算法，用于从单次测量中恢复高速视频帧序列。 Lishun Wang,Miao Cao,Yong Zhong,Xin Yuan eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Daoyuan Wu,Lixiang Li,Debin Gao
title: On the Usability (In)Security of In-App Browsing Interfaces in Mobile Apps
title_zh: 论移动应用中应用内浏览界面的可用性（内）安全性
comment: This paper appeared at RAID '21. We upload this to fix the author displaying issue at the ACM website: https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1145/3471621.3471625
comments: This paper appeared at RAID '21. We upload this to fix the author displaying issue at the ACM website: https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1145/3471621.3471625
abstract: Due to the frequent encountering of web URLs in various application scenarios (e.g., chatting and email reading), many mobile apps build their in-app browsing interfaces (IABIs) to provide a seamless user experience. Although this achieves user-friendliness by avoiding the constant switching between the subject app and the system built-in browser apps, we find that IABIs, if not well designed or customized, could result in usability security risks. In this paper, we conduct the first empirical study on the usability (in)security of in-app browsing interfaces in both Android and iOS apps. Specifically, we collect a dataset of 25 high-profile mobile apps from five common application categories that contain IABIs, including Facebook and Gmail, and perform a systematic analysis (not end-user study though) that comprises eight carefully designed security tests and covers the entire course of opening, displaying, and navigating an in-app web page. During this process, we obtain three major security findings: (1) about 30% of the tested apps fail to provide enough URL information for users to make informed decisions on opening an URL; (2) nearly all custom IABIs have various problems in providing sufficient indicators to faithfully display an in-app page to users, whereas ten IABIs that are based on Chrome Custom Tabs and SFSafariViewController are generally secure; and (3) only a few IABIs give warnings to remind users of the risk of inputting passwords during navigating a (potentially phishing) login page. Most developers had acknowledged our findings but their willingness and readiness to fix usability issues are rather low compared to fixing technical vulnerabilities, which is a puzzle in usability security research. Nevertheless, to help mitigate risky IABIs and guide future designs, we propose a set of secure IABI design principles.

Although this achieves user-friendliness by avoiding the constant switching between the subject app and the system built-in browser apps, we find that IABIs, if not well designed or customized, could result in usability security risks. In this paper, we conduct the first empirical study on the usability (in)security of in-app browsing interfaces in both Android and iOS apps. Specifically, we collect a dataset of 25 high-profile mobile apps from five common application categories that contain IABIs, including Facebook and Gmail, and perform a systematic analysis (not end-user study though) that comprises eight carefully designed security tests and covers the entire course of opening, displaying, and navigating an in-app web page. During this process, we obtain three major security findings: (1) about 30% of the tested apps fail to provide enough URL information for users to make informed decisions on opening an URL; (2) nearly all custom IABIs have various problems in providing sufficient indicators to faithfully display an in-app page to users, whereas ten IABIs that are based on Chrome Custom Tabs and SFSafariViewController are generally secure; and (3) only a few IABIs give warnings to remind users of the risk of inputting passwords during navigating a (potentially phishing) login page. Most developers had acknowledged our findings but their willingness and readiness to fix usability issues are rather low compared to fixing technical vulnerabilities, which is a puzzle in usability security research. Nevertheless, to help mitigate risky IABIs and guide future designs, we propose a set of secure IABI design principles.
abstract_zh: 由于在各种应用场景（例如聊天和电子邮件阅读）中频繁遇到 Web URL，许多移动应用程序构建其应用内浏览界面（IABI）以提供无缝的用户体验。虽然这通过避免主题应用程序和系统内置浏览器应用程序之间的不断切换来实现用户友好性，但我们发现IABI如果设计或定制不当，可能会导致可用性安全风险。在本文中，我们对 Android 和 iOS 应用程序中应用内浏览界面的可用性（内）安全性进行了首次实证研究。具体来说，我们从包含 IABI 的 5 个常见应用程序类别（包括 Facebook 和 Gmail）中收集了 25 个备受瞩目的移动应用程序的数据集，并进行了系统分析（尽管不是最终用户研究），其中包括八项精心设计的安全测试，涵盖了打开、显示和导航应用程序内网页的整个过程。在此过程中，我们获得了三个主要的安全发现：（1）大约 30% 的测试应用程序未能提供足够的 URL 信息，以便用户在打开 URL 时做出明智的决定； (2) 几乎所有自定义 IABI 在提供足够的指标以忠实地向用户显示应用内页面方面都存在各种问题，而基于 Chrome 自定义选项卡和 SFSafariViewController 的 10 个 IABI 通常是安全的； (3) 只有少数 IABI 发出警告，提醒用户在浏览（可能存在网络钓鱼）登录页面时输入密码的风险。大多数开发者都承认我们的发现，但与修复技术漏洞相比，他们修复可用性问题的意愿和准备程度相当低，这是可用性安全研究中的一个难题。尽管如此，为了帮助减轻有风险的 IABI 并指导未来的设计，我们提出了一套安全的 IABI 设计原则。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了移动应用内嵌浏览器界面（IABIs）的可用性与安全隐患，通过实证分析揭示其设计缺陷并提出安全设计原则。
AI.motivation: 随着移动应用中网页链接的频繁出现，IABIs被广泛用于提升用户体验，但其潜在的可用性安全风险尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 收集25款主流应用（如Facebook、Gmail），通过八项安全测试分析IABIs在打开、展示和导航网页全过程中的安全性问题。
AI.result: 发现30%应用未提供足够URL信息，多数自定义IABIs存在显示缺陷，仅少数提供密码输入风险警告，开发者对修复可用性问题积极性较低。
AI.conclusion: 提出IABIs安全设计原则，建议采用系统级组件（如Chrome Custom Tabs）以降低风险，强调需平衡用户体验与安全防护。

authors_text: Huiying Deng,Guangming Wang,Zhiheng Feng,Chaokang Jiang,Xinrui Wu,Yanzi Miao,Hesheng Wang
title: Pseudo-LiDAR for Visual Odometry
title_zh: 用于视觉里程计的伪激光雷达
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures
abstract: In the existing methods, LiDAR odometry shows superior performance, but visual odometry is still widely used for its price advantage. Conventionally, the task of visual odometry mainly rely on the input of continuous images. However, it is very complicated for the odometry network to learn the epipolar geometry information provided by the images. In this paper, the concept of pseudo-LiDAR is introduced into the odometry to solve this problem. The pseudo-LiDAR point cloud back-projects the depth map generated by the image into the 3D point cloud, which changes the way of image representation. Compared with the stereo images, the pseudo-LiDAR point cloud generated by the stereo matching network can get the explicit 3D coordinates. Since the 6 Degrees of Freedom (DoF) pose transformation occurs in 3D space, the 3D structure information provided by the pseudo-LiDAR point cloud is more direct than the image. Compared with sparse LiDAR, the pseudo-LiDAR has a denser point cloud. In order to make full use of the rich point cloud information provided by the pseudo-LiDAR, a projection-aware dense odometry pipeline is adopted. Most previous LiDAR-based algorithms sampled 8192 points from the point cloud as input to the odometry network. The projection-aware dense odometry pipeline takes all the pseudo-LiDAR point clouds generated from the images except for the error points as the input to the network. While making full use of the 3D geometric information in the images, the semantic information in the images is also used in the odometry task. The fusion of 2D-3D is achieved in an image-only based odometry. Experiments on the KITTI dataset prove the effectiveness of our method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first visual odometry method using pseudo-LiDAR.
