Conventionally, the task of visual odometry mainly rely on the input of continuous images. However, it is very complicated for the odometry network to learn the epipolar geometry information provided by the images. In this paper, the concept of pseudo-LiDAR is introduced into the odometry to solve this problem. The pseudo-LiDAR point cloud back-projects the depth map generated by the image into the 3D point cloud, which changes the way of image representation. Compared with the stereo images, the pseudo-LiDAR point cloud generated by the stereo matching network can get the explicit 3D coordinates. Since the 6 Degrees of Freedom (DoF) pose transformation occurs in 3D space, the 3D structure information provided by the pseudo-LiDAR point cloud is more direct than the image. Compared with sparse LiDAR, the pseudo-LiDAR has a denser point cloud. In order to make full use of the rich point cloud information provided by the pseudo-LiDAR, a projection-aware dense odometry pipeline is adopted. Most previous LiDAR-based algorithms sampled 8192 points from the point cloud as input to the odometry network. The projection-aware dense odometry pipeline takes all the pseudo-LiDAR point clouds generated from the images except for the error points as the input to the network. While making full use of the 3D geometric information in the images, the semantic information in the images is also used in the odometry task. The fusion of 2D-3D is achieved in an image-only based odometry. Experiments on the KITTI dataset prove the effectiveness of our method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first visual odometry method using pseudo-LiDAR.
abstract_zh: 在现有方法中，LiDAR里程计表现出优越的性能，但视觉里程计因其价格优势仍被广泛使用。传统上，视觉里程计的任务主要依赖于连续图像的输入。然而，里程计网络学习图像提供的极线几何信息非常复杂。本文将伪激光雷达的概念引入到里程计中来解决这个问题。伪LiDAR点云将图像生成的深度图反投影到3D点云中，改变了图像表示的方式。与立体图像相比，立体匹配网络生成的伪LiDAR点云可以获得明确的3D坐标。由于6自由度（DoF）姿态变换发生在3D空间中，因此伪LiDAR点云提供的3D结构信息比图像更直接。与稀疏激光雷达相比，伪激光雷达具有更密集的点云。为了充分利用伪激光雷达提供的丰富的点云信息，采用了投影感知的密集里程计管道。之前大多数基于 LiDAR 的算法都会从点云中采样 8192 个点作为里程计网络的输入。投影感知密集里程计管道将从图像生成的所有伪激光雷达点云（误差点除外）作为网络的输入。在充分利用图像中的3D几何信息的同时，图像中的语义信息也被用于里程计任务。 2D-3D 的融合是在仅基于图像的里程计中实现的。 KITTI数据集上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。据我们所知，这是第一个使用伪激光雷达的视觉里程计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪LiDAR的视觉里程计方法，通过将图像生成的深度图反投影为3D点云，提升视觉里程计的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉里程计依赖连续图像输入，难以有效学习图像提供的本质几何信息，而LiDAR里程计虽性能优越但成本较高。本文旨在通过引入伪LiDAR技术，在无需真实LiDAR硬件的情况下，利用图像生成的密集3D点云提升视觉里程计的准确性。
AI.method: 通过立体匹配网络生成深度图并反投影为伪LiDAR点云，采用投影感知的密集里程计流程，利用所有非错误点云数据并融合图像中的语义信息，实现2D-3D信息融合的纯图像里程计。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，据作者所知，这是首个基于伪LiDAR的视觉里程计方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的伪LiDAR方法通过密集3D点云和语义信息融合，有效提升了视觉里程计的性能，为低成本高精度定位提供了新思路。

search_text: Pseudo-LiDAR for Visual Odometry 用于视觉里程计的伪激光雷达 In the existing methods, LiDAR odometry shows superior performance, but visual odometry is still widely used for its price advantage. Conventionally, the task of visual odometry mainly rely on the input of continuous images. However, it is very complicated for the odometry network to learn the epipolar geometry information provided by the images. In this paper, the concept of pseudo-LiDAR is introduced into the odometry to solve this problem. The pseudo-LiDAR point cloud back-projects the depth map generated by the image into the 3D point cloud, which changes the way of image representation. Compared with the stereo images, the pseudo-LiDAR point cloud generated by the stereo matching network can get the explicit 3D coordinates. Since the 6 Degrees of Freedom (DoF) pose transformation occurs in 3D space, the 3D structure information provided by the pseudo-LiDAR point cloud is more direct than the image. Compared with sparse LiDAR, the pseudo-LiDAR has a denser point cloud. In order to make full use of the rich point cloud information provided by the pseudo-LiDAR, a projection-aware dense odometry pipeline is adopted. Most previous LiDAR-based algorithms sampled 8192 points from the point cloud as input to the odometry network. The projection-aware dense odometry pipeline takes all the pseudo-LiDAR point clouds generated from the images except for the error points as the input to the network. While making full use of the 3D geometric information in the images, the semantic information in the images is also used in the odometry task. The fusion of 2D-3D is achieved in an image-only based odometry. Experiments on the KITTI dataset prove the effectiveness of our method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first visual odometry method using pseudo-LiDAR. 在现有方法中，LiDAR里程计表现出优越的性能，但视觉里程计因其价格优势仍被广泛使用。传统上，视觉里程计的任务主要依赖于连续图像的输入。然而，里程计网络学习图像提供的极线几何信息非常复杂。本文将伪激光雷达的概念引入到里程计中来解决这个问题。伪LiDAR点云将图像生成的深度图反投影到3D点云中，改变了图像表示的方式。与立体图像相比，立体匹配网络生成的伪LiDAR点云可以获得明确的3D坐标。由于6自由度（DoF）姿态变换发生在3D空间中，因此伪LiDAR点云提供的3D结构信息比图像更直接。与稀疏激光雷达相比，伪激光雷达具有更密集的点云。为了充分利用伪激光雷达提供的丰富的点云信息，采用了投影感知的密集里程计管道。之前大多数基于 LiDAR 的算法都会从点云中采样 8192 个点作为里程计网络的输入。投影感知密集里程计管道将从图像生成的所有伪激光雷达点云（误差点除外）作为网络的输入。在充分利用图像中的3D几何信息的同时，图像中的语义信息也被用于里程计任务。 2D-3D 的融合是在仅基于图像的里程计中实现的。 KITTI数据集上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。据我们所知，这是第一个使用伪激光雷达的视觉里程计方法。 本文提出一种基于伪LiDAR的视觉里程计方法，通过将图像生成的深度图反投影为3D点云，提升视觉里程计的性能。 Huiying Deng,Guangming Wang,Zhiheng Feng,Chaokang Jiang,Xinrui Wu,Yanzi Miao,Hesheng Wang cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Biyang Guo,Songqiao Han,Hailiang Huang
title: Selective Text Augmentation with Word Roles for Low-Resource Text Classification
title_zh: 使用单词角色进行选择性文本增强，用于低资源文本分类
abstract: Data augmentation techniques are widely used in text classification tasks to improve the performance of classifiers, especially in low-resource scenarios. Most previous methods conduct text augmentation without considering the different functionalities of the words in the text, which may generate unsatisfactory samples. Different words may play different roles in text classification, which inspires us to strategically select the proper roles for text augmentation. In this work, we first identify the relationships between the words in a text and the text category from the perspectives of statistical correlation and semantic similarity and then utilize them to divide the words into four roles -- Gold, Venture, Bonus, and Trivial words, which have different functionalities for text classification. Based on these word roles, we present a new augmentation technique called STA (Selective Text Augmentation) where different text-editing operations are selectively applied to words with specific roles. STA can generate diverse and relatively clean samples, while preserving the original core semantics, and is also quite simple to implement. Extensive experiments on 5 benchmark low-resource text classification datasets illustrate that augmented samples produced by STA successfully boost the performance of classification models which significantly outperforms previous non-selective methods, including two large language model-based techniques. Cross-dataset experiments further indicate that STA can help the classifiers generalize better to other datasets than previous methods.
summary: Data augmentation techniques are widely used in text classification tasks to improve the performance of classifiers, especially in low-resource scenarios. Most previous methods conduct text augmentation without considering the different functionalities of the words in the text, which may generate unsatisfactory samples. Different words may play different roles in text classification, which inspires us to strategically select the proper roles for text augmentation. In this work, we first identify the relationships between the words in a text and the text category from the perspectives of statistical correlation and semantic similarity and then utilize them to divide the words into four roles -- Gold, Venture, Bonus, and Trivial words, which have different functionalities for text classification. Based on these word roles, we present a new augmentation technique called STA (Selective Text Augmentation) where different text-editing operations are selectively applied to words with specific roles. STA can generate diverse and relatively clean samples, while preserving the original core semantics, and is also quite simple to implement. Extensive experiments on 5 benchmark low-resource text classification datasets illustrate that augmented samples produced by STA successfully boost the performance of classification models which significantly outperforms previous non-selective methods, including two large language model-based techniques. Cross-dataset experiments further indicate that STA can help the classifiers generalize better to other datasets than previous methods.
abstract_zh: 数据增强技术广泛应用于文本分类任务中，以提高分类器的性能，特别是在资源匮乏的场景中。以前的大多数方法在进行文本增强时没有考虑文本中单词的不同功能，这可能会生成不令人满意的样本。不同的单词在文本分类中可能扮演不同的角色，这启发我们策略性地选择合适的角色进行文本增强。在这项工作中，我们首先从统计相关性和语义相似性的角度识别文本中的单词与文本类别之间的关系，然后利用它们将单词分为四种角色——Gold、Venture、Bonus和Trivial单词，它们具有不同的文本分类功能。基于这些单词角色，我们提出了一种称为 STA（选择性文本增强）的新增强技术，其中不同的文本编辑操作有选择地应用于具有特定角色的单词。 STA可以生成多样化且相对干净的样本，同时保留原始核心语义，并且实现起来也相当简单。对 5 个基准低资源文本分类数据集的大量实验表明，STA 生成的增强样本成功地提高了分类模型的性能，显着优于以前的非选择性方法，包括两种基于大型语言模型的技术。跨数据集实验进一步表明，与之前的方法相比，STA 可以帮助分类器更好地推广到其他数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于词角色选择性文本增强方法（STA），用于改进低资源文本分类任务中的分类器性能。
AI.motivation: 传统文本增强方法未考虑词语在文本分类中的不同功能，导致生成样本质量不高，因此需要根据词语角色进行策略性增强。
AI.method: 通过统计相关性和语义相似性将词语分为四类角色（Gold、Venture、Bonus、Trivial），并针对不同角色应用特定文本编辑操作生成多样化样本。
AI.result: 在5个低资源数据集上实验表明，STA生成的样本显著优于非选择性方法，且跨数据集测试显示其具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: STA通过角色驱动的文本增强有效提升了低资源场景下的分类性能，且实现简单，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Selective Text Augmentation with Word Roles for Low-Resource Text Classification 使用单词角色进行选择性文本增强，用于低资源文本分类 Data augmentation techniques are widely used in text classification tasks to improve the performance of classifiers, especially in low-resource scenarios. Most previous methods conduct text augmentation without considering the different functionalities of the words in the text, which may generate unsatisfactory samples. Different words may play different roles in text classification, which inspires us to strategically select the proper roles for text augmentation. In this work, we first identify the relationships between the words in a text and the text category from the perspectives of statistical correlation and semantic similarity and then utilize them to divide the words into four roles -- Gold, Venture, Bonus, and Trivial words, which have different functionalities for text classification. Based on these word roles, we present a new augmentation technique called STA (Selective Text Augmentation) where different text-editing operations are selectively applied to words with specific roles. STA can generate diverse and relatively clean samples, while preserving the original core semantics, and is also quite simple to implement. Extensive experiments on 5 benchmark low-resource text classification datasets illustrate that augmented samples produced by STA successfully boost the performance of classification models which significantly outperforms previous non-selective methods, including two large language model-based techniques. Cross-dataset experiments further indicate that STA can help the classifiers generalize better to other datasets than previous methods. 数据增强技术广泛应用于文本分类任务中，以提高分类器的性能，特别是在资源匮乏的场景中。以前的大多数方法在进行文本增强时没有考虑文本中单词的不同功能，这可能会生成不令人满意的样本。不同的单词在文本分类中可能扮演不同的角色，这启发我们策略性地选择合适的角色进行文本增强。在这项工作中，我们首先从统计相关性和语义相似性的角度识别文本中的单词与文本类别之间的关系，然后利用它们将单词分为四种角色——Gold、Venture、Bonus和Trivial单词，它们具有不同的文本分类功能。基于这些单词角色，我们提出了一种称为 STA（选择性文本增强）的新增强技术，其中不同的文本编辑操作有选择地应用于具有特定角色的单词。 STA可以生成多样化且相对干净的样本，同时保留原始核心语义，并且实现起来也相当简单。对 5 个基准低资源文本分类数据集的大量实验表明，STA 生成的增强样本成功地提高了分类模型的性能，显着优于以前的非选择性方法，包括两种基于大型语言模型的技术。跨数据集实验进一步表明，与之前的方法相比，STA 可以帮助分类器更好地推广到其他数据集。 本文提出了一种基于词角色选择性文本增强方法（STA），用于改进低资源文本分类任务中的分类器性能。 Biyang Guo,Songqiao Han,Hailiang Huang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Tanmoy Dam,Mahardhika Pratama,MD Meftahul Ferdaus,Sreenatha Anavatti,Hussein Abbas
title: Scalable Adversarial Online Continual Learning
title_zh: 可扩展的对抗性在线持续学习
comment: has been accepted for publication at European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases 2022 (ECML PKDD 2022)
comments: has been accepted for publication at European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases 2022 (ECML PKDD 2022)
abstract: Adversarial continual learning is effective for continual learning problems because of the presence of feature alignment process generating task-invariant features having low susceptibility to the catastrophic forgetting problem. Nevertheless, the ACL method imposes considerable complexities because it relies on task-specific networks and discriminators. It also goes through an iterative training process which does not fit for online (one-epoch) continual learning problems. This paper proposes a scalable adversarial continual learning (SCALE) method putting forward a parameter generator transforming common features into task-specific features and a single discriminator in the adversarial game to induce common features. The training process is carried out in meta-learning fashions using a new combination of three loss functions. SCALE outperforms prominent baselines with noticeable margins in both accuracy and execution time.
summary: Adversarial continual learning is effective for continual learning problems because of the presence of feature alignment process generating task-invariant features having low susceptibility to the catastrophic forgetting problem. Nevertheless, the ACL method imposes considerable complexities because it relies on task-specific networks and discriminators. It also goes through an iterative training process which does not fit for online (one-epoch) continual learning problems. This paper proposes a scalable adversarial continual learning (SCALE) method putting forward a parameter generator transforming common features into task-specific features and a single discriminator in the adversarial game to induce common features. The training process is carried out in meta-learning fashions using a new combination of three loss functions. SCALE outperforms prominent baselines with noticeable margins in both accuracy and execution time.
abstract_zh: 对抗性持续学习对于持续学习问题是有效的，因为特征对齐过程的存在生成了对灾难性遗忘问题具有低敏感性的任务不变特征。然而，ACL 方法具有相当大的复杂性，因为它依赖于特定于任务的网络和判别器。它还经历了一个迭代训练过程，该过程不适合在线（单周期）持续学习问题。本文提出了一种可扩展的对抗性持续学习（SCALE）方法，提出了一个参数生成器将共同特征转换为特定于任务的特征，并在对抗游戏中使用单个判别器来归纳共同特征。训练过程是使用三个损失函数的新组合以元学习方式进行的。 SCALE 的性能优于突出的基线，在准确性和执行时间方面都有显着的优势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的对抗在线持续学习方法（SCALE），以解决现有方法的复杂性和不适应在线学习的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗持续学习方法因依赖任务特定网络和判别器，以及迭代训练过程，难以适应在线（单轮）持续学习的需求，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SCALE方法，包含参数生成器将通用特征转换为任务特定特征，使用单一判别器诱导通用特征，并通过元学习结合三种损失函数进行训练。
AI.result: 在准确率和执行时间上显著优于现有主流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SCALE方法有效解决了对抗持续学习的可扩展性与在线学习适应性问题，为高效持续学习提供了新思路。

ai_content.result: 在准确率和执行时间上显著优于现有主流基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: SCALE方法有效解决了对抗持续学习的可扩展性与在线学习适应性问题，为高效持续学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Scalable Adversarial Online Continual Learning 可扩展的对抗性在线持续学习 Adversarial continual learning is effective for continual learning problems because of the presence of feature alignment process generating task-invariant features having low susceptibility to the catastrophic forgetting problem. Nevertheless, the ACL method imposes considerable complexities because it relies on task-specific networks and discriminators. It also goes through an iterative training process which does not fit for online (one-epoch) continual learning problems. This paper proposes a scalable adversarial continual learning (SCALE) method putting forward a parameter generator transforming common features into task-specific features and a single discriminator in the adversarial game to induce common features. The training process is carried out in meta-learning fashions using a new combination of three loss functions. SCALE outperforms prominent baselines with noticeable margins in both accuracy and execution time. 对抗性持续学习对于持续学习问题是有效的，因为特征对齐过程的存在生成了对灾难性遗忘问题具有低敏感性的任务不变特征。然而，ACL 方法具有相当大的复杂性，因为它依赖于特定于任务的网络和判别器。它还经历了一个迭代训练过程，该过程不适合在线（单周期）持续学习问题。本文提出了一种可扩展的对抗性持续学习（SCALE）方法，提出了一个参数生成器将共同特征转换为特定于任务的特征，并在对抗游戏中使用单个判别器来归纳共同特征。训练过程是使用三个损失函数的新组合以元学习方式进行的。 SCALE 的性能优于突出的基线，在准确性和执行时间方面都有显着的优势。 提出一种可扩展的对抗在线持续学习方法（SCALE），以解决现有方法的复杂性和不适应在线学习的问题。 Tanmoy Dam,Mahardhika Pratama,MD Meftahul Ferdaus,Sreenatha Anavatti,Hussein Abbas cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Appan Rakaraddi,Siew Kei Lam,Mahardhika Pratama,Marcus De Carvalho
title: Reinforced Continual Learning for Graphs
title_zh: 强化图的持续学习
comment: has been accepted for publication as a long paper at 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 22)
comments: has been accepted for publication as a long paper at 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 22)
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become the backbone for a myriad of tasks pertaining to graphs and similar topological data structures. While many works have been established in domains related to node and graph classification/regression tasks, they mostly deal with a single task. Continual learning on graphs is largely unexplored and existing graph continual learning approaches are limited to the task-incremental learning scenarios. This paper proposes a graph continual learning strategy that combines the architecture-based and memory-based approaches. The structural learning strategy is driven by reinforcement learning, where a controller network is trained in such a way to determine an optimal number of nodes to be added/pruned from the base network when new tasks are observed, thus assuring sufficient network capacities. The parameter learning strategy is underpinned by the concept of Dark Experience replay method to cope with the catastrophic forgetting problem. Our approach is numerically validated with several graph continual learning benchmark problems in both task-incremental learning and class-incremental learning settings. Compared to recently published works, our approach demonstrates improved performance in both the settings. The implementation code can be found at \url{https://github.com/codexhammer/gcl}.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become the backbone for a myriad of tasks pertaining to graphs and similar topological data structures. While many works have been established in domains related to node and graph classification/regression tasks, they mostly deal with a single task. Continual learning on graphs is largely unexplored and existing graph continual learning approaches are limited to the task-incremental learning scenarios. This paper proposes a graph continual learning strategy that combines the architecture-based and memory-based approaches. The structural learning strategy is driven by reinforcement learning, where a controller network is trained in such a way to determine an optimal number of nodes to be added/pruned from the base network when new tasks are observed, thus assuring sufficient network capacities. The parameter learning strategy is underpinned by the concept of Dark Experience replay method to cope with the catastrophic forgetting problem. Our approach is numerically validated with several graph continual learning benchmark problems in both task-incremental learning and class-incremental learning settings. Compared to recently published works, our approach demonstrates improved performance in both the settings. The implementation code can be found at \url{https://github.com/codexhammer/gcl}.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已成为与图和类似拓扑数据结构相关的无数任务的支柱。虽然在与节点和图分类/回归任务相关的领域已经建立了许多工作，但它们大多处理单个任务。图的持续学习在很大程度上尚未被探索，现有的图持续学习方法仅限于任务增量学习场景。本文提出了一种结合基于架构和基于内存的方法的图持续学习策略。结构学习策略由强化学习驱动，其中控制器网络以这样的方式进行训练，以确定在观察到新任务时从基础网络添加/修剪的最佳节点数量，从而确保足够的网络容量。参数学习策略以黑暗体验重放方法的概念为基础，以应对灾难性遗忘问题。我们的方法在任务增量学习和班级增量学习设置中通过几个图连续学习基准问题进行了数值验证。与最近发表的作品相比，我们的方法在这两种设置中都表现出了改进的性能。实现代码可以在\url{https://github.com/codexhammer/gcl}找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合架构调整与记忆回放的图持续学习方法，解决图神经网络在任务和类别增量学习场景下的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图持续学习方法局限于任务增量场景，缺乏对类别增量的处理，且难以有效应对网络容量动态变化与灾难性遗忘挑战。
AI.method: 通过强化学习控制器动态调整网络节点数量以适应新任务，同时采用Dark Experience Replay方法回放历史经验以缓解参数遗忘。
AI.result: 在任务增量和类别增量基准测试中均优于现有方法，代码已开源至GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结构优化与经验回放的协同机制，在图持续学习领域展现出更优的适应性与稳定性。

authors_text: Tanmoy Dam,Md Meftahul Ferdaus,Mahardhika Pratama,Sreenatha G. Anavatti,Senthilnath Jayavelu,Hussein A. Abbass
title: Latent Preserving Generative Adversarial Network for Imbalance classification
title_zh: 用于不平衡分类的潜在保留生成对抗网络
comment: has been accepted for publication at The 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP 2022)
comments: has been accepted for publication at The 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP 2022)
abstract: Many real-world classification problems have imbalanced frequency of class labels; a well-known issue known as the "class imbalance" problem. Classic classification algorithms tend to be biased towards the majority class, leaving the classifier vulnerable to misclassification of the minority class. While the literature is rich with methods to fix this problem, as the dimensionality of the problem increases, many of these methods do not scale-up and the cost of running them become prohibitive. In this paper, we present an end-to-end deep generative classifier. We propose a domain-constraint autoencoder to preserve the latent-space as prior for a generator, which is then used to play an adversarial game with two other deep networks, a discriminator and a classifier. Extensive experiments are carried out on three different multi-class imbalanced problems and a comparison with state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results confirmed the superiority of our method over popular algorithms in handling high-dimensional imbalanced classification problems. Our code is available on https://github.com/TanmDL/SLPPL-GAN.
summary: Many real-world classification problems have imbalanced frequency of class labels; a well-known issue known as the "class imbalance" problem. Classic classification algorithms tend to be biased towards the majority class, leaving the classifier vulnerable to misclassification of the minority class. While the literature is rich with methods to fix this problem, as the dimensionality of the problem increases, many of these methods do not scale-up and the cost of running them become prohibitive. In this paper, we present an end-to-end deep generative classifier. We propose a domain-constraint autoencoder to preserve the latent-space as prior for a generator, which is then used to play an adversarial game with two other deep networks, a discriminator and a classifier. Extensive experiments are carried out on three different multi-class imbalanced problems and a comparison with state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results confirmed the superiority of our method over popular algorithms in handling high-dimensional imbalanced classification problems. Our code is available on https://github.com/TanmDL/SLPPL-GAN.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的分类问题都存在类标签频率不平衡的问题；一个众所周知的问题，称为“类别不平衡”问题。经典的分类算法往往偏向多数类，导致分类器容易对少数类进行错误分类。尽管文献中有丰富的方法来解决这个问题，但随着问题维度的增加，许多方法无法扩展，并且运行它们的成本变得令人望而却步。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端的深度生成分类器。我们提出了一种域约束自动编码器来保留生成器先前的潜在空间，然后使用生成器与另外两个深度网络（鉴别器和分类器）玩对抗性游戏。对三个不同的多类不平衡问题进行了广泛的实验，并与最先进的方法进行了比较。实验结果证实了我们的方法在处理高维不平衡分类问题方面优于流行算法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/TanmDL/SLPPL-GAN 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于高维不平衡分类问题的生成对抗网络，通过保持潜在空间特性提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 传统分类算法在处理高维不平衡数据时存在扩展性差、计算成本高的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计端到端深度生成分类器，结合领域约束自编码器与对抗网络，通过生成器与判别器、分类器的对抗训练实现特征学习。
AI.result: 在三个多类不平衡数据集上实验验证，相较现有方法在高维场景下分类性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在空间约束与对抗训练机制，有效解决了高维不平衡分类中的类别偏差问题。

authors_text: Weiwei Weng,Mahardhika Pratama,Choiru Za'in,Marcus De Carvalho,Rakaraddi Appan,Andri Ashfahani,Edward Yapp Kien Yee
title: Autonomous Cross Domain Adaptation under Extreme Label Scarcity
title_zh: 极度标签稀缺下的自主跨域适应
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2022
abstract: A cross domain multistream classification is a challenging problem calling for fast domain adaptations to handle different but related streams in never-ending and rapidly changing environments. Notwithstanding that existing multistream classifiers assume no labelled samples in the target stream, they still incur expensive labelling cost since they require fully labelled samples of the source stream. This paper aims to attack the problem of extreme label shortage in the cross domain multistream classification problems where only very few labelled samples of the source stream are provided before process runs. Our solution, namely Learning Streaming Process from Partial Ground Truth (LEOPARD), is built upon a flexible deep clustering network where its hidden nodes, layers and clusters are added and removed dynamically in respect to varying data distributions. A deep clustering strategy is underpinned by a simultaneous feature learning and clustering technique leading to clustering-friendly latent spaces. A domain adaptation strategy relies on the adversarial domain adaptation technique where a feature extractor is trained to fool a domain classifier classifying source and target streams. Our numerical study demonstrates the efficacy of LEOPARD where it delivers improved performances compared to prominent algorithms in 15 of 24 cases. Source codes of LEOPARD are shared in \url{https://github.com/wengweng001/LEOPARD.git} to enable further study.

This paper aims to attack the problem of extreme label shortage in the cross domain multistream classification problems where only very few labelled samples of the source stream are provided before process runs. abstract_zh: 跨域多流分类是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要快速域适应来处理永无休止且快速变化的环境中不同但相关的流。尽管现有的多流分类器假设目标流中没有标记样本，但它们仍然会产生昂贵的标记成本，因为它们需要源流的完全标记样本。本文旨在解决跨域多流分类问题中标签极度短缺的问题，在流程运行之前仅提供源流的极少数标记样本。我们的解决方案，即从部分真实情况学习流处理（LEOPARD），建立在灵活的深度聚类网络的基础上，其中其隐藏节点、层和聚类根据不同的数据分布动态添加和删除。深度聚类策略以同步特征学习和聚类技术为基础，从而产生聚类友好的潜在空间。域适应策略依赖于对抗性域适应技术，其中训练特征提取器来欺骗对源流和目标流进行分类的域分类器。我们的数值研究证明了 LEOPARD 的功效，在 24 个案例中，有 15 个案例与主流算法相比，它提供了更高的性能。 LEOPARD 的源代码在 \url{https://github.com/wengweng001/LEOPARD.git} 中共享，以便进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LEOPARD的跨域多流分类方法，旨在解决在目标流无标签且源流标签极度稀缺的情况下，实现快速领域适应的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域多流分类方法依赖大量源流标签数据，导致标注成本高昂，而实际场景中源流标签可能极度稀缺，需降低对标签的依赖。
AI.method: 基于动态深度聚类网络LEOPARD，通过动态增减网络层和聚类结构适应数据分布变化，结合对抗领域适应技术对齐源域和目标域特征，并同步进行特征学习与聚类以生成聚类友好型潜在空间。
AI.result: 在24个案例中，LEOPARD在15个案例中表现优于现有主流算法，且开源代码已发布于GitHub供进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: LEOPARD通过动态网络结构和对抗领域适应有效应对了极端标签稀缺问题，在跨域分类任务中展现出优越的适应性与实用性。

search_text: Autonomous Cross Domain Adaptation under Extreme Label Scarcity 极度标签稀缺下的自主跨域适应 A cross domain multistream classification is a challenging problem calling for fast domain adaptations to handle different but related streams in never-ending and rapidly changing environments. Notwithstanding that existing multistream classifiers assume no labelled samples in the target stream, they still incur expensive labelling cost since they require fully labelled samples of the source stream. This paper aims to attack the problem of extreme label shortage in the cross domain multistream classification problems where only very few labelled samples of the source stream are provided before process runs. Our solution, namely Learning Streaming Process from Partial Ground Truth (LEOPARD), is built upon a flexible deep clustering network where its hidden nodes, layers and clusters are added and removed dynamically in respect to varying data distributions. A deep clustering strategy is underpinned by a simultaneous feature learning and clustering technique leading to clustering-friendly latent spaces. A domain adaptation strategy relies on the adversarial domain adaptation technique where a feature extractor is trained to fool a domain classifier classifying source and target streams. Our numerical study demonstrates the efficacy of LEOPARD where it delivers improved performances compared to prominent algorithms in 15 of 24 cases. authors_text: Sheng Xu,Yanjing Li,Tiancheng Wang,Teli Ma,Baochang Zhang,Peng Gao,Yu Qiao,Jinhu Lv,Guodong Guo
title: Recurrent Bilinear Optimization for Binary Neural Networks
title_zh: 二元神经网络的循环双线性优化
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022
abstract: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) show great promise for real-world embedded devices. As one of the critical steps to achieve a powerful BNN, the scale factor calculation plays an essential role in reducing the performance gap to their real-valued counterparts. However, existing BNNs neglect the intrinsic bilinear relationship of real-valued weights and scale factors, resulting in a sub-optimal model caused by an insufficient training process. To address this issue, Recurrent Bilinear Optimization is proposed to improve the learning process of BNNs (RBONNs) by associating the intrinsic bilinear variables in the back propagation process. Our work is the first attempt to optimize BNNs from the bilinear perspective. Specifically, we employ a recurrent optimization and Density-ReLU to sequentially backtrack the sparse real-valued weight filters, which will be sufficiently trained and reach their performance limits based on a controllable learning process. We obtain robust RBONNs, which show impressive performance over state-of-the-art BNNs on various models and datasets. Particularly, on the task of object detection, RBONNs have great generalization performance. Our code is open-sourced on https://github.com/SteveTsui/RBONN .
summary: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) show great promise for real-world embedded devices. As one of the critical steps to achieve a powerful BNN, the scale factor calculation plays an essential role in reducing the performance gap to their real-valued counterparts. However, existing BNNs neglect the intrinsic bilinear relationship of real-valued weights and scale factors, resulting in a sub-optimal model caused by an insufficient training process. To address this issue, Recurrent Bilinear Optimization is proposed to improve the learning process of BNNs (RBONNs) by associating the intrinsic bilinear variables in the back propagation process. Our work is the first attempt to optimize BNNs from the bilinear perspective. Specifically, we employ a recurrent optimization and Density-ReLU to sequentially backtrack the sparse real-valued weight filters, which will be sufficiently trained and reach their performance limits based on a controllable learning process. We obtain robust RBONNs, which show impressive performance over state-of-the-art BNNs on various models and datasets. Particularly, on the task of object detection, RBONNs have great generalization performance. Our code is open-sourced on https://github.com/SteveTsui/RBONN .
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络 (BNN) 在现实世界的嵌入式设备中展现出巨大的前景。作为实现强大 BNN 的关键步骤之一，比例因子计算在缩小与实际值对应物的性能差距方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，现有的 BNN 忽略了实值权重和尺度因子的内在双线性关系，导致训练过程不足而导致模型次优。为了解决这个问题，提出了循环双线性优化，通过关联反向传播过程中的内在双线性变量来改进 BNN（RBONN）的学习过程。我们的工作是从双线性角度优化 BNN 的首次尝试。具体来说，我们采用循环优化和 Density-ReLU 来顺序回溯稀疏实值权重滤波器，这些滤波器将得到充分的训练并基于可控的学习过程达到其性能极限。我们获得了稳健的 RBONN，在各种模型和数据集上，其表现优于最先进的 BNN。特别是在目标检测任务上，RBONN 具有很好的泛化性能。我们的代码在 https://github.com/SteveTsui/RBONN 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出递归双线性优化方法（RBONN），通过优化二值神经网络中的双线性关系提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有二值神经网络在计算缩放因子时忽略权重与缩放因子的双线性关系，导致训练不足和性能下降。
AI.method: 采用递归优化和Density-ReLU技术，在反向传播中关联双线性变量，逐步训练稀疏权重滤波器。
AI.result: 在多个模型和数据集上优于现有BNNs，尤其在目标检测任务中展现优异泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RBONN通过双线性视角优化BNN训练过程，显著提升模型性能，代码已开源。

However, existing BNNs neglect the intrinsic bilinear relationship of real-valued weights and scale factors, resulting in a sub-optimal model caused by an insufficient training process. authors_text: Tsu-Jui Fu,Linjie Li,Zhe Gan,Kevin Lin,William Yang Wang,Lijuan Wang,Zicheng Liu
title: An Empirical Study of End-to-End Video-Language Transformers with Masked Visual Modeling
title_zh: 具有屏蔽视觉建模的端到端视频语言转换器的实证研究
comment: CVPR'23; the first two authors contributed equally; code is available at https://github.com/tsujuifu/pytorch_empirical-mvm
comments: CVPR'23; the first two authors contributed equally; code is available at https://github.com/tsujuifu/pytorch_empirical-mvm
abstract: Masked visual modeling (MVM) has been recently proven effective for visual pre-training. While similar reconstructive objectives on video inputs (e.g., masked frame modeling) have been explored in video-language (VidL) pre-training, previous studies fail to find a truly effective MVM strategy that can largely benefit the downstream performance. In this work, we systematically examine the potential of MVM in the context of VidL learning. Specifically, we base our study on a fully end-to-end VIdeO-LanguagE Transformer (VIOLET), where the supervision from MVM training can be backpropagated to the video pixel space. In total, eight different reconstructive targets of MVM are explored, from low-level pixel values and oriented gradients to high-level depth maps, optical flow, discrete visual tokens, and latent visual features. We conduct comprehensive experiments and provide insights into the factors leading to effective MVM training, resulting in an enhanced model VIOLETv2. Empirically, we show VIOLETv2 pre-trained with MVM objective achieves notable improvements on 13 VidL benchmarks, ranging from video question answering, video captioning, to text-to-video retrieval.
summary: Masked visual modeling (MVM) has been recently proven effective for visual pre-training. While similar reconstructive objectives on video inputs (e.g., masked frame modeling) have been explored in video-language (VidL) pre-training, previous studies fail to find a truly effective MVM strategy that can largely benefit the downstream performance. In this work, we systematically examine the potential of MVM in the context of VidL learning. Specifically, we base our study on a fully end-to-end VIdeO-LanguagE Transformer (VIOLET), where the supervision from MVM training can be backpropagated to the video pixel space. In total, eight different reconstructive targets of MVM are explored, from low-level pixel values and oriented gradients to high-level depth maps, optical flow, discrete visual tokens, and latent visual features. We conduct comprehensive experiments and provide insights into the factors leading to effective MVM training, resulting in an enhanced model VIOLETv2. Empirically, we show VIOLETv2 pre-trained with MVM objective achieves notable improvements on 13 VidL benchmarks, ranging from video question answering, video captioning, to text-to-video retrieval.
abstract_zh: 最近被证明蒙蔽视觉建模（MVM）对于视觉预训练是有效的。虽然在视频语言 (VidL) 预训练中已经探索了类似的视频输入重建目标（例如，屏蔽帧建模），但之前的研究未能找到真正有效的 MVM 策略，该策略可以在很大程度上有利于下游性能。在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了 MVM 在 VidL 学习背景下的潜力。具体来说，我们的研究基于完全端到端的 VIdeO-LanguagE Transformer (VIOLET)，其中来自 MVM 训练的监督可以反向传播到视频像素空间。总共探索了 MVM 的八种不同的重建目标，从低级像素值和定向梯度到高级深度图、光流、离散视觉标记和潜在视觉特征。我们进行全面的实验，并深入了解导致有效 MVM 训练的因素，从而产生增强的模型 VIOLETv2。根据经验，我们表明使用 MVM 目标进行预训练的 VIOLETv2 在 13 个 VidL 基准上取得了显着改进，范围从视频问答、视频字幕到文本到视频检索。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了端到端视频-语言Transformer模型中Masked Visual Modeling（MVM）的有效性，通过探索不同重建目标优化预训练策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究尝试在视频-语言预训练中使用类似MVM方法，但尚未找到能显著提升下游任务性能的有效策略，因此需要系统分析MVM的潜力。
AI.method: 基于端到端VIOLET模型，探索八种MVM重建目标（如像素值、梯度、深度图、光流等），通过全面实验分析影响MVM训练效果的因素并改进模型。
AI.result: 改进后的VIOLETv2在13个视频-语言基准测试中表现显著提升，涵盖视频问答、字幕生成和文本到视频检索等任务。
AI.conclusion: 系统分析表明，合理设计的MVM策略能有效提升视频-语言模型性能，为后续研究提供了方法论和模型改进方向。

search_text: An Empirical Study of End-to-End Video-Language Transformers with Masked Visual Modeling 具有屏蔽视觉建模的端到端视频语言转换器的实证研究 Masked visual modeling (MVM) has been recently proven effective for visual pre-training. While similar reconstructive objectives on video inputs (e.g., masked frame modeling) have been explored in video-language (VidL) pre-training, previous studies fail to find a truly effective MVM strategy that can largely benefit the downstream performance. In this work, we systematically examine the potential of MVM in the context of VidL learning. Specifically, we base our study on a fully end-to-end VIdeO-LanguagE Transformer (VIOLET), where the supervision from MVM training can be backpropagated to the video pixel space. In total, eight different reconstructive targets of MVM are explored, from low-level pixel values and oriented gradients to high-level depth maps, optical flow, discrete visual tokens, and latent visual features. We conduct comprehensive experiments and provide insights into the factors leading to effective MVM training, resulting in an enhanced model VIOLETv2. Empirically, we show VIOLETv2 pre-trained with MVM objective achieves notable improvements on 13 VidL benchmarks, ranging from video question answering, video captioning, to text-to-video retrieval. 最近被证明蒙蔽视觉建模（MVM）对于视觉预训练是有效的。虽然在视频语言 (VidL) 预训练中已经探索了类似的视频输入重建目标（例如，屏蔽帧建模），但之前的研究未能找到真正有效的 MVM 策略，该策略可以在很大程度上有利于下游性能。在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了 MVM 在 VidL 学习背景下的潜力。具体来说，我们的研究基于完全端到端的 VIdeO-LanguagE Transformer (VIOLET)，其中来自 MVM 训练的监督可以反向传播到视频像素空间。总共探索了 MVM 的八种不同的重建目标，从低级像素值和定向梯度到高级深度图、光流、离散视觉标记和潜在视觉特征。我们进行全面的实验，并深入了解导致有效 MVM 训练的因素，从而产生增强的模型 VIOLETv2。根据经验，我们表明使用 MVM 目标进行预训练的 VIOLETv2 在 13 个 VidL 基准上取得了显着改进，范围从视频问答、视频字幕到文本到视频检索。 本文研究了端到端视频-语言Transformer模型中Masked Visual Modeling（MVM）的有效性，通过探索不同重建目标优化预训练策略。 Tsu-Jui Fu,Linjie Li,Zhe Gan,Kevin Lin,William Yang Wang,Lijuan Wang,Zicheng Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaqian Ren,Lei Jiang,Hao Peng,Lingjuan Lyu,Zhiwei Liu,Chaochao Chen,Jia Wu,Xu Bai,Philip S. Yu
title: Cross-Network Social User Embedding with Hybrid Differential Privacy Guarantees
title_zh: 具有混合差异隐私保证的跨网络社交用户嵌入
comment: accepted by CIKM22
comments: accepted by CIKM22
abstract: Integrating multiple online social networks (OSNs) has important implications for many downstream social mining tasks, such as user preference modelling, recommendation, and link prediction. However, it is unfortunately accompanied by growing privacy concerns about leaking sensitive user information. How to fully utilize the data from different online social networks while preserving user privacy remains largely unsolved. To this end, we propose a Cross-network Social User Embedding framework, namely DP-CroSUE, to learn the comprehensive representations of users in a privacy-preserving way. We jointly consider information from partially aligned social networks with differential privacy guarantees. In particular, for each heterogeneous social network, we first introduce a hybrid differential privacy notion to capture the variation of privacy expectations for heterogeneous data types. Next, to find user linkages across social networks, we make unsupervised user embedding-based alignment in which the user embeddings are achieved by the heterogeneous network embedding technology. To further enhance user embeddings, a novel cross-network GCN embedding model is designed to transfer knowledge across networks through those aligned users. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach makes a significant improvement on user interest prediction tasks as well as defending user attribute inference attacks from embedding.
summary: Integrating multiple online social networks (OSNs) has important implications for many downstream social mining tasks, such as user preference modelling, recommendation, and link prediction. However, it is unfortunately accompanied by growing privacy concerns about leaking sensitive user information. How to fully utilize the data from different online social networks while preserving user privacy remains largely unsolved. To this end, we propose a Cross-network Social User Embedding framework, namely DP-CroSUE, to learn the comprehensive representations of users in a privacy-preserving way. We jointly consider information from partially aligned social networks with differential privacy guarantees. In particular, for each heterogeneous social network, we first introduce a hybrid differential privacy notion to capture the variation of privacy expectations for heterogeneous data types. Next, to find user linkages across social networks, we make unsupervised user embedding-based alignment in which the user embeddings are achieved by the heterogeneous network embedding technology. To further enhance user embeddings, a novel cross-network GCN embedding model is designed to transfer knowledge across networks through those aligned users. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach makes a significant improvement on user interest prediction tasks as well as defending user attribute inference attacks from embedding.
abstract_zh: 集成多个在线社交网络（OSN）对于许多下游社交挖掘任务具有重要意义，例如用户偏好建模、推荐和链接预测。然而不幸的是，随之而来的是人们对泄露敏感用户信息的隐私担忧日益增加。如何充分利用来自不同在线社交网络的数据，同时保护用户隐私仍然很大程度上尚未解决。为此，我们提出了一种跨网络社交用户嵌入框架，即DP-CroSUE，以保护隐私的方式学习用户的综合表示。我们共同考虑来自部分对齐的社交网络的信息，并提供不同的隐私保证。特别是，对于每个异构社交网络，我们首先引入混合差分隐私概念来捕获异构数据类型的隐私期望的变化。接下来，为了找到跨社交网络的用户链接，我们进行基于无监督的用户嵌入的对齐，其中用户嵌入是通过异构网络嵌入技术实现的。为了进一步增强用户嵌入，设计了一种新颖的跨网络 GCN 嵌入模型，通过这些对齐的用户跨网络传输知识。对三个现实世界数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在用户兴趣预测任务以及防御嵌入的用户属性推断攻击方面取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DP-CroSUE的跨网络社交用户嵌入框架，在保护用户隐私的前提下整合多源社交网络数据以学习用户综合表示。
AI.motivation: 多社交网络数据整合可提升下游任务性能，但存在敏感信息泄露风险，现有方法难以兼顾数据利用与隐私保护。
AI.method: 引入混合差分隐私机制，结合异构网络嵌入技术与跨网络GCN模型，通过无监督用户嵌入对齐实现跨网络知识迁移。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上，该方法在用户兴趣预测任务中表现优于基线模型，且有效防御属性推断攻击。
AI.conclusion: DP-CroSUE通过隐私增强的跨网络嵌入方法，在保证数据效用的同时提供了更强的隐私保护，为社交网络分析提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DP-CroSUE的跨网络社交用户嵌入框架，在保护用户隐私的前提下整合多源社交网络数据以学习用户综合表示。

authors_text: Xin Mu,Ming Pang,Feida Zhu
title: Data Provenance via Differential Auditing
title_zh: 通过差异审计确定数据来源
abstract: Auditing Data Provenance (ADP), i.e., auditing if a certain piece of data has been used to train a machine learning model, is an important problem in data provenance. The feasibility of the task has been demonstrated by existing auditing techniques, e.g., shadow auditing methods, under certain conditions such as the availability of label information and the knowledge of training protocols for the target model. Unfortunately, both of these conditions are often unavailable in real applications. In this paper, we introduce Data Provenance via Differential Auditing (DPDA), a practical framework for auditing data provenance with a different approach based on statistically significant differentials, i.e., after carefully designed transformation, perturbed input data from the target model's training set would result in much more drastic changes in the output than those from the model's non-training set. This framework allows auditors to distinguish training data from non-training ones without the need of training any shadow models with the help of labeled output data. Furthermore, we propose two effective auditing function implementations, an additive one and a multiplicative one. We report evaluations on real-world data sets demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed auditing technique.
summary: Auditing Data Provenance (ADP), i.e., auditing if a certain piece of data has been used to train a machine learning model, is an important problem in data provenance. The feasibility of the task has been demonstrated by existing auditing techniques, e.g., shadow auditing methods, under certain conditions such as the availability of label information and the knowledge of training protocols for the target model. Unfortunately, both of these conditions are often unavailable in real applications. In this paper, we introduce Data Provenance via Differential Auditing (DPDA), a practical framework for auditing data provenance with a different approach based on statistically significant differentials, i.e., after carefully designed transformation, perturbed input data from the target model's training set would result in much more drastic changes in the output than those from the model's non-training set. This framework allows auditors to distinguish training data from non-training ones without the need of training any shadow models with the help of labeled output data. Furthermore, we propose two effective auditing function implementations, an additive one and a multiplicative one. We report evaluations on real-world data sets demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed auditing technique.
abstract_zh: 审核数据来源（ADP），即审核某条数据是否已用于训练机器学习模型，是数据来源中的一个重要问题。在某些条件下，例如标签信息的可用性和目标模型的训练协议的知识，现有的审计技术（例如影子审计方法）证明了该任务的可行性。不幸的是，这两个条件在实际应用中通常都不可用。在本文中，我们介绍了通过差异审计的数据来源（DPDA），这是一种基于统计显着差异的不同方法来审计数据来源的实用框架，即，经过精心设计的转换后，来自目标模型训练集的扰动输入数据将导致输出比来自模型非训练集的输出发生更剧烈的变化。该框架允许审计人员区分训练数据和非训练数据，而无需借助标记的输出数据来训练任何影子模型。此外，我们提出了两种有效的审计功能实现，一种是加法，一种是乘法。我们报告对现实世界数据集的评估，证明我们提出的审计技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DPDA的数据溯源框架，通过统计显著差异检测数据是否被用于训练机器学习模型，无需依赖标签信息或训练协议知识。
AI.motivation: 现有溯源技术（如影子审计）依赖标签信息和训练协议知识，但这些条件在实际应用中常不可用，需开发更实用的解决方案。
AI.method: DPDA通过精心设计的数据转换，使训练集中的扰动输入在模型输出中产生显著变化，利用加性与乘性审计函数区分训练数据与非训练数据。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的评估验证了该方法的有效性，能够准确识别训练数据。

search_text: Data Provenance via Differential Auditing 通过差异审计确定数据来源 Auditing Data Provenance (ADP), i.e., auditing if a certain piece of data has been used to train a machine learning model, is an important problem in data provenance. The feasibility of the task has been demonstrated by existing auditing techniques, e.g., shadow auditing methods, under certain conditions such as the availability of label information and the knowledge of training protocols for the target model. Unfortunately, both of these conditions are often unavailable in real applications. In this paper, we introduce Data Provenance via Differential Auditing (DPDA), a practical framework for auditing data provenance with a different approach based on statistically significant differentials, i.e., after carefully designed transformation, perturbed input data from the target model's training set would result in much more drastic changes in the output than those from the model's non-training set. This framework allows auditors to distinguish training data from non-training ones without the need of training any shadow models with the help of labeled output data. Furthermore, we propose two effective auditing function implementations, an additive one and a multiplicative one. We report evaluations on real-world data sets demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed auditing technique. 审核数据来源（ADP），即审核某条数据是否已用于训练机器学习模型，是数据来源中的一个重要问题。在某些条件下，例如标签信息的可用性和目标模型的训练协议的知识，现有的审计技术（例如影子审计方法）证明了该任务的可行性。不幸的是，这两个条件在实际应用中通常都不可用。在本文中，我们介绍了通过差异审计的数据来源（DPDA），这是一种基于统计显着差异的不同方法来审计数据来源的实用框架，即，经过精心设计的转换后，来自目标模型训练集的扰动输入数据将导致输出比来自模型非训练集的输出发生更剧烈的变化。该框架允许审计人员区分训练数据和非训练数据，而无需借助标记的输出数据来训练任何影子模型。此外，我们提出了两种有效的审计功能实现，一种是加法，一种是乘法。我们报告对现实世界数据集的评估，证明我们提出的审计技术的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为DPDA的数据溯源框架，通过统计显著差异检测数据是否被用于训练机器学习模型，无需依赖标签信息或训练协议知识。 Xin Mu,Ming Pang,Feida Zhu cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.DB,cs.LG

authors_text: Kazi Ashik Islam,Da Qi Chen,Madhav Marathe,Henning Mortveit,Samarth Swarup,Anil Vullikanti
title: Simulation-Assisted Optimization for Large-Scale Evacuation Planning with Congestion-Dependent Delays
title_zh: 具有拥塞相关延迟的大规模疏散规划的仿真辅助优化
abstract: Evacuation planning is a crucial part of disaster management. However, joint optimization of its two essential components, routing and scheduling, with objectives such as minimizing average evacuation time or evacuation completion time, is a computationally hard problem. To approach it, we present MIP-LNS, a scalable optimization method that utilizes heuristic search with mathematical optimization and can optimize a variety of objective functions. We also present the method MIP-LNS-SIM, where we combine agent-based simulation with MIP-LNS to estimate delays due to congestion, as well as, find optimized plans considering such delays. We use Harris County in Houston, Texas, as our study area. We show that, within a given time limit, MIP-LNS finds better solutions than existing methods in terms of three different metrics. However, when congestion dependent delay is considered, MIP-LNS-SIM outperforms MIP-LNS in multiple performance metrics. In addition, MIP-LNS-SIM has a significantly lower percent error in estimated evacuation completion time compared to MIP-LNS.
summary: Evacuation planning is a crucial part of disaster management. However, joint optimization of its two essential components, routing and scheduling, with objectives such as minimizing average evacuation time or evacuation completion time, is a computationally hard problem. To approach it, we present MIP-LNS, a scalable optimization method that utilizes heuristic search with mathematical optimization and can optimize a variety of objective functions. We also present the method MIP-LNS-SIM, where we combine agent-based simulation with MIP-LNS to estimate delays due to congestion, as well as, find optimized plans considering such delays. We use Harris County in Houston, Texas, as our study area. We show that, within a given time limit, MIP-LNS finds better solutions than existing methods in terms of three different metrics. However, when congestion dependent delay is considered, MIP-LNS-SIM outperforms MIP-LNS in multiple performance metrics. In addition, MIP-LNS-SIM has a significantly lower percent error in estimated evacuation completion time compared to MIP-LNS.
abstract_zh: 疏散计划是灾害管理的重要组成部分。然而，以最小化平均疏散时间或疏散完成时间等为目标，对其两个基本组成部分（路线和调度）进行联合优化是一个计算难题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 MIP-LNS，这是一种可扩展的优化方法，利用启发式搜索和数学优化，可以优化各种目标函数。我们还提出了 MIP-LNS-SIM 方法，其中我们将基于代理的模拟与 MIP-LNS 相结合，以估计由于拥塞导致的延迟，并找到考虑到此类延迟的优化计划。我们使用德克萨斯州休斯顿的哈里斯县作为我们的研究区域。我们表明，在给定的时间限制内，MIP-LNS 在三个不同的指标方面找到了比现有方法更好的解决方案。然而，当考虑拥塞相关延迟时，MIP-LNS-SIM 在多个性能指标上优于 MIP-LNS。此外，与 MIP-LNS 相比，MIP-LNS-SIM 在估计疏散完成时间方面的百分比误差显着较低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合模拟的优化方法，解决大规模疏散规划中因拥堵导致的延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 疏散规划需同时优化路由与调度，但现有方法难以处理拥堵延迟带来的计算复杂性，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 开发MIP-LNS和MIP-LNS-SIM方法，后者通过代理模拟估算拥堵延迟并优化疏散方案。
AI.result: MIP-LNS在三个指标上优于现有方法，而MIP-LNS-SIM在拥堵场景下多指标表现更优且时间估计误差更低。
AI.conclusion: MIP-LNS-SIM能有效处理拥堵延迟，提升大规模疏散规划的准确性与实用性。

authors_text: Wisdom Oluchi Ikezogwo,Mehmet Saygin Seyfioglu,Linda Shapiro
title: Multi-modal Masked Autoencoders Learn Compositional Histopathological Representations
title_zh: 多模态掩蔽自动编码器学习成分组织病理学表示
comment: Extended Abstract presented at Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) symposium 2022, November 28th, 2022, New Orleans, United States & Virtual, http://www.ml4h.cc, 10 pages
comments: Extended Abstract presented at Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) symposium 2022, November 28th, 2022, New Orleans, United States & Virtual, http://www.ml4h.cc, 10 pages
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) enables learning useful inductive biases through utilizing pretext tasks that require no labels. The unlabeled nature of SSL makes it especially important for whole slide histopathological images (WSIs), where patch-level human annotation is difficult. Masked Autoencoders (MAE) is a recent SSL method suitable for digital pathology as it does not require negative sampling and requires little to no data augmentations. However, the domain shift between natural images and digital pathology images requires further research in designing MAE for patch-level WSIs. In this paper, we investigate several design choices for MAE in histopathology. Furthermore, we introduce a multi-modal MAE (MMAE) that leverages the specific compositionality of Hematoxylin & Eosin (H&E) stained WSIs. We performed our experiments on the public patch-level dataset NCT-CRC-HE-100K. The results show that the MMAE architecture outperforms supervised baselines and other state-of-the-art SSL techniques for an eight-class tissue phenotyping task, utilizing only 100 labeled samples for fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/wisdomikezogwo/MMAE_Pathology
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) enables learning useful inductive biases through utilizing pretext tasks that require no labels. The unlabeled nature of SSL makes it especially important for whole slide histopathological images (WSIs), where patch-level human annotation is difficult. Masked Autoencoders (MAE) is a recent SSL method suitable for digital pathology as it does not require negative sampling and requires little to no data augmentations. However, the domain shift between natural images and digital pathology images requires further research in designing MAE for patch-level WSIs. In this paper, we investigate several design choices for MAE in histopathology. Furthermore, we introduce a multi-modal MAE (MMAE) that leverages the specific compositionality of Hematoxylin & Eosin (H&E) stained WSIs. We performed our experiments on the public patch-level dataset NCT-CRC-HE-100K. The results show that the MMAE architecture outperforms supervised baselines and other state-of-the-art SSL techniques for an eight-class tissue phenotyping task, utilizing only 100 labeled samples for fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/wisdomikezogwo/MMAE_Pathology
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 可以通过利用不需要标签的借口任务来学习有用的归纳偏差。 SSL 的未标记性质使其对于整个幻灯片组织病理学图像 (WSI) 尤为重要，因为在该图像中进行补丁级人类注释很困难。掩码自动编码器 (MAE) 是一种适合数字病理学的最新 SSL 方法，因为它不需要负采样，并且几乎不需要数据增强。然而，自然图像和数字病理图像之间的领域转移需要进一步研究为补丁级 WSI 设计 MAE。在本文中，我们研究了组织病理学中 MAE 的几种设计选择。此外，我们引入了一种多模式 MAE (MMAE)，它利用了苏木精和曙红 (H&E) 染色的 WSI 的特定组成。我们在公共补丁级数据集 NCT-CRC-HE-100K 上进行了实验。结果表明，对于八类组织表型分析任务，MMAE 架构优于监督基线和其他最先进的 SSL 技术，仅利用 100 个标记样本进行微调。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/wisdomikezogwo/MMAE_Pathology

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态掩码自编码器（MMAE），用于学习组分化组织病理学表征，以改进无标签病理图像的表示学习。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学图像（WSI）的标注成本高昂且困难，而自监督学习（SSL）无需标注数据。现有MAE方法在自然图像与病理图像间存在领域偏移，需针对病理图像特性优化设计。
AI.method: 设计针对H&E染色WSI的多模态MAE架构，利用其组分化特性，通过掩码重建任务学习表征，并在NCT-CRC-HE-100K数据集上验证。
AI.result: MMAE在仅使用100个标注样本微调的情况下，优于监督基线和其他SSL方法，在八分类组织表型任务中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: MMAE通过多模态设计有效捕捉病理图像的组分化特征，为低标注成本下的病理图像分析提供了高效且有效的自监督学习方案。

Masked Autoencoders (MAE) is a recent SSL method suitable for digital pathology as it does not require negative sampling and requires little to no data augmentations. However, the domain shift between natural images and digital pathology images requires further research in designing MAE for patch-level WSIs. In this paper, we investigate several design choices for MAE in histopathology. Furthermore, we introduce a multi-modal MAE (MMAE) that leverages the specific compositionality of Hematoxylin & Eosin (H&E) stained WSIs. We performed our experiments on the public patch-level dataset NCT-CRC-HE-100K. The results show that the MMAE architecture outperforms supervised baselines and other state-of-the-art SSL techniques for an eight-class tissue phenotyping task, utilizing only 100 labeled samples for fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/wisdomikezogwo/MMAE_Pathology 自监督学习 (SSL) 可以通过利用不需要标签的借口任务来学习有用的归纳偏差。 SSL 的未标记性质使其对于整个幻灯片组织病理学图像 (WSI) 尤为重要，因为在该图像中进行补丁级人类注释很困难。掩码自动编码器 (MAE) 是一种适合数字病理学的最新 SSL 方法，因为它不需要负采样，并且几乎不需要数据增强。然而，自然图像和数字病理图像之间的领域转移需要进一步研究为补丁级 WSI 设计 MAE。在本文中，我们研究了组织病理学中 MAE 的几种设计选择。此外，我们引入了一种多模式 MAE (MMAE)，它利用了苏木精和曙红 (H&E) 染色的 WSI 的特定组成。我们在公共补丁级数据集 NCT-CRC-HE-100K 上进行了实验。结果表明，对于八类组织表型分析任务，MMAE 架构优于监督基线和其他最先进的 SSL 技术，仅利用 100 个标记样本进行微调。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/wisdomikezogwo/MMAE_Pathology 本文提出了一种多模态掩码自编码器（MMAE），用于学习组分化组织病理学表征，以改进无标签病理图像的表示学习。 Wisdom Oluchi Ikezogwo,Mehmet Saygin Seyfioglu,Linda Shapiro cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Suraj Mishra,Yizhe Zhang,Li Zhang,Tianyu Zhang,X. Sharon Hu,Danny Z. Chen
title: Data-Driven Deep Supervision for Skin Lesion Classification
title_zh: 数据驱动的皮肤病变分类深度监督
comment: MICCAI 2022
comments: MICCAI 2022
abstract: Automatic classification of pigmented, non-pigmented, and depigmented non-melanocytic skin lesions have garnered lots of attention in recent years. However, imaging variations in skin texture, lesion shape, depigmentation contrast, lighting condition, etc. hinder robust feature extraction, affecting classification accuracy. In this paper, we propose a new deep neural network that exploits input data for robust feature extraction. Specifically, we analyze the convolutional network's behavior (field-of-view) to find the location of deep supervision for improved feature extraction. To achieve this, first, we perform activation mapping to generate an object mask, highlighting the input regions most critical for classification output generation. Then the network layer whose layer-wise effective receptive field matches the approximated object shape in the object mask is selected as our focus for deep supervision. Utilizing different types of convolutional feature extractors and classifiers on three melanoma detection datasets and two vitiligo detection datasets, we verify the effectiveness of our new method.
summary: Automatic classification of pigmented, non-pigmented, and depigmented non-melanocytic skin lesions have garnered lots of attention in recent years. However, imaging variations in skin texture, lesion shape, depigmentation contrast, lighting condition, etc. hinder robust feature extraction, affecting classification accuracy. In this paper, we propose a new deep neural network that exploits input data for robust feature extraction. Specifically, we analyze the convolutional network's behavior (field-of-view) to find the location of deep supervision for improved feature extraction. To achieve this, first, we perform activation mapping to generate an object mask, highlighting the input regions most critical for classification output generation. Then the network layer whose layer-wise effective receptive field matches the approximated object shape in the object mask is selected as our focus for deep supervision. Utilizing different types of convolutional feature extractors and classifiers on three melanoma detection datasets and two vitiligo detection datasets, we verify the effectiveness of our new method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，色素沉着、非色素沉着和脱色非黑素细胞皮肤病变的自动分类引起了广泛关注。然而，皮肤纹理、病变形状、脱色对比度、照明条件等的成像变化阻碍了鲁棒的特征提取，影响了分类精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的深度神经网络，它利用输入数据进行鲁棒的特征提取。具体来说，我们分析卷积网络的行为（视场），以找到深度监督的位置，以改进特征提取。为了实现这一目标，首先，我们执行激活映射来生成对象掩模，突出显示对于分类输出生成最关键的输入区域。然后，选择逐层有效感受野与对象掩模中的近似对象形状相匹配的网络层作为深度监督的焦点。我们在三个黑色素瘤检测数据集和两个白癜风检测数据集上利用不同类型的卷积特征提取器和分类器，验证了新方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的深度监督方法，用于改进皮肤病变分类的特征提取。
AI.motivation: 由于皮肤纹理、病变形状、褪色对比度、光照条件等成像变化，使得皮肤病变分类的特征提取变得困难，影响分类准确性。
AI.method: 通过分析卷积网络的行为（视野），找到用于深度监督的最佳位置以改进特征提取。首先使用激活映射生成对象掩码，突出显示对分类输出最重要的输入区域，然后选择与对象掩码中近似对象形状匹配的网络层进行深度监督。
AI.result: 在三个黑色素瘤检测数据集和两个白癜风检测数据集上，使用不同类型的卷积特征提取器和分类器验证了新方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据驱动的深度监督提升了特征提取的鲁棒性，从而提高了皮肤病变分类的准确性。

authors_text: Tianling Liu,Wennan Liu,Lequan Yu,Liang Wan,Tong Han,Lei Zhu
title: Joint Prediction of Meningioma Grade and Brain Invasion via Task-Aware Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过任务感知对比学习联合预测脑膜瘤分级和脑侵袭
comment: Accepted by MICCAI2022
comments: Accepted by MICCAI2022
abstract: Preoperative and noninvasive prediction of the meningioma grade is important in clinical practice, as it directly influences the clinical decision making. What's more, brain invasion in meningioma (i.e., the presence of tumor tissue within the adjacent brain tissue) is an independent criterion for the grading of meningioma and influences the treatment strategy. Although efforts have been reported to address these two tasks, most of them rely on hand-crafted features and there is no attempt to exploit the two prediction tasks simultaneously. In this paper, we propose a novel task-aware contrastive learning algorithm to jointly predict meningioma grade and brain invasion from multi-modal MRIs. Based on the basic multi-task learning framework, our key idea is to adopt contrastive learning strategy to disentangle the image features into task-specific features and task-common features, and explicitly leverage their inherent connections to improve feature representation for the two prediction tasks. In this retrospective study, an MRI dataset was collected, for which 800 patients (containing 148 high-grade, 62 invasion) were diagnosed with meningioma by pathological analysis. Experimental results show that the proposed algorithm outperforms alternative multi-task learning methods, achieving AUCs of 0:8870 and 0:9787 for the prediction of meningioma grade and brain invasion, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/IsDling/predictTCL.
summary: Preoperative and noninvasive prediction of the meningioma grade is important in clinical practice, as it directly influences the clinical decision making. What's more, brain invasion in meningioma (i.e., the presence of tumor tissue within the adjacent brain tissue) is an independent criterion for the grading of meningioma and influences the treatment strategy. Although efforts have been reported to address these two tasks, most of them rely on hand-crafted features and there is no attempt to exploit the two prediction tasks simultaneously. In this paper, we propose a novel task-aware contrastive learning algorithm to jointly predict meningioma grade and brain invasion from multi-modal MRIs. Based on the basic multi-task learning framework, our key idea is to adopt contrastive learning strategy to disentangle the image features into task-specific features and task-common features, and explicitly leverage their inherent connections to improve feature representation for the two prediction tasks. In this retrospective study, an MRI dataset was collected, for which 800 patients (containing 148 high-grade, 62 invasion) were diagnosed with meningioma by pathological analysis. Experimental results show that the proposed algorithm outperforms alternative multi-task learning methods, achieving AUCs of 0:8870 and 0:9787 for the prediction of meningioma grade and brain invasion, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/IsDling/predictTCL.
abstract_zh: 术前和无创预测脑膜瘤分级在临床实践中非常重要，因为它直接影响临床决策。此外，脑膜瘤的脑部侵犯（即邻近脑组织内存在肿瘤组织）是脑膜瘤分级的独立标准，并影响治疗策略。尽管已经报道了解决这两个任务的努力，但大多数都依赖于手工制作的特征，并且没有尝试同时利用这两个预测任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的任务感知对比学习算法，可以通过多模态 MRI 联合预测脑膜瘤分级和脑侵袭。基于基本的多任务学习框架，我们的关键思想是采用对比学习策略将图像特征分解为特定于任务的特征和任务通用的特征，并明确地利用它们的内在联系来改进两个预测任务的特征表示。本回顾性研究收集了 800 例患者（其中高级别 148 例，侵袭 62 例）的 MRI 数据集，经病理分析诊断为脑膜瘤。实验结果表明，所提出的算法优于替代的多任务学习方法，在预测脑膜瘤分级和脑侵袭方面分别实现了 0:8870 和 0:9787 的 AUC。该代码可在 https://github.com/IsDling/predictTCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务感知对比学习的算法，用于联合预测脑膜瘤分级和脑侵犯情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多依赖手工特征且未同时处理两个任务，而脑膜瘤分级与脑侵犯预测对临床决策至关重要，需更有效的特征学习方法。
AI.method: 在多任务学习框架下，采用对比学习策略分离图像特征为任务特异性特征与共性特征，并利用其内在联系提升特征表示能力。
AI.result: 在800例患者的MRI数据集上，算法实现脑膜瘤分级AUC 0.8870和脑侵犯预测AUC 0.9787，优于其他多任务方法。
AI.conclusion: 任务感知对比学习能有效融合多任务特征，提升预测性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Sean Trott,Cameron Jones,Tyler Chang,James Michaelov,Benjamin Bergen
title: Do Large Language Models know what humans know?
title_zh: 大型语言模型知道人类知道的事情吗？
abstract: Humans can attribute beliefs to others. However, it is unknown to what extent this ability results from an innate biological endowment or from experience accrued through child development, particularly exposure to language describing others' mental states. We test the viability of the language exposure hypothesis by assessing whether models exposed to large quantities of human language display sensitivity to the implied knowledge states of characters in written passages. In pre-registered analyses, we present a linguistic version of the False Belief Task to both human participants and a Large Language Model, GPT-3. Both are sensitive to others' beliefs, but while the language model significantly exceeds chance behavior, it does not perform as well as the humans, nor does it explain the full extent of their behavior -- despite being exposed to more language than a human would in a lifetime. This suggests that while statistical learning from language exposure may in part explain how humans develop the ability to reason about the mental states of others, other mechanisms are also responsible.
summary: Humans can attribute beliefs to others. However, it is unknown to what extent this ability results from an innate biological endowment or from experience accrued through child development, particularly exposure to language describing others' mental states. We test the viability of the language exposure hypothesis by assessing whether models exposed to large quantities of human language display sensitivity to the implied knowledge states of characters in written passages. In pre-registered analyses, we present a linguistic version of the False Belief Task to both human participants and a Large Language Model, GPT-3. Both are sensitive to others' beliefs, but while the language model significantly exceeds chance behavior, it does not perform as well as the humans, nor does it explain the full extent of their behavior -- despite being exposed to more language than a human would in a lifetime. This suggests that while statistical learning from language exposure may in part explain how humans develop the ability to reason about the mental states of others, other mechanisms are also responsible.
abstract_zh: 人类可以将信念归因于他人。然而，尚不清楚这种能力在多大程度上是由于先天的生物禀赋或通过儿童发展积累的经验，特别是接触描述他人心理状态的语言。我们通过评估暴露于大量人类语言的模型是否对书面段落中的字符隐含知识状态表现出敏感性来测试语言暴露假设的可行性。在预先注册的分析中，我们向人类参与者和大型语言模型 GPT-3 呈现错误信念任务的语言版本。两者都对其他人的信念很敏感，但是虽然语言模型显着超过了偶然行为，但它的表现不如人类，也无法解释人类行为的全部范围——尽管接触的语言比人类一生中接触的语言还要多。这表明，虽然从语言接触中进行的统计学习可能部分解释了人类如何发展推理他人心理状态的能力，但其他机制也负有责任。

AI.tldr: 论文测试大型语言模型（如GPT-3）是否能像人类一样理解他人心理状态，并探究这种能力是否源于语言经验。
AI.motivation: 人类归因他人信念的能力可能源于天生机制或语言经验，研究旨在验证语言暴露假说，即大量语言数据是否能解释此类能力的发展。
AI.method: 通过设计语言版本的错误信念任务，对人类参与者和GPT-3模型进行预注册分析，比较两者对他人心理状态的敏感性。
AI.result: 模型表现优于随机水平，但未达人类水平，且无法完全解释人类行为，尽管其语言数据量远超人类一生接触量。
AI.conclusion: 语言学习可能部分解释人类心理理论能力，但其他机制（如生物本能或社会互动）也起关键作用。

However, it is unknown to what extent this ability results from an innate biological endowment or from experience accrued through child development, particularly exposure to language describing others' mental states. Both are sensitive to others' beliefs, but while the language model significantly exceeds chance behavior, it does not perform as well as the humans, nor does it explain the full extent of their behavior -- despite being exposed to more language than a human would in a lifetime. authors_text: Kourosh Shahnazari,Seyed Moein Ayyoubzadeh
title: A Novel Nearest Neighbors Algorithm Based on Power Muirhead Mean
title_zh: 一种基于幂Muirhead均值的最近邻算法
abstract: This paper introduces the innovative Power Muirhead Mean K-Nearest Neighbors (PMM-KNN) algorithm, a novel data classification approach that combines the K-Nearest Neighbors method with the adaptive Power Muirhead Mean operator. The proposed methodology aims to address the limitations of traditional KNN by leveraging the Power Muirhead Mean for calculating the local means of K-nearest neighbors in each class to the query sample. Extensive experimentation on diverse benchmark datasets demonstrates the superiority of PMM-KNN over other classification methods. Results indicate statistically significant improvements in accuracy on various datasets, particularly those with complex and high-dimensional distributions. The adaptability of the Power Muirhead Mean empowers PMM-KNN to effectively capture underlying data structures, leading to enhanced accuracy and robustness. The findings highlight the potential of PMM-KNN as a powerful and versatile tool for data classification tasks, encouraging further research to explore its application in real-world scenarios and the automation of Power Muirhead Mean parameters to unleash its full potential.
summary: This paper introduces the innovative Power Muirhead Mean K-Nearest Neighbors (PMM-KNN) algorithm, a novel data classification approach that combines the K-Nearest Neighbors method with the adaptive Power Muirhead Mean operator. The proposed methodology aims to address the limitations of traditional KNN by leveraging the Power Muirhead Mean for calculating the local means of K-nearest neighbors in each class to the query sample. Extensive experimentation on diverse benchmark datasets demonstrates the superiority of PMM-KNN over other classification methods. Results indicate statistically significant improvements in accuracy on various datasets, particularly those with complex and high-dimensional distributions. The adaptability of the Power Muirhead Mean empowers PMM-KNN to effectively capture underlying data structures, leading to enhanced accuracy and robustness. The findings highlight the potential of PMM-KNN as a powerful and versatile tool for data classification tasks, encouraging further research to explore its application in real-world scenarios and the automation of Power Muirhead Mean parameters to unleash its full potential.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了创新的 Power Muirhead Mean K-Nearest Neighbors (PMM-KNN) 算法，这是一种新颖的数据分类方法，它将 K-Nearest Neighbors 方法与自适应 Power Muirhead Mean 算子相结合。所提出的方法旨在通过利用 Power Muirhead 均值来计算每个类中 K 最近邻对查询样本的局部均值，从而解决传统 KNN 的局限性。对不同基准数据集的广泛实验证明了 PMM-KNN 相对于其他分类方法的优越性。结果表明，各种数据集的准确性在统计上显着提高，特别是那些具有复杂和高维分布的数据集。 Power Muirhead 均值的适应性使 PMM-KNN 能够有效捕获底层数据结构，从而提高准确性和鲁棒性。研究结果凸显了 PMM-KNN 作为数据分类任务的强大多功能工具的潜力，鼓励进一步研究探索其在现实场景中的应用以及 Power Muirhead 均值参数的自动化以释放其全部潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Power Muirhead均值的新型K近邻分类算法（PMM-KNN），通过改进传统KNN的局部均值计算方式提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统KNN算法在处理高维复杂数据时存在分类精度下降、鲁棒性不足的问题，需通过改进局部均值计算方法增强模型适应性。
AI.method: 将自适应Power Muirhead Mean算子融入KNN框架，通过计算查询样本在各分类中的K近邻局部均值，优化分类决策过程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集实验中，PMM-KNN相较其他方法实现统计显著的准确率提升，尤其在高维复杂分布数据上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PMM-KNN展现出处理复杂数据的潜力，未来需探索其在实际场景的应用及参数自动化优化方法以释放更大价值。

authors_text: Dominik Klein
title: Neural Networks for Chess
title_zh: 国际象棋神经网络
abstract: AlphaZero, Leela Chess Zero and Stockfish NNUE revolutionized Computer Chess. This book gives a complete introduction into the technical inner workings of such engines. The book is split into four main chapters -- excluding chapter 1 (introduction) and chapter 6 (conclusion): Chapter 2 introduces neural networks and covers all the basic building blocks that are used to build deep networks such as those used by AlphaZero. Contents include the perceptron, back-propagation and gradient descent, classification, regression, multilayer perceptron, vectorization techniques, convolutional networks, squeeze and excitation networks, fully connected networks, batch normalization and rectified linear units, residual layers, overfitting and underfitting. Chapter 3 introduces classical search techniques used for chess engines as well as those used by AlphaZero. Contents include minimax, alpha-beta search, and Monte Carlo tree search. Chapter 4 shows how modern chess engines are designed. Aside from the ground-breaking AlphaGo, AlphaGo Zero and AlphaZero we cover Leela Chess Zero, Fat Fritz, Fat Fritz 2 and Efficiently Updatable Neural Networks (NNUE) as well as Maia. Chapter 5 is about implementing a miniaturized AlphaZero. Hexapawn, a minimalistic version of chess, is used as an example for that. Hexapawn is solved by minimax search and training positions for supervised learning are generated. Then as a comparison, an AlphaZero-like training loop is implemented where training is done via self-play combined with reinforcement learning. Finally, AlphaZero-like training and supervised training are compared.

Chapter 4 shows how modern chess engines are designed. abstract_zh: AlphaZero、Leela Chess Zero 和 Stockfish NNUE 彻底改变了计算机国际象棋。本书完整介绍了此类发动机的技术内部工作原理。本书分为四个主要章节——不包括第 1 章（简介）和第 6 章（结论）：第 2 章介绍神经网络并涵盖用于构建深度网络（例如 AlphaZero 使用的那些）的所有基本构建块。内容包括感知器、反向传播和梯度下降、分类、回归、多层感知器、矢量化技术、卷积网络、挤压和激励网络、全连接网络、批量归一化和修正线性单元、残差层、过拟合和欠拟合。第 3 章介绍了用于国际象棋引擎以及 AlphaZero 使用的经典搜索技术。内容包括极小极大、α-β搜索和蒙特卡罗树搜索。第 4 章展示了现代国际象棋引擎的设计方式。除了突破性的 AlphaGo、AlphaGo Zero 和 AlphaZero 之外，我们还涵盖了 Leela Chess Zero、Fat Fritz、Fat Fritz 2 和高效可更新神经网络 (NNUE) 以及 Maia。第 5 章是关于实现小型化 AlphaZero。 Hexapawn（国际象棋的简约版本）被用作示例。 Hexapawn 通过极小极大搜索求解，并生成监督学习的训练位置。然后作为比较，实现了类似 AlphaZero 的训练循环，其中通过自我对弈与强化学习相结合来完成训练。最后，对类AlphaZero训练和监督训练进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文系统介绍了基于神经网络的国际象棋引擎技术，涵盖神经网络基础、搜索算法、现代引擎设计及AlphaZero实现案例。
AI.motivation: AlphaZero等引擎革新了计算机国际象棋领域，需系统性解析其技术原理以促进相关研究与应用。
AI.method: 分四章展开：神经网络构建（含CNN、残差网络等）、经典搜索算法（Minimax、蒙特卡洛树搜索）、现代引擎案例分析、Hexapawn简化模型实现与训练对比。
AI.result: 提供从理论到实践的完整知识体系，通过Hexapawn验证监督学习与强化学习效果差异，阐明神经网络与搜索算法的融合优势。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络与高效搜索算法的结合显著提升棋类AI性能，微型化实验验证了AlphaZero方法的可行性与有效性。

search_text: Neural Networks for Chess 国际象棋神经网络 AlphaZero, Leela Chess Zero and Stockfish NNUE revolutionized Computer Chess. This book gives a complete introduction into the technical inner workings of such engines. The book is split into four main chapters -- excluding chapter 1 (introduction) and chapter 6 (conclusion): Chapter 2 introduces neural networks and covers all the basic building blocks that are used to build deep networks such as those used by AlphaZero. Contents include the perceptron, back-propagation and gradient descent, classification, regression, multilayer perceptron, vectorization techniques, convolutional networks, squeeze and excitation networks, fully connected networks, batch normalization and rectified linear units, residual layers, overfitting and underfitting. Chapter 3 introduces classical search techniques used for chess engines as well as those used by AlphaZero. Contents include minimax, alpha-beta search, and Monte Carlo tree search. Chapter 4 shows how modern chess engines are designed. Aside from the ground-breaking AlphaGo, AlphaGo Zero and AlphaZero we cover Leela Chess Zero, Fat Fritz, Fat Fritz 2 and Efficiently Updatable Neural Networks (NNUE) as well as Maia. Chapter 5 is about implementing a miniaturized AlphaZero. Hexapawn, a minimalistic version of chess, is used as an example for that. Hexapawn is solved by minimax search and training positions for supervised learning are generated. Then as a comparison, an AlphaZero-like training loop is implemented where training is done via self-play combined with reinforcement learning. Finally, AlphaZero-like training and supervised training are compared. AlphaZero、Leela Chess Zero 和 Stockfish NNUE 彻底改变了计算机国际象棋。本书完整介绍了此类发动机的技术内部工作原理。本书分为四个主要章节——不包括第 1 章（简介）和第 6 章（结论）：第 2 章介绍神经网络并涵盖用于构建深度网络（例如 AlphaZero 使用的那些）的所有基本构建块。内容包括感知器、反向传播和梯度下降、分类、回归、多层感知器、矢量化技术、卷积网络、挤压和激励网络、全连接网络、批量归一化和修正线性单元、残差层、过拟合和欠拟合。第 3 章介绍了用于国际象棋引擎以及 AlphaZero 使用的经典搜索技术。内容包括极小极大、α-β搜索和蒙特卡罗树搜索。第 4 章展示了现代国际象棋引擎的设计方式。除了突破性的 AlphaGo、AlphaGo Zero 和 AlphaZero 之外，我们还涵盖了 Leela Chess Zero、Fat Fritz、Fat Fritz 2 和高效可更新神经网络 (NNUE) 以及 Maia。第 5 章是关于实现小型化 AlphaZero。 Hexapawn（国际象棋的简约版本）被用作示例。 Hexapawn 通过极小极大搜索求解，并生成监督学习的训练位置。然后作为比较，实现了类似 AlphaZero 的训练循环，其中通过自我对弈与强化学习相结合来完成训练。最后，对类AlphaZero训练和监督训练进行了比较。 本文系统介绍了基于神经网络的国际象棋引擎技术，涵盖神经网络基础、搜索算法、现代引擎设计及AlphaZero实现案例。 Dominik Klein cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhenyi Wang,Li Shen,Le Fang,Qiuling Suo,Donglin Zhan,Tiehang Duan,Mingchen Gao
title: Meta-Learning with Less Forgetting on Large-Scale Non-Stationary Task Distributions
title_zh: 大规模非平稳任务分布上遗忘较少的元学习
comment: ECCV 2022
comments: ECCV 2022
abstract: The paradigm of machine intelligence moves from purely supervised learning to a more practical scenario when many loosely related unlabeled data are available and labeled data is scarce. Most existing algorithms assume that the underlying task distribution is stationary. Here we consider a more realistic and challenging setting in that task distributions evolve over time. We name this problem as Semi-supervised meta-learning with Evolving Task diStributions, abbreviated as SETS. Two key challenges arise in this more realistic setting: (i) how to use unlabeled data in the presence of a large amount of unlabeled out-of-distribution (OOD) data; and (ii) how to prevent catastrophic forgetting on previously learned task distributions due to the task distribution shift. We propose an OOD Robust and knowleDge presErved semi-supeRvised meta-learning approach (ORDER), to tackle these two major challenges. Specifically, our ORDER introduces a novel mutual information regularization to robustify the model with unlabeled OOD data and adopts an optimal transport regularization to remember previously learned knowledge in feature space. In addition, we test our method on a very challenging dataset: SETS on large-scale non-stationary semi-supervised task distributions consisting of (at least) 72K tasks. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate the proposed ORDER alleviates forgetting on evolving task distributions and is more robust to OOD data than related strong baselines.
summary: The paradigm of machine intelligence moves from purely supervised learning to a more practical scenario when many loosely related unlabeled data are available and labeled data is scarce. Most existing algorithms assume that the underlying task distribution is stationary. Here we consider a more realistic and challenging setting in that task distributions evolve over time. We name this problem as Semi-supervised meta-learning with Evolving Task diStributions, abbreviated as SETS. Two key challenges arise in this more realistic setting: (i) how to use unlabeled data in the presence of a large amount of unlabeled out-of-distribution (OOD) data; and (ii) how to prevent catastrophic forgetting on previously learned task distributions due to the task distribution shift. We propose an OOD Robust and knowleDge presErved semi-supeRvised meta-learning approach (ORDER), to tackle these two major challenges. Specifically, our ORDER introduces a novel mutual information regularization to robustify the model with unlabeled OOD data and adopts an optimal transport regularization to remember previously learned knowledge in feature space. In addition, we test our method on a very challenging dataset: SETS on large-scale non-stationary semi-supervised task distributions consisting of (at least) 72K tasks. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate the proposed ORDER alleviates forgetting on evolving task distributions and is more robust to OOD data than related strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 机器智能的范式从纯粹的监督学习转向更实际的场景，即许多松散相关的未标记数据可用且标记数据稀缺。大多数现有算法都假设底层任务分布是固定的。在这里，我们考虑一个更现实和更具挑战性的环境，任务分配随着时间的推移而变化。我们将这个问题命名为具有进化任务分布的半监督元学习，缩写为 SETS。在这种更现实的环境中出现了两个关键挑战：（i）如何在存在大量未标记的分布外（OOD）数据的情况下使用未标记的数据； (ii)如何防止由于任务分布转移而导致先前学习的任务分布发生灾难性遗忘。我们提出了一种 OOD 鲁棒且知识保存的半监督元学习方法（ORDER）来应对这两个主要挑战。具体来说，我们的 ORDER 引入了一种新颖的互信息正则化，以使用未标记的 OOD 数据来增强模型，并采用最佳传输正则化来记住特征空间中先前学习的知识。此外，我们在一个非常具有挑战性的数据集上测试我们的方法：由（至少）72K 任务组成的大规模非平稳半监督任务分布的 SETS。通过大量的实验，我们证明了所提出的 ORDER 减少了对不断变化的任务分布的遗忘，并且对于 OOD 数据比相关的强基线更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ORDER的半监督元学习方法，用于解决非平稳任务分布下的遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法假设任务分布是静态的，但实际场景中任务分布会随时间演变，导致模型难以处理大量未标记的分布外数据并防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: ORDER方法引入互信息正则化以增强对分布外数据的鲁棒性，并采用最优运输正则化以在特征空间中保留先前知识。
AI.result: 在包含至少72K任务的大型非平稳数据集上，ORDER相比现有方法显著减少了任务分布演变导致的遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: ORDER通过双重正则化机制有效应对了非平稳任务分布下的半监督元学习挑战，展现了更强的鲁棒性和适应性。
