authors_text: Andrew Lizarraga,Katherine L. Narr,Kirsten A. Donald,Shantanu H. Joshi
title: StreamNet: A WAE for White Matter Streamline Analysis
title_zh: StreamNet：用于白质流线分析的 WAE
abstract: We present StreamNet, an autoencoder architecture for the analysis of the highly heterogeneous geometry of large collections of white matter streamlines. This proposed framework takes advantage of geometry-preserving properties of the Wasserstein-1 metric in order to achieve direct encoding and reconstruction of entire bundles of streamlines. We show that the model not only accurately captures the distributive structures of streamlines in the population, but is also able to achieve superior reconstruction performance between real and synthetic streamlines. Experimental model performance is evaluated on white matter streamlines resulting from T1-weighted diffusion imaging of 40 healthy controls using recent state of the art bundle comparison metric that measures fiber-shape similarities.
summary: We present StreamNet, an autoencoder architecture for the analysis of the highly heterogeneous geometry of large collections of white matter streamlines. This proposed framework takes advantage of geometry-preserving properties of the Wasserstein-1 metric in order to achieve direct encoding and reconstruction of entire bundles of streamlines. We show that the model not only accurately captures the distributive structures of streamlines in the population, but is also able to achieve superior reconstruction performance between real and synthetic streamlines. Experimental model performance is evaluated on white matter streamlines resulting from T1-weighted diffusion imaging of 40 healthy controls using recent state of the art bundle comparison metric that measures fiber-shape similarities.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 StreamNet，一种自动编码器架构，用于分析大量白质流线的高度异构几何结构。该框架利用 Wasserstein-1 度量的几何保留特性，以实现整个流线束的直接编码和重建。我们表明，该模型不仅准确地捕捉了总体中流线的分布结构，而且还能够在真实流线和合成流线之间实现优异的重建性能。实验模型的性能是根据 40 名健康对照的 T1 加权扩散成像产生的白质流线进行评估，使用最新的最先进的束比较指标来测量纤维形状的相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StreamNet，一种基于Wasserstein-1度量的自编码器架构，用于分析白质束的异构几何结构并实现束的直接编码与重建。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理白质束的高异质性几何结构，需开发更精准的建模与重建方法以支持神经影像学分析。
AI.method: 利用Wasserstein-1度量的几何保持特性，设计自编码器直接对整束白质纤维进行编码与重建，结合最新束比较度量评估模型性能。
AI.result: 模型在40名健康受试者的T1加权扩散成像数据上，实现了对真实与合成白质束的高精度重建，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: StreamNet有效捕捉了白质束群体分布特征，为白质结构分析提供了新工具，可推动神经影像学与脑科学相关研究。

This proposed framework takes advantage of geometry-preserving properties of the Wasserstein-1 metric in order to achieve direct encoding and reconstruction of entire bundles of streamlines. Experimental model performance is evaluated on white matter streamlines resulting from T1-weighted diffusion imaging of 40 healthy controls using recent state of the art bundle comparison metric that measures fiber-shape similarities. 我们提出了 StreamNet，一种自动编码器架构，用于分析大量白质流线的高度异构几何结构。该框架利用 Wasserstein-1 度量的几何保留特性，以实现整个流线束的直接编码和重建。我们表明，该模型不仅准确地捕捉了总体中流线的分布结构，而且还能够在真实流线和合成流线之间实现优异的重建性能。实验模型的性能是根据 40 名健康对照的 T1 加权扩散成像产生的白质流线进行评估，使用最新的最先进的束比较指标来测量纤维形状的相似性。 本文提出StreamNet，一种基于Wasserstein-1度量的自编码器架构，用于分析白质束的异构几何结构并实现束的直接编码与重建。 Andrew Lizarraga,Katherine L. Narr,Kirsten A. Donald,Shantanu H. Joshi q-bio.QM,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Luke Borchjes,Clement Nyirenda,Louise Leenen
title: Model-Free Deep Reinforcement Learning in Software-Defined Networks
title_zh: 软件定义网络中的无模型深度强化学习
comment: SATNAC 2022 Conference, 6 pages, 2 tables, 5 figures, 2 algorithms
comments: SATNAC 2022 Conference, 6 pages, 2 tables, 5 figures, 2 algorithms
abstract: This paper compares two deep reinforcement learning approaches for cyber security in software defined networking. Neural Episodic Control to Deep Q-Network has been implemented and compared with that of Double Deep Q-Networks. The two algorithms are implemented in a format similar to that of a zero-sum game. A two-tailed T-test analysis is done on the two game results containing the amount of turns taken for the defender to win. Another comparison is done on the game scores of the agents in the respective games. The analysis is done to determine which algorithm is the best in game performer and whether there is a significant difference between them, demonstrating if one would have greater preference over the other. It was found that there is no significant statistical difference between the two approaches.
summary: This paper compares two deep reinforcement learning approaches for cyber security in software defined networking. Neural Episodic Control to Deep Q-Network has been implemented and compared with that of Double Deep Q-Networks. The two algorithms are implemented in a format similar to that of a zero-sum game. A two-tailed T-test analysis is done on the two game results containing the amount of turns taken for the defender to win. Another comparison is done on the game scores of the agents in the respective games. The analysis is done to determine which algorithm is the best in game performer and whether there is a significant difference between them, demonstrating if one would have greater preference over the other. It was found that there is no significant statistical difference between the two approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文比较了软件定义网络中网络安全的两种深度强化学习方法。已经实现了深度 Q 网络的神经情景控制，并与双深度 Q 网络进行了比较。这两种算法的实现格式类似于零和博弈。对两场比赛结果进行双尾 T 检验分析，其中包含防守方获胜所需的轮数。另一个比较是对各场比赛中特工的比赛得分进行比较。进行分析是为了确定哪种算法在游戏中表现最好，以及它们之间是否存在显着差异，从而证明一种算法是否比另一种算法有更大的偏好。结果发现，两种方法之间没有显着的统计差异。

AI.tldr: 比较两种深度强化学习方法在软件定义网络中的网络安全应用效果
AI.motivation: 确定哪种算法在网络安全场景中更优，以提升防御效率
AI.method: 实现并比较神经情节控制与双重深度Q网络，通过零和游戏模拟进行T检验和得分分析
AI.result: 两种方法在游戏回合数和得分上无显著统计差异
AI.conclusion: 两种算法在网络安全应用中表现相当，无显著优劣

authors_text: Zhe Xu,Tao Yan,Simon X. Yang,S. Andrew Gadsden
title: A Hybrid Tracking Control Strategy for an Unmanned Underwater Vehicle Aided with Bioinspired Neural Dynamics
title_zh: 仿生神经动力学辅助的无人水下航行器混合跟踪控制策略
abstract: Tracking control has been a vital research topic in robotics. This paper presents a novel hybrid control strategy for an unmanned underwater vehicle (UUV) based on a bioinspired neural dynamics model. An enhanced backstepping kinematic control strategy is first developed to avoid sharp velocity jumps and provides smooth velocity commands relative to conventional methods. Then, a novel sliding mode control is proposed, which is capable of providing smooth and continuous torque commands free from chattering. In comparative studies, the proposed combined hybrid control strategy has ensured control signals smoothness, which is critical in real world applications, especially for an unmanned underwater vehicle that needs to operate in complex underwater environments.
summary: Tracking control has been a vital research topic in robotics. This paper presents a novel hybrid control strategy for an unmanned underwater vehicle (UUV) based on a bioinspired neural dynamics model. An enhanced backstepping kinematic control strategy is first developed to avoid sharp velocity jumps and provides smooth velocity commands relative to conventional methods. Then, a novel sliding mode control is proposed, which is capable of providing smooth and continuous torque commands free from chattering. In comparative studies, the proposed combined hybrid control strategy has ensured control signals smoothness, which is critical in real world applications, especially for an unmanned underwater vehicle that needs to operate in complex underwater environments.
abstract_zh: 跟踪控制一直是机器人技术的重要研究课题。本文提出了一种基于仿生神经动力学模型的新型无人水下航行器（UUV）混合控制策略。首先开发了增强的反步运动控制策略，以避免急剧的速度跳跃，并提供相对于传统方法的平滑速度命令。然后，提出了一种新颖的滑模控制，它能够提供平滑且连续的扭矩命令，而不会出现颤振。在比较研究中，所提出的组合混合控制策略确保了控制信号的平滑性，这在实际应用中至关重要，特别是对于需要在复杂水下环境中运行的无人水下航行器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生物启发神经动力学模型的混合控制策略，用于改进无人水下航行器的跟踪控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法存在速度突变和抖动问题，而无人水下航行器在复杂环境中需要更平滑稳定的控制信号以确保操作安全性和精度。
AI.method: 采用增强反步法运动学控制避免速度突变，并设计新型滑模控制消除扭矩指令抖动，通过生物启发神经动力学模型实现混合控制策略的融合。
AI.result: 比较实验表明该混合策略有效保证了控制信号平滑性，在复杂水下环境中显著提升了无人航行器的跟踪控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合控制方法有效解决了传统控制策略的缺陷，为无人水下航行器在复杂环境中的稳定控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yanrong Hu,Simon X. Yang
title: A Novel Knowledge-Based Genetic Algorithm for Robot Path Planning in Complex Environments
title_zh: 一种新型的基于知识的复杂环境机器人路径规划遗传算法
abstract: In this paper, a novel knowledge-based genetic algorithm for path planning of a mobile robot in unstructured complex environments is proposed, where five problem-specific operators are developed for efficient robot path planning. The proposed genetic algorithm incorporates the domain knowledge of robot path planning into its specialized operators, some of which also combine a local search technique. A unique and simple representation of the robot path is proposed and a simple but effective path evaluation method is developed, where the collisions can be accurately detected and the quality of a robot path is well reflected. The proposed algorithm is capable of finding a near-optimal robot path in both static and dynamic complex environments. The effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm are demonstrated by simulation studies. The irreplaceable role of the specialized genetic operators in the proposed genetic algorithm for solving the robot path planning problem is demonstrated through a comparison study.
summary: In this paper, a novel knowledge-based genetic algorithm for path planning of a mobile robot in unstructured complex environments is proposed, where five problem-specific operators are developed for efficient robot path planning. The proposed genetic algorithm incorporates the domain knowledge of robot path planning into its specialized operators, some of which also combine a local search technique. A unique and simple representation of the robot path is proposed and a simple but effective path evaluation method is developed, where the collisions can be accurately detected and the quality of a robot path is well reflected. The proposed algorithm is capable of finding a near-optimal robot path in both static and dynamic complex environments. The effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithm are demonstrated by simulation studies. The irreplaceable role of the specialized genetic operators in the proposed genetic algorithm for solving the robot path planning problem is demonstrated through a comparison study.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于非结构化复杂环境中移动机器人路径规划的新型基于知识的遗传算法，其中开发了五个针对特定问题的算子来实现高效的机器人路径规划。所提出的遗传算法将机器人路径规划的领域知识纳入其专用算子中，其中一些还结合了局部搜索技术。提出了一种独特而简单的机器人路径表示方法，并开发了一种简单而有效的路径评估方法，可以准确检测碰撞并很好地反映机器人路径的质量。所提出的算法能够在静态和动态复杂环境中找到接近最优的机器人路径。通过仿真研究证明了所提出算法的有效性和效率。通过比较研究证明了专用遗传算子在解决机器人路径规划问题的遗传算法中具有不可替代的作用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于知识的遗传算法，用于复杂环境中移动机器人的高效路径规划
AI.motivation: 传统遗传算法在复杂环境中可能效率低下，难以结合领域知识，需改进以提高路径规划的效率和效果
AI.method: 设计五个结合领域知识和局部搜索的遗传操作符，提出简洁的路径表示和评估方法，用于静态和动态环境
AI.result: 仿真结果表明算法在静态和动态环境中能找到近似最优路径，专用操作符显著提升性能
AI.conclusion: 基于知识的遗传算法有效解决复杂环境路径规划，专用操作符是关键因素

The irreplaceable role of the specialized genetic operators in the proposed genetic algorithm for solving the robot path planning problem is demonstrated through a comparison study. 本文提出了一种用于非结构化复杂环境中移动机器人路径规划的新型基于知识的遗传算法，其中开发了五个针对特定问题的算子来实现高效的机器人路径规划。所提出的遗传算法将机器人路径规划的领域知识纳入其专用算子中，其中一些还结合了局部搜索技术。提出了一种独特而简单的机器人路径表示方法，并开发了一种简单而有效的路径评估方法，可以准确检测碰撞并很好地反映机器人路径的质量。所提出的算法能够在静态和动态复杂环境中找到接近最优的机器人路径。通过仿真研究证明了所提出算法的有效性和效率。通过比较研究证明了专用遗传算子在解决机器人路径规划问题的遗传算法中具有不可替代的作用。 提出一种基于知识的遗传算法，用于复杂环境中移动机器人的高效路径规划 Yanrong Hu,Simon X. Yang cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Elio Quinton
title: Equivariant Self-Supervision for Musical Tempo Estimation
title_zh: 音乐节奏估计的等变自监督
comment: Accepted at ISMIR 2022
comments: Accepted at ISMIR 2022
abstract: Self-supervised methods have emerged as a promising avenue for representation learning in the recent years since they alleviate the need for labeled datasets, which are scarce and expensive to acquire. Contrastive methods are a popular choice for self-supervision in the audio domain, and typically provide a learning signal by forcing the model to be invariant to some transformations of the input. These methods, however, require measures such as negative sampling or some form of regularisation to be taken to prevent the model from collapsing on trivial solutions. In this work, instead of invariance, we propose to use equivariance as a self-supervision signal to learn audio tempo representations from unlabelled data. We derive a simple loss function that prevents the network from collapsing on a trivial solution during training, without requiring any form of regularisation or negative sampling. Our experiments show that it is possible to learn meaningful representations for tempo estimation by solely relying on equivariant self-supervision, achieving performance comparable with supervised methods on several benchmarks. As an added benefit, our method only requires moderate compute resources and therefore remains accessible to a wide research community.
summary: Self-supervised methods have emerged as a promising avenue for representation learning in the recent years since they alleviate the need for labeled datasets, which are scarce and expensive to acquire. Contrastive methods are a popular choice for self-supervision in the audio domain, and typically provide a learning signal by forcing the model to be invariant to some transformations of the input. These methods, however, require measures such as negative sampling or some form of regularisation to be taken to prevent the model from collapsing on trivial solutions. In this work, instead of invariance, we propose to use equivariance as a self-supervision signal to learn audio tempo representations from unlabelled data. We derive a simple loss function that prevents the network from collapsing on a trivial solution during training, without requiring any form of regularisation or negative sampling. Our experiments show that it is possible to learn meaningful representations for tempo estimation by solely relying on equivariant self-supervision, achieving performance comparable with supervised methods on several benchmarks. As an added benefit, our method only requires moderate compute resources and therefore remains accessible to a wide research community.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自监督方法已成为表示学习的一种有前途的途径，因为它们减轻了对标记数据集的需求，而标记数据集稀缺且获取成本昂贵。对比方法是音频领域自我监督的流行选择，通常通过强制模型对输入的某些变换保持不变来提供学习信号。然而，这些方法需要采取负采样或某种形式的正则化等措施，以防止模型在平凡的解决方案上崩溃。在这项工作中，我们建议使用等方差作为自监督信号来从未标记的数据中学习音频节奏表示，而不是不变性。我们推导出一个简单的损失函数，可以防止网络在训练期间因简单的解决方案而崩溃，而不需要任何形式的正则化或负采样。我们的实验表明，仅依靠等变自监督就可以学习有意义的节奏估计表示，在多个基准上实现与监督方法相当的性能。作为一个额外的好处，我们的方法只需要适度的计算资源，因此仍然可供广泛的研究社区使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于等变自监督学习的音乐节拍估计方法，无需标注数据即可学习音频节拍表示。
AI.motivation: 标注数据稀缺且成本高昂，传统对比学习方法需依赖负样本或正则化防止模型崩溃，而等变性可提供更有效的自监督信号。
AI.method: 设计等变性损失函数，通过强制模型对输入变换保持等变性，无需负采样或正则化即可训练节拍表示。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法性能可与监督方法媲美，且计算资源需求较低。
AI.conclusion: 等变自监督学习为音频节拍估计提供了高效且易获取的解决方案，推动了无监督表征学习的发展。

authors_text: Christina O. Tze,Panagiotis P. Filntisis,Athanasia-Lida Dimou,Anastasios Roussos,Petros Maragos
title: Neural Sign Reenactor: Deep Photorealistic Sign Language Retargeting
title_zh: Neural Sign Reenactor：深度真实感手语重定向
comment: Accepted at AI4CC Workshop at CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted at AI4CC Workshop at CVPR 2023
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a neural rendering pipeline for transferring the facial expressions, head pose, and body movements of one person in a source video to another in a target video. We apply our method to the challenging case of Sign Language videos: given a source video of a sign language user, we can faithfully transfer the performed manual (e.g., handshape, palm orientation, movement, location) and non-manual (e.g., eye gaze, facial expressions, mouth patterns, head, and body movements) signs to a target video in a photo-realistic manner. Our method can be used for Sign Language Anonymization, Sign Language Production (synthesis module), as well as for reenacting other types of full body activities (dancing, acting performance, exercising, etc.). We conduct detailed qualitative and quantitative evaluations and comparisons, which demonstrate the particularly promising and realistic results that we obtain and the advantages of our method over existing approaches.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a neural rendering pipeline for transferring the facial expressions, head pose, and body movements of one person in a source video to another in a target video. We apply our method to the challenging case of Sign Language videos: given a source video of a sign language user, we can faithfully transfer the performed manual (e.g., handshape, palm orientation, movement, location) and non-manual (e.g., eye gaze, facial expressions, mouth patterns, head, and body movements) signs to a target video in a photo-realistic manner. Our method can be used for Sign Language Anonymization, Sign Language Production (synthesis module), as well as for reenacting other types of full body activities (dancing, acting performance, exercising, etc.). We conduct detailed qualitative and quantitative evaluations and comparisons, which demonstrate the particularly promising and realistic results that we obtain and the advantages of our method over existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种神经渲染管道，用于将源视频中一个人的面部表情、头部姿势和身体动作转移到目标视频中的另一个人。我们将我们的方法应用于具有挑战性的手语视频案例：给定手语用户的源视频，我们可以以逼真的方式将执行的手动（例如手形、手掌方向、运动、位置）和非手动（例如眼神、面部表情、嘴型、头部和身体动作）手势忠实地传输到目标视频。我们的方法可用于手语匿名化、手语生成（合成模块），以及用于重演其他类型的全身活动（舞蹈、表演、锻炼等）。我们进行了详细的定性和定量评估和比较，这证明了我们获得的特别有希望和现实的结果以及我们的方法相对于现有方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经渲染管道，将源视频中人物的面部表情、头部姿态和身体动作转移到目标视频中，实现手语视频的高质量重定向。
AI.motivation: 手语视频中需要保护隐私或生成合成内容时，现有方法难以实现面部、头部及身体动作的高保真转移，亟需更真实的重定向技术。
AI.method: 构建包含姿态估计、表情迁移和渲染模块的神经网络，通过分离手动（手势、位置）与非手动（眼神、面部表情）特征，实现跨视频的动作迁移。
AI.result: 在定性和定量评估中，生成的手语视频在真实感和动作准确性上优于现有方法，可应用于匿名化、合成生成及全身动作重定向。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为手语视频处理提供了有效解决方案，并可扩展至舞蹈、表演等全身动作的高质量重定向任务。

authors_text: Daniel Lopez-Martinez,Christina Chen,Ming-Jun Chen
title: Machine learning for dynamically predicting the onset of renal replacement therapy in chronic kidney disease patients using claims data
title_zh: 机器学习利用索赔数据动态预测慢性肾病患者肾脏替代治疗的开始时间
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. Submitted to the Applications of Medical AI (AMAI) at MICCAI 2022
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. Submitted to the Applications of Medical AI (AMAI) at MICCAI 2022
abstract: Chronic kidney disease (CKD) represents a slowly progressive disorder that can eventually require renal replacement therapy (RRT) including dialysis or renal transplantation. Early identification of patients who will require RRT (as much as 1 year in advance) improves patient outcomes, for example by allowing higher-quality vascular access for dialysis. Therefore, early recognition of the need for RRT by care teams is key to successfully managing the disease. Unfortunately, there is currently no commonly used predictive tool for RRT initiation. In this work, we present a machine learning model that dynamically identifies CKD patients at risk of requiring RRT up to one year in advance using only claims data. To evaluate the model, we studied approximately 3 million Medicare beneficiaries for which we made over 8 million predictions. We showed that the model can identify at risk patients with over 90% sensitivity and specificity. Although additional work is required before this approach is ready for clinical use, this study provides a basis for a screening tool to identify patients at risk within a time window that enables early proactive interventions intended to improve RRT outcomes.
summary: Chronic kidney disease (CKD) represents a slowly progressive disorder that can eventually require renal replacement therapy (RRT) including dialysis or renal transplantation. Early identification of patients who will require RRT (as much as 1 year in advance) improves patient outcomes, for example by allowing higher-quality vascular access for dialysis. Therefore, early recognition of the need for RRT by care teams is key to successfully managing the disease. Unfortunately, there is currently no commonly used predictive tool for RRT initiation. In this work, we present a machine learning model that dynamically identifies CKD patients at risk of requiring RRT up to one year in advance using only claims data. To evaluate the model, we studied approximately 3 million Medicare beneficiaries for which we made over 8 million predictions. We showed that the model can identify at risk patients with over 90% sensitivity and specificity. Although additional work is required before this approach is ready for clinical use, this study provides a basis for a screening tool to identify patients at risk within a time window that enables early proactive interventions intended to improve RRT outcomes.
abstract_zh: 慢性肾脏病 (CKD) 是一种缓慢进展的疾病，最终可能需要肾脏替代疗法 (RRT)，包括透析或肾移植。及早识别需要 RRT 的患者（最多提前 1 年）可以改善患者的治疗效果，例如通过允许更高质量的血管通路进行透析。因此，护理团队及早认识到 RRT 的必要性是成功控制疾病的关键。不幸的是，目前没有常用的 RRT 启动预测工具。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种机器学习模型，仅使用理赔数据即可提前一年动态识别有需要 RRT 风险的 CKD 患者。为了评估该模型，我们研究了大约 300 万医疗保险受益人，并对其进行了超过 800 万次预测。我们证明该模型可以以超过 90% 的敏感性和特异性识别高危患者。尽管在这种方法投入临床使用之前还需要做更多的工作，但这项研究为筛选工具提供了基础，该工具可以在一定时间范围内识别处于危险中的患者，从而能够进行旨在改善 RRT 结果的早期主动干预。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于机器学习和索赔数据的动态预测模型，用于提前一年预测慢性肾病患者是否需要肾脏替代治疗。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏有效工具预测慢性肾病患者肾脏替代治疗需求，而早期识别可改善患者预后，如优化透析血管通路。
AI.method: 利用300万Medicare受益人的索赔数据，构建机器学习模型动态预测RRT风险，并进行超过800万次预测验证。
AI.result: 模型在预测中展现超过90%的灵敏度和特异性，但需进一步优化后才能用于临床实践。
AI.conclusion: 研究为开发早期预警工具提供了基础，有助于实现针对高风险患者的早期干预以改善治疗结果。

search_text: Machine learning for dynamically predicting the onset of renal replacement therapy in chronic kidney disease patients using claims data 机器学习利用索赔数据动态预测慢性肾病患者肾脏替代治疗的开始时间 Chronic kidney disease (CKD) represents a slowly progressive disorder that can eventually require renal replacement therapy (RRT) including dialysis or renal transplantation. Early identification of patients who will require RRT (as much as 1 year in advance) improves patient outcomes, for example by allowing higher-quality vascular access for dialysis. Therefore, early recognition of the need for RRT by care teams is key to successfully managing the disease. Unfortunately, there is currently no commonly used predictive tool for RRT initiation. In this work, we present a machine learning model that dynamically identifies CKD patients at risk of requiring RRT up to one year in advance using only claims data. To evaluate the model, we studied approximately 3 million Medicare beneficiaries for which we made over 8 million predictions. We showed that the model can identify at risk patients with over 90% sensitivity and specificity. Although additional work is required before this approach is ready for clinical use, this study provides a basis for a screening tool to identify patients at risk within a time window that enables early proactive interventions intended to improve RRT outcomes. 慢性肾脏病 (CKD) 是一种缓慢进展的疾病，最终可能需要肾脏替代疗法 (RRT)，包括透析或肾移植。及早识别需要 RRT 的患者（最多提前 1 年）可以改善患者的治疗效果，例如通过允许更高质量的血管通路进行透析。因此，护理团队及早认识到 RRT 的必要性是成功控制疾病的关键。不幸的是，目前没有常用的 RRT 启动预测工具。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种机器学习模型，仅使用理赔数据即可提前一年动态识别有需要 RRT 风险的 CKD 患者。为了评估该模型，我们研究了大约 300 万医疗保险受益人，并对其进行了超过 800 万次预测。我们证明该模型可以以超过 90% 的敏感性和特异性识别高危患者。尽管在这种方法投入临床使用之前还需要做更多的工作，但这项研究为筛选工具提供了基础，该工具可以在一定时间范围内识别处于危险中的患者，从而能够进行旨在改善 RRT 结果的早期主动干预。 该论文提出一种基于机器学习和索赔数据的动态预测模型，用于提前一年预测慢性肾病患者是否需要肾脏替代治疗。 Daniel Lopez-Martinez,Christina Chen,Ming-Jun Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mansoor Ali,Rafael Martinez Garcia Pena,Gilberto Ochoa Ruiz,Sharib Ali
title: A comprehensive survey on recent deep learning-based methods applied to surgical data
title_zh: 对最近应用于手术数据的基于深度学习的方法的综合调查
comment: This paper is to be submitted to International journal of computer vision
comments: This paper is to be submitted to International journal of computer vision
abstract: Minimally invasive surgery is highly operator dependant with a lengthy procedural time causing fatigue to surgeon and risks to patients such as injury to organs, infection, bleeding, and complications of anesthesia. To mitigate such risks, real-time systems are desired to be developed that can provide intra-operative guidance to surgeons. For example, an automated system for tool localization, tool (or tissue) tracking, and depth estimation can enable a clear understanding of surgical scenes preventing miscalculations during surgical procedures. In this work, we present a systematic review of recent machine learning-based approaches including surgical tool localization, segmentation, tracking, and 3D scene perception. Furthermore, we provide a detailed overview of publicly available benchmark datasets widely used for surgical navigation tasks. While recent deep learning architectures have shown promising results, there are still several open research problems such as a lack of annotated datasets, the presence of artifacts in surgical scenes, and non-textured surfaces that hinder 3D reconstruction of the anatomical structures. Based on our comprehensive review, we present a discussion on current gaps and needed steps to improve the adaptation of technology in surgery.
summary: Minimally invasive surgery is highly operator dependant with a lengthy procedural time causing fatigue to surgeon and risks to patients such as injury to organs, infection, bleeding, and complications of anesthesia. To mitigate such risks, real-time systems are desired to be developed that can provide intra-operative guidance to surgeons. For example, an automated system for tool localization, tool (or tissue) tracking, and depth estimation can enable a clear understanding of surgical scenes preventing miscalculations during surgical procedures. In this work, we present a systematic review of recent machine learning-based approaches including surgical tool localization, segmentation, tracking, and 3D scene perception. Furthermore, we provide a detailed overview of publicly available benchmark datasets widely used for surgical navigation tasks. While recent deep learning architectures have shown promising results, there are still several open research problems such as a lack of annotated datasets, the presence of artifacts in surgical scenes, and non-textured surfaces that hinder 3D reconstruction of the anatomical structures. Based on our comprehensive review, we present a discussion on current gaps and needed steps to improve the adaptation of technology in surgery.
abstract_zh: 微创手术高度依赖操作者，手术时间长，导致外科医生疲劳，并给患者带来器官损伤、感染、出血和麻醉并发症等风险。为了减轻此类风险，需要开发可以为外科医生提供术中指导的实时系统。例如，用于工具定位、工具（或组织）跟踪和深度估计的自动化系统可以清楚地了解手术场景，防止手术过程中的误算。在这项工作中，我们对最近基于机器学习的方法进行了系统回顾，包括手术工具定位、分割、跟踪和 3D 场景感知。此外，我们还提供了广泛用于手术导航任务的公开基准数据集的详细概述。虽然最近的深度学习架构已经显示出有希望的结果，但仍然存在一些开放的研究问题，例如缺乏带注释的数据集、手术场景中存在伪影以及阻碍解剖结构 3D 重建的无纹理表面。根据我们的全面审查，我们讨论了当前的差距以及改进手术技术适应性所需的步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了近期应用于手术数据的深度学习方法，并讨论了当前挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 为解决微创手术中因操作依赖性和长时间操作导致的医生疲劳及患者风险，需开发实时术中指导系统以提高手术安全性和精准度。
AI.method: 通过系统回顾和分析近期机器学习方法，总结公开可用的手术导航任务数据集，并评估现有技术的局限性。
AI.result: 结果指出当前存在标注数据不足、手术场景伪影及非纹理表面影响3D重建等挑战，并提出改进技术适应手术的必要步骤。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为需开发更鲁棒的模型与多样化标注数据集以促进深度学习在手术中的实际应用。
